translations.english: Dawnstar is the capital of the Pale, known for its rich mines and harbor.

translations.english: The Tower of Dawn sits on a mountain overlooking Dawnstar. It is rumored to be cursed.

translations.english: Falkreath has been the site of many battles throughout history. The town's graveyard holds the remains of many Nord warriors who fell in those battles.
translations.chinese: 历史上，佛克瑞斯曾经爆发过许多战斗。这座城镇的墓地中埋葬着许多在这些战争中牺牲的诺德战士们的遗骸。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: TownFalkreath01
Translations:
- LSCR:DESC | EN: Falkreath has been the site of many battles throughout history. The town's graveyard holds the remains of many Nord warriors who fell in those battles. | ZH: 历史上，佛克瑞斯曾经爆发过许多战斗。这座城镇的墓地中埋葬着许多在这些战争中牺牲的诺德战士们的遗骸。 | SID: 001C5E

translations.english: The Jarl of Falkreath is Siddgeir. Among the youngest of the Jarls in Skyrim, Siddgeir took the place of the former Jarl, his uncle Dengeir.
translations.chinese: 佛克瑞斯的西德盖尔取代了自己叔父丹格尔，成为了天际最年轻的领主。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Like many of Skyrim's woodland settlements, Falkreath's economy is heavily reliant on the production of lumber.

translations.english: You have a vision of someone sleeping peacefully in his bed, when a shadowy, gaunt figure silently enters the room. Approaching the bed, the figure leans down and sinks its fangs into the sleeping person. After a few moments, the pale figure rises, blood dripping down his chin. As color flows back into the vampire's face, and his features fill out, you recognize the face as your own.
translations.chinese: 你看到一个人静静躺在自己的床上，这时一个模糊瘦削的身影悄悄走进房间。走近床边，那个身影俯下身子，用尖牙咬入了熟睡的人。过了一会儿，苍白的身影站起身，血从他的下巴上缓缓滴落。当吸血鬼脸上恢复血色，而五官再度丰满，你认出了那是你自己的面庞。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: VampireDiseaseMessage
Translations:
- MESG:DESC | EN: You have a vision of someone sleeping peacefully in his bed, when a shadowy, gaunt figure silently enters the room. Approaching the bed, the figure leans down and sinks its fangs into the sleeping person. After a few moments, the pale figure rises, blood dripping down his chin. As color flows back into the vampire's face, and his features fill out, you recognize the face as your own. | ZH: 你看到一个人静静躺在自己的床上，这时一个模糊瘦削的身影悄悄走进房间。走近床边，那个身影俯下身子，用尖牙咬入了熟睡的人。过了一会儿，苍白的身影站起身，血从他的下巴上缓缓滴落。当吸血鬼脸上恢复血色，而五官再度丰满，你认出了那是你自己的面庞。 | SID: 0060C8

translations.english: Falion in Morthal is rumored to have studied vampires. He might be able to cure the condition.
translations.chinese: 据说莫萨尔的法利昂研究过吸血鬼。也许他能治好我的病。

translations.english: Falion in Morthal can perform a ritual to cure vampirism. I need to meet him at the Black Marsh at dawn for him to perform the ritual. I should be careful not to be Blood-Starved when I meet with him or he won't trust me enough to help.
translations.chinese: 莫萨尔的法利昂可以举行治愈吸血鬼的仪式。我要等到黎明时分在黑色沼泽里和他见面以便他举行仪式。我跟他见面的时候要小心克制自己对鲜血的饥渴，否则他会不相信我，不会帮忙。

translations.english: Falion in Morthal can perform a ritual to cure vampirism. He requires a filled black soul gem. I should be careful not to be Blood-Starved when I meet with him or he won't trust me enough to help.
translations.chinese: 莫萨尔的法利昂可以举行治愈吸血鬼的仪式。他需要一个充满的黑色灵魂石。我跟他见面的时候要小心克制自己对鲜血的饥渴，否则他会不相信我，不会帮忙。

translations.english: Falion in Morthal has cured me of vamprism, if I ever contract it again I should contact him.
translations.chinese: 莫萨尔的法利昂治愈了我的吸血鬼病，如果我再次感染，可以重新联系他。

translations.english: Rising at Dawn
Speak to Falion
Bring a filled Black Soul Gem to Morthal
translations.chinese: 将一颗充满的黑色灵魂石带回莫萨尔

translations.english: Meet Falion at dawn
translations.chinese: 在黎明时分与法利昂见面

translations.english: Wait for Falion to complete the ritual
Speak to Falion

translations.english: See, my grandfather was a wizard. My father wouldn't talk about him much. But I found some of his things in the attic. Including this staff.
translations.chinese: 我祖父是个巫师。我爸不怎么谈论他。但我在阁楼上找到了他的一些东西。包括这个法杖。

translations.english: I even went to the College of Winterhold. But they just laughed at me. The magic is in the staff, not in me they said.
translations.chinese: 我甚至去过冬堡学院。但他们只是嘲笑我，说魔力是法杖的，不是我的。

translations.english: After that I thought I was turning into a wizard too, because dead things near me would come to life again for while.
translations.chinese: 在那之后，我还以为自己也变成了巫师，因为我能让身边死去的东西复活一段时间。

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Be on the look out for the <Alias.Race=Player> called <Alias=Player>. <Alias.Pronoun=Player> is an enemy to the Thalmor, and has actively disrupted our activities and caused great harm. If spotted, you are to destroy <Alias.PronounObj=Player> with extreme hatred. Be advised, <Alias.Pronoun=Player> is extremely dangerous, and quite able to defend <Alias.PronounRef=Player>. If caught by local authorities, we are unable to offer you any assistance. For the glory of the Aldmeri Dominion!</font>
translations.chinese: 请留意名为<Alias=Player>的<Alias.Race=Player>。<Alias.Pronoun=Player>是梭默的敌人，积极干扰我们的活动，造成大量人员伤亡。一旦发现<Alias.PronounObj=Player>，你可秉承怒火将其就地正法。 注意，<Alias.Pronoun=Player>极其危险。请务必全力提防<Alias.PronounRef=Player>的反抗。若你被地方当局抓获，我们将无力提供任何援助。 为了先祖神洲的荣耀！</font>

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> If you are reading this, then I am most likely dead. A group of bandits ransacked my home and took most everything valuable I own. The worst is they took a pendant that has been in my family for many generations. Most of my family is dead, so that pendant was the last connection I had with any of them. I am going after those scoundrels and getting my pendant back, even if it is the death of me.
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 如果你正在读这张纸条，那很可能我已经死了。一帮强盗闯进了我家，将我值钱的东西洗劫一空。最糟的是他们抢走了我家世代相传的吊坠。我家很多人都去世了，那吊坠是我与他们最后的联系了。我要去追那帮恶棍，就算搭上我这条命也要把吊坠抢回来。

translations.english: Corpse Note

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: WEJS01Note
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> If you are reading this, then I am most likely dead. A group of bandits ransacked my home and took most everything valuable I own. The worst is they took a pendant that has been in my family for many generations. Most of my family is dead, so that pendant was the last connection I had with any of them. I am going after those scoundrels and getting my pendant back, even if it is the death of me. | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 如果你正在读这张纸条，那很可能我已经死了。一帮强盗闯进了我家，将我值钱的东西洗劫一空。最糟的是他们抢走了我家世代相传的吊坠。我家很多人都去世了，那吊坠是我与他们最后的联系了。我要去追那帮恶棍，就算搭上我这条命也要把吊坠抢回来。 | SID: 002E06

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="15"> To our respectable investor, It seems our expedition to <Alias=Dungeon> has met with some resistance from its inhabitants. I know this isn't the first time, but if you would provide us with a few more men and supplies, we are certain the treasure there would yield a return on your investment. This time for sure. If not, we could begin searching for prospects outside of <Alias=myHoldLocation>. A swift reply would be most appreciated.
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="15"> 尊贵的投资人： 我们探索<Alias=Dungeon>的探险队似乎遭到了其中原住民的抵抗。我知道此事并非头一次发生，但还是希望您能再给我们提供一些人手和补给，相信那地方的宝藏会让您一本万利的。 这次肯定能成事。 如果一无所获的话，我们会开始着手搜索<Alias=myHoldLocation>外其他可能的地点。 如能尽快回复，将不胜感激。

translations.english: Courier's Letter

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: WERoad08CourierLetter
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="15"> To our respectable investor, It seems our expedition to <Alias=Dungeon> has met with some resistance from its inhabitants. I know this isn't the first time, but if you would provide us with a few more men and supplies, we are certain the treasure there would yield a return on your investment. This time for sure. If not, we could begin searching for prospects outside of <Alias=myHoldLocation>. A swift reply would be most appreciated. | ZH: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="15"> 尊贵的投资人： 我们探索<Alias=Dungeon>的探险队似乎遭到了其中原住民的抵抗。我知道此事并非头一次发生，但还是希望您能再给我们提供一些人手和补给，相信那地方的宝藏会让您一本万利的。 这次肯定能成事。 如果一无所获的话，我们会开始着手搜索<Alias=myHoldLocation>外其他可能的地点。 如能尽快回复，将不胜感激。 | SID: 011728

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> <Alias=Player>, It has come to my attention you may have recently acquired a certain <Alias=Item> from <Alias=ItemLocation>. I'm not sure how such an object came to find itself resting there... but I've been trying to obtain one for my research. If you still have it, or if not, find another one, I would be most appreciative if you were to bring it to me here in Markarth. I will pay handsomely. Sincerely, Calcelmo </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> <Alias=Player>, 我得知您最近可能从<Alias=ItemLocation>获得了某个<Alias=Item>。 我不知这样一件物品是怎么出现在那里的……但我一直想为我的研究弄上一个。 如果你还留着，即使没有却能另找一件，请带到马卡斯来，我将不胜感激。我会支付一大笔钱给你。 向您致敬 --卡塞莫 </font>

translations.english: <Alias=Player>, I'm aware of your recent assault on <Alias=Victim>. Rest assured I have no interest in that particular matter. I do, however, have an interest in your willingness to employ force when the need arises. If you are able to assist me, I will gladly pay you for your troubles. Next time you are visiting <Alias=Settlement>, please call on me. Sincerely, <Alias=QuestGiver>
translations.chinese: <Alias=Player>： 我知道您最近袭击了<Alias=Victim>。尽管放心，我对那件事没兴趣。不过，我确实对您在需要诉诸武力时乐意运用它这点很有兴趣。 若您能助我一臂之力，我也愿为您的麻烦善后。 下一回您造访<Alias=Settlement>时，请来找我。 此致， <Alias=QuestGiver>

translations.english: Inheritance

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: WIKill03
Translations:
- QUST:FULL | EN: Inheritance | ZH: Inheritance | SID: 002646

translations.english: <Alias=Player>, In the name of Jarl <Alias=Jarl>, it is with great regret that we inform you of <Alias=DeadFriend>'s death. The deceased has bequeathed unto you a measure of inheritance in the amount of <Global=WIKill03Inheritance> gold pieces. The Jarl's court has levied an amount of <Global=WIKill03Tax> gold pieces from the sum, as the lawfully and honorably due tax. The remainder has been commended unto the care of a trusted courier for deliverance. While all of the Jarl's court grieves with you on this day, we rejoice in the knowledge that the deceased was in possession of dear friends and wealth to communicate unto them. May this lawfully bestowed inheritance prove as a reminder of your enduring faith in one another, and of the Jarl's beneficence accorded unto you both.
translations.chinese: <Alias=Player>, 以<Alias=Jarl>领主之名，我们非常遗憾地告知您<Alias=DeadFriend>的死讯。 死者为您留下了一笔<Global=WIKill03Inheritance>金币的遗产。 领主宫廷已从该笔款项中征收得<Global=WIKill03Tax>金币，以作为合法而光荣的应缴税款。其余部分已委托值得信赖的信使转送交付。 今日整个宫廷与您同悲，但我们也很高兴知悉亡者拥有亲爱的好友和财富来彼此传心。 愿这份合法授予的遗产能让你们铭记彼此永恒的信任，以及领主对您二位的厚爱。

translations.english: Letter of Inheritance

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: WIKill03InheritanceLetter
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <Alias=Player>, In the name of Jarl <Alias=Jarl>, it is with great regret that we inform you of <Alias=DeadFriend>'s death. The deceased has bequeathed unto you a measure of inheritance in the amount of <Global=WIKill03Inheritance> gold pieces. The Jarl's court has levied an amount of <Global=WIKill03Tax> gold pieces from the sum, as the lawfully and honorably due tax. The remainder has been commended unto the care of a trusted courier for deliverance. While all of the Jarl's court grieves with you on this day, we rejoice in the knowledge that the deceased was in possession of dear friends and wealth to communicate unto them. May this lawfully bestowed inheritance prove as a reminder of your enduring faith in one another, and of the Jarl's beneficence accorded unto you both. | ZH: <Alias=Player>, 以<Alias=Jarl>领主之名，我们非常遗憾地告知您<Alias=DeadFriend>的死讯。 死者为您留下了一笔<Global=WIKill03Inheritance>金币的遗产。 领主宫廷已从该笔款项中征收得<Global=WIKill03Tax>金币，以作为合法而光荣的应缴税款。其余部分已委托值得信赖的信使转送交付。 今日整个宫廷与您同悲，但我们也很高兴知悉亡者拥有亲爱的好友和财富来彼此传心。 愿这份合法授予的遗产能让你们铭记彼此永恒的信任，以及领主对您二位的厚爱。 | SID: 00C2A6

translations.english: The clanfolk of the Western Valenwood forests, also known as "Bosmer." Wood elves make good scouts and thieves, and there are no finer archers in all of Tamriel. They have natural resistances to both poisons and diseases. They can Command Animals to fight for them.
translations.chinese: 西方威伦森林的种族，也被称为“波斯莫”。木精灵是优秀的斥候和盗贼，全泰姆瑞尔难觅可以与之比肩的弓箭手。他们对毒素和疾病都具有天然的抵抗力。可以命令动物为其作战。

translations.chinese: 你可以把物品安全地存放在家中的任何容器内，但如果放进其他地方的容器里，再去取的时候，有没有就两说了……

translations.english: Skyrim is engaged in a bloody civil conflict between the rebel Stormcloaks and soldiers of the Imperial Legion.
translations.chinese: 天际正深陷风暴斗篷叛军与帝国军团之间的血腥内战。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Agents of the high elven Aldmeri Dominion are known as Thalmor. They maintain an embassy in Skyrim, and have been known to secretly capture and imprison any Nords who question their doctrines or beliefs.
translations.chinese: 高精灵先祖神洲的特使被称为“梭默”。他们在天际设有大使馆，并秘密逮捕和监禁任何质疑他们教义或信仰的诺德人。

translations.english: When a dragon uses a breath attack like fire or frost, it is speaking in an ancient and powerful language. A battle between two dragons is actually a deadly verbal debate.
translations.chinese: 当龙使用类似火焰或冰霜的龙息攻击时，其实是在使用一种古老而强大的语言。两头龙之间的战斗其实是一场致命的“口舌之争”。

translations.english: Skyrim is in turmoil because the Stormcloaks believe their Nord way of life is at risk, while the Imperials believe Skyrim is a part of the Empire, and must follow its laws and customs.
translations.chinese: 天际如今一片混乱，风暴斗篷认为他们身为诺德人的生活方式受到了威胁，而帝国则认为天际是帝国的一部分，必须遵守帝国的法律和习俗。

translations.english: Skyrim legend tells of a hero known as the Dragonborn, a warrior with the body of a mortal and soul of a dragon, whose destiny it is to destroy the evil dragon Alduin.
translations.chinese: 天际的传说中有一种名为“龙裔”的英雄，他们是凡身龙魂的战士，肩负着毁灭邪恶巨龙奥杜因的命运。

translations.english: "Maw unleashing razor snow, Of dragons from the blue brought down, Births the walking winter's woe, The High King in his Jagged Crown." -- Ancient Nord Verse
translations.chinese: “苍穹陨落的巨龙，拔取雪白剃刀般的牙齿。诞生于苦寒凛冬之境的人们，为至高王加冕锯齿王冠。”——古代诺德诗歌

translations.english: The High King of Skyrim, Torygg, was recently killed by Ulfric Stormcloak, who used the ancient power of the Thu'um to nearly shout Torygg to pieces.
translations.chinese: 天际的至高王托依格最近被乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷杀了。乌弗瑞克使用古老的吐'目之力几乎将他撕成碎片。

translations.english: Although they later became the dedicated protectors of the Emperor of Tamriel, the Blades began their existence as renowned dragonslayers.
translations.chinese: 刀锋会起初是著名的屠龙者，后来才成为了泰姆瑞尔皇帝的忠实护卫。

translations.english: The Blades have long since disbanded, and the organization's few remaining members have gone into hiding. The Emperor is now protected by a special security force - the Penitus Oculatus.
translations.chinese: 刀锋会早已解散，剩下的少数成员也都躲藏起来。皇帝现如今由一支被称为“洞察眼”的特殊卫队保护着。

translations.english: Many of Skyrim's Nords harbor a bitter resentment of all elvenkind, who they've battled with throughout history. The Great War may be over, but its horrors are still fresh in the minds of the conflict's survivors...
translations.chinese: 因为历史上的时常交战，天际许多诺德人对所有精灵都怀有怨恨。浩大战争或许已经结束，但大战幸存者仍然记忆犹新。

translations.english: Only by signing the peace treaty known as the White-Gold Concordat was the Empire able to survive the onslaught of the high elven Aldmeri Dominion, and thus end the Great War.
translations.chinese: 正因签署了名为《白金协定》的和平条约，帝国才从高精灵先祖神洲的进攻下幸存下来，并结束了浩大战争。

translations.english: Let's hope it's as powerful as the Psijics believe it to be.
translations.chinese: 希望这东西和赛伊克说的一样强大。

translations.english: Ah... here's the "blood seal." Another of the lost Akaviri arts. No doubt triggered by... well, blood.
translations.chinese: 啊……“血封印”。又是一门失传的阿卡维尔技艺。肯定是需要由……血来解封。

translations.english: Wonderful! Remarkably well-preserved, too.
translations.chinese: 真不错！保存的非常完好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00013118]

translations.english: After you, Dragonborn. You should have the honor of being the first to set foot in Sky Haven Temple.
translations.chinese: 龙裔，请你先走。你应该有幸成为第一个踏足天佑神殿的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00013119]

translations.chinese: 伊思本可能是对的。把你的血滴在地板的封印上试试看。

translations.chinese: 你要是需要别人帮忙放血就叫我一声。

translations.english: Look here! You see how the ancient Blades revered Reman Cyrodiil.
translations.chinese: 看看！能看出古代的刀锋会是何等崇敬雷曼·希罗帝尔。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001311D]
Translations:

translations.english: This whole place appears to be a shrine to Reman. He ended the Akaviri invasion under mysterious circumstances, you recall.
translations.chinese: 整个地方就是雷曼的圣祠。记得吗，他不可思议地终结了阿卡维尔入侵。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001311E]
Translations:

translations.english: After the so-called "battle" of Pale Pass, the Akaviri went into his service. This was the foundation stone of the Second Empire.
translations.chinese: 在所谓的苍白隘口“战役”之后，阿卡维尔向他效忠。这就是第二帝国的基石。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Gods above, what are you waiting for?
translations.chinese: 众神在上，你还在等什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00013123]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Gods above, what are you waiting for? | ZH: 众神在上，你还在等什么？ | SID: 00280B

translations.english: Of course, it would be much easier to check with an alchemist. They occasionally have them for sale.
translations.chinese: 当然，找炼金术士问问就容易的多了，他们偶尔会出售的。

translations.english: A flame atronach's body might provide fire salt. They're dangerous creatures that can be summoned by wizards.
translations.chinese: 火焰侍灵的身体可能会提供火盐。那是被巫师们召唤出来的危险生物。

translations.english: Shutting this place down would dishonor my family's heritage, but what other choice will I have?
translations.chinese: 虽然关闭这里会辱没先人，可我还能有什么办法？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00013628]

translations.chinese: 你吗？谢谢！十撮火盐就够让这个锻炉起死回生了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001362B]
Translations:

translations.english: Return anytime. You're quite welcome here.
translations.chinese: 随时回来看看。我十分欢迎。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001362C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Return anytime. You're quite welcome here. | ZH: 随时回来看看。我十分欢迎。 | SID: 009037

translations.chinese: 记住，只有真正的火盐才会起作用……锻炉是能察觉区别的。

translations.english: If you need any more smithing work, come see me again.
translations.chinese: 如果你还需要锻造更多东西，再回来找我吧。

agentText:

translations.english: Here, take your coin and tell Brynjolf to leave us alone.
translations.chinese: 拿上你的钱，叫布林乔夫离我们远点。

translations.english: You demand payment for protection and you can't even protect yourselves.
translations.chinese: 你们要求支付保护费，却连自己都保护不了。

translations.english: I can't believe you did that. You people are monsters!
translations.chinese: 真不敢相信你会这么做。你们简直就是怪物！

translations.english: So, you've got two options. Try to find Agallon yourself, somewhere on his route between the major cities. Or... find and steal his schedule.
translations.chinese: 所以你有两个选择。试着在各大城之间的路上自己去找阿加隆。或者……偷走他的日程表。

translations.english: Agallon is an efficient man, and will certainly already have begun his tour of Skyrim. Unfortunately, we don't have his schedule.
translations.chinese: 阿加隆办事高效，他肯定意见开始自己的天际之旅了。可惜我们没有他的日程安排。

translations.english: Security is being handled by a man named Voltus Agallon. His job is to travel throughout Skyrim, and ensure each city is prepared for Mede's visit.
translations.chinese: 有个叫沃尔图斯·阿加隆的人负责安保工作。他的职责是巡查天际的各城市，确保各城都为迈德出巡做好准备。

translations.english: With the Emperor's arrival in Skyrim now a certainty, the Imperial Legion will need to begin its preparations immediately.
translations.chinese: 皇帝要抵达天际，帝国军团必然要开始准备。

translations.english: You must find and kill Voltus Agallon. Doing so will disrupt security sufficiently that we will be able to, eventually, get to to the Emperor.
translations.chinese: 你必须找到并杀掉沃尔图斯·阿加隆。这样就能破坏安全工作，最终我们就能找到皇帝了。

translations.english: Give me the details.

translations.english: After I kill you, I'm going to kill the Emperor.
translations.chinese: 等杀了你之后，我就要去杀皇帝了。

translations.chinese: 首先，我想在叛军中散播困惑和怀疑。我想把他们的指挥官杀了。

translations.chinese: 而且技术很娴熟。我观察你很久了。确实有成为优秀猎人的潜质。

translations.english: You may even be my champion. Perhaps.
translations.chinese: 你甚至有资格做我的勇士了。可能吧。

translations.english: There is no retribution in the hunt. It is not vengeance I seek, but the blood course of a living hunt.
translations.chinese: 狩猎不是报复。我所期待的不是复仇，而是血淋淋、活生生的狩猎罢了。

translations.english: They will hunt him while you delay. Your choice.
translations.chinese: 你在犹豫的时候，他们会去猎捕他。自己选吧。

translations.english: The one who stole it has fled to what he thinks is his sanctuary.

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016758]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're gonna get me out of here? | ZH: 你是来救我出去的？ | SID: 00E98B

translations.english: Good. Glad we straightened that out.
translations.chinese: 好。很高兴咱们能达成共识。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000167BB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. Glad we straightened that out. | ZH: 好。很高兴咱们能达成共识。 | SID: 00EC84

translations.english: I need to ask you to stop. That... shouting... is making people nervous.
translations.chinese: 我得请你停下。那样……吼叫……让人们很紧张。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000167BC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I need to ask you to stop. That... shouting... is making people nervous. | ZH: 我得请你停下。那样……吼叫……让人们很紧张。 | SID: 00A628

translations.english: You shouldn't leave weapons laying around. Someone could get hurt. And if I see you do it again, that someone will be you.
translations.chinese: 你不该拿着武器到处乱晃。有人可能会受伤。下次再让我看见，那受伤的就是你。

translations.english: Have I made myself clear?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000167C8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You shouldn't leave weapons laying around. Someone could get hurt. And if I see you do it again, that someone will be you. | ZH: 你不该拿着武器到处乱晃。有人可能会受伤。下次再让我看见，那受伤的就是你。 | SID: 00CA14
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Have I made myself clear? | ZH: 我讲得够清楚了吗？ | SID: 00F849

translations.english: I've got my eye on you.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000167C9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I've got my eye on you. | ZH: 我会盯着你的。 | SID: 006E96

translations.english: Can't say I've heard of any laws against... whatever that is you're doing. But I'll lock you up if I have to.
translations.chinese: 法无禁止即可为……即使是你这样的行为。但如果有必要，我会把你抓起来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000167CA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Can't say I've heard of any laws against... whatever that is you're doing. But I'll lock you up if I have to. | ZH: 法无禁止即可为……即使是你这样的行为。但如果有必要，我会把你抓起来。 | SID: 00EEB3

translations.english: Tell me, husband. Is it true what I've heard?
translations.chinese: 老公，跟我说说。我听到的是真的吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000167DF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Tell me, husband. Is it true what I've heard? | ZH: 老公，跟我说说。我听到的是真的吗？ | SID: 006EF4

translations.english: So, is it true?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000167E0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So, is it true? | ZH: 这么说，是真的了？ | SID: 00D532

translations.english: Come now. What everyone else is saying. It can't possibly be true...
translations.chinese: 得了吧。不管大家怎么说。肯定不是真的……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000167E1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come now. What everyone else is saying. It can't possibly be true... | ZH: 得了吧。不管大家怎么说。肯定不是真的…… | SID: 007456

translations.english: But really. A horker, some twine, three wood elves, and a hatchet? Points for creativity, if nothing else.
translations.chinese: 但说真的。一头海象、几根麻绳，三个木精灵再加一把斧子？别的不说，至少很有创意啊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000167E2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: But really. A horker, some twine, three wood elves, and a hatchet? Points for creativity, if nothing else. | ZH: 但说真的。一头海象、几根麻绳，三个木精灵再加一把斧子？别的不说，至少很有创意啊。 | SID: 00FE22

translations.english: It's the part with the severed head I find most impressive. My compliments.
translations.chinese: 我觉得砍头那部分很精彩。值得表扬。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000167E3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's the part with the severed head I find most impressive. My compliments. | ZH: 我觉得砍头那部分很精彩。值得表扬。 | SID: 008DB9

translations.english: I'm just trying to imagine you hiding inside the body of a mammoth. Bloody brilliant idea.
translations.chinese: 我只是在想你躲在猛犸身体里的样子。真是好点子。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016810]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm just trying to imagine you hiding inside the body of a mammoth. Bloody brilliant idea. | ZH: 我只是在想你躲在猛犸身体里的样子。真是好点子。 | SID: 00E2D6

translations.english: Ah, you must mean my little adventure on the ship...
translations.chinese: 哦，你是说我在船上的小小冒险吧……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016811]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah, you must mean my little adventure on the ship... | ZH: 哦，你是说我在船上的小小冒险吧…… | SID: 00099A

translations.english: Oh, you mean in that manor house? During the thunderstorm? Heh. What can I say? It happened, just like you heard.
translations.chinese: 哦，你是说庄园里那档子事？下雷雨那天？哈，我还有啥好说的？和你听说的一样。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016813]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, you mean in that manor house? During the thunderstorm? Heh. What can I say? It happened, just like you heard. | ZH: 哦，你是说庄园里那档子事？下雷雨那天？哈，我还有啥好说的？和你听说的一样。 | SID: 003DA9

translations.english: It's all thanks to a special technique I developed. I call it the "Razor-Winged Butterfly." I'd teach it to you... but then I'd have to kill you.
translations.chinese: 都要归功于我发明的一项特殊技术。我起了个名字叫“刀翼蝴蝶”。回头可以教教你……教完我就得把你弄死。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001681D]
Translations:

translations.english: Romantic, isn't? Like that time we first met. Remember that? Never seen so much blood. Ah, to be young again...
translations.chinese: 浪漫吗？就像我们的初遇一样。记得吗？从没见过那么多血。哦，梦回年轻啊……

translations.chinese: 我宁可花时间四处看看，也不会盲目地跳进埋伏。

translations.english: Auxiliary, see if you can find another way through. We'll charge in to help as soon as we hear fighting.
translations.chinese: 辅助兵，去看看有没有别的路可走。一旦听到战斗，我们会冲过去帮忙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016953]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Auxiliary, see if you can find another way through. We'll charge in to help as soon as we hear fighting. | ZH: 辅助兵，去看看有没有别的路可走。一旦听到战斗，我们会冲过去帮忙。 | SID: 00F459

translations.english: But there isn't any other way through, Legate.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016954]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: But there isn't any other way through, Legate. | ZH: 但没有别的路了，副官。 | SID: 00F81B

translations.english: Let's not jump to conclusions, soldier. The Legion always finds a way.
translations.chinese: 不要妄下结论，士兵。军团总能找到出路。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016955]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let's not jump to conclusions, soldier. The Legion always finds a way. | ZH: 不要妄下结论，士兵。军团总能找到出路。 | SID: 009E21

translations.english: There may be some way to get through on the level above. Hurry!
translations.chinese: 也许有路能通过上层。快点！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016956]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There may be some way to get through on the level above. Hurry! | ZH: 也许有路能通过上层。快点！ | SID: 00A4A1

translations.english: Maybe you can find a way through somewhere above us.
translations.chinese: 也许你能在上头找到路。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016957]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Maybe you can find a way through somewhere above us. | ZH: 也许你能在上头找到路。 | SID: 00D75B

translations.english: I don't like the look of this. Perfect spot for an ambush. Ten to one they're just waiting for us on the other side.
translations.chinese: 我不喜欢这里。伏击的绝佳地点。他们十有八九在对面等着我们呢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016958]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I don't like the look of this. Perfect spot for an ambush. Ten to one they're just waiting for us on the other side. | ZH: 我不喜欢这里。伏击的绝佳地点。他们十有八九在对面等着我们呢。 | SID: 00E57C

translations.english: Unslaad Krosis!
translations.chinese: 安斯拉德 科洛西斯！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001695D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Unslaad Krosis! | ZH: 安斯拉德 科洛西斯！ | SID: 00D7A2

translations.english: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001695E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha! | ZH: 哈哈哈哈哈哈！ | SID: 00C5E1

translations.english: You did? Maybe that's why I'm so sleepy now.
translations.chinese: 是吗？可能这就是我发困的原因吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016AD2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You did? Maybe that's why I'm so sleepy now. | ZH: 是吗？可能这就是我发困的原因吧。 | SID: 002D0D

translations.english: By the Eight, I didn't think you could do it!
translations.chinese: 八圣灵在上，我就知道你能行！

translations.english: Take this as a token of our gratitude.
Now maybe we can put all this behind us.
translations.chinese: 现在我们终于可以松口气了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016AD3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: By the Eight, I didn't think you could do it! | ZH: 八圣灵在上，我就知道你能行！ | SID: 007694
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Take this as a token of our gratitude. | ZH: 收下谢礼吧。 | SID: 0085C9
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Now maybe we can put all this behind us. | ZH: 现在我们终于可以松口气了。 | SID: 00F62E

translations.english: I'll gather together some able-bodied warriors to clean out Movarth's lair. They'll be waiting outside for you to lead them.
translations.chinese: 我会去召集一些精壮的战士去清理莫瓦斯的巢穴。他们会在外面等你，就由你来带领他们。

translations.english: Unfortunately Morthal is still in danger. The journal mentions Movarth, a powerful master vampire that I had assumed was destroyed.
translations.chinese: 莫萨尔如今很不幸地还处在危险之中。日记里提到了一个强大的吸血鬼之主，莫瓦斯，我还以为他早就被消灭了呢。

translations.english: By Ysgramor's axe! It's true. Morthal owes you a debt.
translations.chinese: 伊斯格拉默的斧子！这是真的。莫萨尔欠你个人情。

translations.english: Here is your reward for solving the murder, but I have another request.
translations.chinese: 这是你破案应得的奖赏，但我还想请你帮个忙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016AD4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: I'll gather together some able-bodied warriors to clean out Movarth's lair. They'll be waiting outside for you to lead them. | ZH: 我会去召集一些精壮的战士去清理莫瓦斯的巢穴。他们会在外面等你，就由你来带领他们。 | SID: 00128C
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Unfortunately Morthal is still in danger. The journal mentions Movarth, a powerful master vampire that I had assumed was destroyed. | ZH: 莫萨尔如今很不幸地还处在危险之中。日记里提到了一个强大的吸血鬼之主，莫瓦斯，我还以为他早就被消灭了呢。 | SID: 0047B9
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: By Ysgramor's axe! It's true. Morthal owes you a debt. | ZH: 伊斯格拉默的斧子！这是真的。莫萨尔欠你个人情。 | SID: 00714A
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Here is your reward for solving the murder, but I have another request. | ZH: 这是你破案应得的奖赏，但我还想请你帮个忙。 | SID: 00F076

translations.english: So Alva did it to get Hroggar for herself? I should have suspected her.
translations.chinese: 所以阿尔瓦这么做是为了得到赫鲁加？我早该怀疑她的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016AD5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So Alva did it to get Hroggar for herself? I should have suspected her. | ZH: 所以阿尔瓦这么做是为了得到赫鲁加？我早该怀疑她的。 | SID: 0020ED

translations.english: By the gods! I assume you have proof.
translations.chinese: 神啊！你肯定是有证据吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016AD6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: By the gods! I assume you have proof. | ZH: 神啊！你肯定是有证据吧。 | SID: 0005A5

translations.english: When Aventus escaped, Grelod got meaner than ever. I really thought she was going to kill one of us. Guess not!
translations.chinese: 阿文图斯逃走后，桂罗变得更坏了。我真以为她会杀了我们谁的。猜不出来！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016CA1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: When Aventus escaped, Grelod got meaner than ever. I really thought she was going to kill one of us. Guess not! | ZH: 阿文图斯逃走后，桂罗变得更坏了。我真以为她会杀了我们谁的。猜不出来！ | SID: 00936C

translations.english: I do hope mummy and father come to get me soon. Ever since that Aventus boy left, this place has gone mad.
translations.chinese: 我真希望爸爸妈妈快点来接我。自从阿文图斯那小子离开以后，这地方就疯了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016CA2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I do hope mummy and father come to get me soon. Ever since that Aventus boy left, this place has gone mad. | ZH: 我真希望爸爸妈妈快点来接我。自从阿文图斯那小子离开以后，这地方就疯了。 | SID: 001774

translations.english: When Aventus escaped, Grelod was so mad. I got double the beatings that day. But that won't happen ever again.
translations.chinese: 阿文图斯逃跑的时候，桂罗气疯了。我那天挨了两倍的打，但这再也不会发生了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016CA3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: When Aventus escaped, Grelod was so mad. I got double the beatings that day. But that won't happen ever again. | ZH: 阿文图斯逃跑的时候，桂罗气疯了。我那天挨了两倍的打，但这再也不会发生了。 | SID: 006A49

translations.english: When Aventus took off, when he said those things, about killing Grelod... I never imagined he was serious...
translations.chinese: 阿文图斯离开时说的那些要杀死桂罗的话……我没想过他是认真的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016CA4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: When Aventus took off, when he said those things, about killing Grelod... I never imagined he was serious... | ZH: 阿文图斯离开时说的那些要杀死桂罗的话……我没想过他是认真的。 | SID: 00D7E3

translations.english: Word out on the street is that he went home to Windhelm, and people have heard strange chanting coming from his house. Looks like he really did it!
translations.chinese: 街上有消息说，他回到了风舵城的家里，人们听到他家里传出奇怪的诵经声。他真的做到了！

translations.english: Aventus Aretino. He was sent to live here after his mother died. He escaped. And...
translations.chinese: 阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺。他母亲死了以后被送到这里。他逃走了。而且……

translations.english: Before he left, he said he was going to do the Black Sacrament. You know, to call the Dark Brotherhood. So they'd come and kill old Grelod!
translations.chinese: 他离开前，说他会执行黑色圣礼。就是召唤黑暗兄弟会。所以他们会来杀掉老桂罗！

translations.english: Who is Aventus?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016CA5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Word out on the street is that he went home to Windhelm, and people have heard strange chanting coming from his house. Looks like he really did it! | ZH: 街上有消息说，他回到了风舵城的家里，人们听到他家里传出奇怪的诵经声。他真的做到了！ | SID: 005B17
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Aventus Aretino. He was sent to live here after his mother died. He escaped. And... | ZH: 阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺。他母亲死了以后被送到这里。他逃走了。而且…… | SID: 00A07A
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Before he left, he said he was going to do the Black Sacrament. You know, to call the Dark Brotherhood. So they'd come and kill old Grelod! | ZH: 他离开前，说他会执行黑色圣礼。就是召唤黑暗兄弟会。所以他们会来杀掉老桂罗！ | SID: 00A347
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Who is Aventus? | ZH: 阿文图斯是谁？ | SID: 0053F4

translations.english: A little boy who lived here. Aventus Aretino. He was nice, but really quiet, and sad, because his mother just died.
translations.chinese: 一个住在这里的小男孩。阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺。他人很好，但太安静了，而且很伤心，因为他母亲刚去世。

translations.english: He ran away. Back home to Windhelm. Samuel told me he was trying to get some murderer people to come here and kill Grelod. Did he really do it?
translations.chinese: 他逃走了。回了风舵城的家里。萨穆埃尔告诉我他正在试着找杀手来杀桂罗。他真的成功了吗？

translations.english: Who is Aventus?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016CA6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: A little boy who lived here. Aventus Aretino. He was nice, but really quiet, and sad, because his mother just died. | ZH: 一个住在这里的小男孩。阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺。他人很好，但太安静了，而且很伤心，因为他母亲刚去世。 | SID: 00B02E

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Who is Aventus? | ZH: 阿文图斯是谁？ | SID: 00A343

translations.english: Oh, Aventus Aretino. He was sent here when his mother died, but he ran away.
translations.chinese: 哦，阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺。他母亲死了以后被送到这里，但他逃走了。

translations.english: I heard he went back to his house in Windhelm, to try and get the Dark Brotherhood to come and murder Grelod. And... he actually pulled it off!
translations.chinese: 我听说他回了他在风舵城的家，想让黑暗兄弟会来杀桂罗。而且……他真的成功了！

translations.english: Who is Aventus?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016CA7]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Who is Aventus? | ZH: 阿文图斯是谁？ | SID: 00D7C2

translations.english: Aventus Aretino? He only lived here for awhile. I think his mother got sick and died or something. Anyway, he's gone now. He ran away.
translations.chinese: 阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺？他只在这里住过一阵。他妈妈好像是病死了。不管怎么样，他已经离开了。逃跑了。

translations.english: But Samuel told me he's back home in Windhelm, and did some kind of dark ritual. He summoned killers to murder old Grelod. He's saved us all.
translations.chinese: 萨穆埃尔告诉我他回了在风舵城的家，正在举行什么黑暗仪式。他让杀手来杀掉老桂罗。他救了我们大家。

translations.english: Who is Aventus?

translations.english: Here for work? Get an axe and bring me all the wood you can chop.
translations.chinese: 在找工作？拿把斧子，把你能劈的柴都拿来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016CF8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Here for work? Get an axe and bring me all the wood you can chop. | ZH: 在找工作？拿把斧子，把你能劈的柴都拿来。 | SID: 007AD7

translations.english: You're probably right. I was hoping to avoid having to involve them in this, but it seems we have no choice.
translations.chinese: 也许你说得对。我本不想把他们卷进来，但看来咱们也没得选。

translations.english: Shor's bones! Here it is! Alduin's Wall... so well preserved... I've never seen a finer example of early second era Akaviri sculptural relief...
translations.chinese: 舒尔的骨头啊！在这里！奥杜因之墙……保存的真是完好……我还从没见过保存这么好的第二纪元早期阿卡维尔浮雕。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016F8A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Shor's bones! Here it is! Alduin's Wall... so well preserved... I've never seen a finer example of early second era Akaviri sculptural relief... | ZH: 舒尔的骨头啊！在这里！奥杜因之墙……保存的真是完好……我还从没见过保存这么好的第二纪元早期阿卡维尔浮雕。 | SID: 00AF5A

translations.english: Alduin's defeat is the centerpiece of the Wall.
translations.chinese: 这面墙中心位置刻画的是奥杜因战败的故事。

translations.english: You see, here he is falling from the sky. The Nord Tongues -- masters of the Voice -- are arrayed against him.
translations.chinese: 你看，他从空中坠落。诺德发声者，吼声大师们正在列阵与他对战。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016F8B]
Translations:

translations.english: I was afraid you were going to say that.
I guess there's nothing for it. We'll have to ask the Greybeards for help.
translations.chinese: 我想也没什么好说的。我们得向灰胡子求助。

translations.english: I hoped to avoid involving them in this, but we have no other choice.
translations.chinese: 我本不想把他们卷进来，但看来咱们也没得选。

translations.english: Yes, yes. Let's see what we have...

Translations:

translations.english: Here, the humans rebel against their dragon overlords -- the legendary Dragon War.
translations.chinese: 看这里，人类反抗着他们的龙族统治者，这就是传说中的巨龙战争。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016F8F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Here, the humans rebel against their dragon overlords -- the legendary Dragon War. | ZH: 看这里，人类反抗着他们的龙族统治者，这就是传说中的巨龙战争。 | SID: 002CB3

translations.english: So we're looking for a Shout, then. Damn it.
translations.chinese: 我们找了半天就是找个龙吼，该死。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016F90]
Translations:

translations.english: Are you paying attention, Delphine? You might learn something of our own history.
translations.chinese: 戴尔芬，你在听么？你也该学学咱们的历史了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00016F91]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Are you paying attention, Delphine? You might learn something of our own history. | ZH: 戴尔芬，你在听么？你也该学学咱们的历史了。 | SID: 002FD7

translations.english: But... there's no way to know what Shout is meant.
translations.chinese: 但……没法知道这个龙吼的具体意思。

translations.english: Yes, yes. This here, coming from the mouths of the Nord heroes -- this is the Akaviri symbol for "Shout."
translations.chinese: 对，对。就是这个。看这些诺德英雄呼出来的符号，在阿卡维尔表示“龙吼”。

translations.english: Well... maybe not. Dragons haven't been seen in Skyrim for an age or more.
translations.chinese: 啊……也可能不知道。龙已经很久没在天际出现过了。

translations.english: But wherever that dragon came from, and whatever it wants, Ulfric will get to the bottom of it. You can count on that.
translations.chinese: 但无论这头龙从哪来，想干什么。乌弗瑞克都会弄清楚的。这一点你可以放心。

translations.english: But you can bet he'll be trying to figure it out. This could shift the whole balance of the war.
translations.chinese: 但你肯定会想办法弄清楚的。这可能会影响整个战争的平衡。

translations.english: If you want to help stop that dragon, your best bet is to go to Solitude and join up with the Legion.
translations.chinese: 如果你想帮忙阻止那头龙，你最好去独孤城加入军团。

translations.chinese: 但这是个误会。你不该和那些风暴斗篷一起被抓上车。

translations.english: And the Imperial Legion needs your help, especially now, with that dragon out there somewhere, and Ulfric back on the loose.
translations.chinese: 但现在，帝国军团需要你的帮助。巨龙还潜伏在某处，乌弗瑞克也逃了。

translations.english: It's an old Nord Tradition, a test to prove your worth in the eyes of Kyne. Show that you're a hunter and no simple butcher.

translations.english: Kyne teaches us to respect the beasts and blesses the hunter who will face their champions. True Nord hunters are those who survive the Trials.
translations.chinese: 凯娜教导我们要尊重野兽并祝福那些即将面对野兽的猎人。真正的诺德猎人都是在考验中幸存下来的人。

translations.english: Those sycophants in the Temple would call her Kynareth. Just a pale shadow of the truth, like all the Temple Divines.
translations.chinese: 神庙里那些马屁精管她叫凯娜瑞丝。那东西和所有神庙里的圣灵一样，只是真实下的苍白阴影。

translations.english: What you fail to realize is your actions were expected and represent nothing more than the fulfillment of your agreement.
translations.chinese: 但你没有意识到，你的行为是注定的，不过是在履行自己定下的协议。

translations.english: Now that Ebonmere has been restored, you stand before me awaiting your accolades; a pat on your head... a kiss on your cheek.
translations.chinese: 现在黑檀池已经恢复了，你站在我面前等待赞美，拍拍你的头……或者给你脸颊留个吻。

translations.english: Elder Scrolls. Indeed.

translations.chinese: 帝国。他们带着它们潜逃了。至少他们是这么认为的。他们看到了那些，就以为自己看到了那些。

translations.english: But I cannot go to it, not poor Septimus, for I... I have arisen beyond its grasp.
translations.chinese: 但我不能去，不该由可怜的赛普蒂莫斯去，因为我……我已经超越了它的掌控。

Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Elder Scrolls. Indeed. | ZH: 上古卷轴。我知道。 | SID: 00164C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: The Empire. They absconded with them. Or so they think. The ones they saw. The ones they thought they saw. | ZH: 帝国。他们带着它们潜逃了。至少他们是这么认为的。他们看到了那些，就以为自己看到了那些。 | SID: 0034D1

translations.english: I can almost... hear them. I feel their life energy. Come, I will make the mixture.
translations.chinese: 我几乎能……听到它们的搏动。我感受到了它们的生命能量。来，交给我混合。

translations.english: I hope the Caller turns you inside out!
translations.chinese: 但愿召唤者把你弄个底朝天。

translations.english: I was only trying to help you, you know!

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

agentText:

EDID: [0001A4DD]

EDID: [0001A4DE]

translations.english: That remains to be seen.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001A4DF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That remains to be seen. | ZH: 这可说不好啊。 | SID: 00B49A

translations.english: So you can tell that heartless Daedra bitch I'm done doing her dirty work.
translations.chinese: 所以，去告诉那个无情的迪德拉贱人，我不会再给她干那些龌龊的营生了。

translations.english: Boethiah talks about leaving your mark, a sign of your passing.... Well, you can make a mark on the world without treachery and murder.
translations.chinese: 波耶西亚说：人要留下来过的痕迹……但不用背叛与谋杀也能在世上留下印记。

translations.english: Mind my words or I'll mind them for you: I'm slave to no man, no god, and no Daedra.
translations.chinese: 记住我的话，或者我会替你记着：我不是任何人、神或者迪德拉的奴隶。

translations.english: Whenever a man's life is saved by armor made with these hands, these hands have changed that man's destiny and his family's.
translations.chinese: 每当这双手制作的盔甲救了一个人的性命。就是改变了他们一家的命运。

translations.english: If you desire to fight me, then let's get this over with.
translations.chinese: 如果你想和我一战，那就来吧。

translations.english: A man who feels no fear has no heart. I know fear. But it does not control me.
translations.chinese: 无畏者无心。我能感知恐惧，但不会被恐惧支配。

translations.english: The Prince of Plots usually gets what she wants. I'm surprised I'm not dead already. She must have had some reason to keep me alive so long.
translations.chinese: 阴谋君王总能得到自己想要的。我也惊讶自己为什么还没死。她肯定是有什么理由才让我活了这么久。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001A4E3]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That was a long time ago. | ZH: 很久以前的事。 | SID: 00A135

translations.english: I told you. I'm done with all that. There's enough blood on these hands. I'm interested in creating things now.
translations.chinese: 我告诉你。我受够了。这双手沾满鲜血。现在我更希望去创造些什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001A4E4]

translations.english: If you can learn to be subtle in rendering death, perhaps I will share more of my power with you.
translations.chinese: 你如果能学会更巧妙地处理杀人手法，或许我可以多分给你一些力量。

translations.english: But my purpose was ultimately gained. My previous champion was erased, and a new one born.
translations.chinese: 不过我的目的还是实现了。前任勇士被抹杀，新的勇士诞生。

translations.english: I desired stealth and secrecy, but you executed the task with as much subtlety as a enrage mammoth.
translations.chinese: 我本期望隐秘行事，但你像头愤怒的猛犸一样巧妙地完成了任务。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But my purpose was ultimately gained. My previous champion was erased, and a new one born. | ZH: 不过我的目的还是实现了。前任勇士被抹杀，新的勇士诞生。 | SID: 002A01

translations.english: You have done well, my Champion. You have earned my respect, a feat few manage and live to tell about.
translations.chinese: 做得好，我的勇士。你赢得了我的尊重，很少人能做到并活着讲述这一壮举。

translations.english: I shall write your name upon the Tablet of Absolute Darkness.
translations.chinese: 我会把你的名字铭刻在“绝暗石板”上。

translations.english: So sad what happened to young Elisif. Tragic really. Such a young and pretty girl.
translations.chinese: 艾利西弗年轻早逝实属不幸。真是悲哀，这么漂亮的年轻姑娘。

translations.english: But we should be done with murders in the Blue Palace. I've stepped up security around here.
translations.chinese: 但我们是时候结束蓝宫谋杀案了。我已经加强了这里的安保。

translations.english: Was in over her head, I'm afraid.
Ahhh. Quite fine my friend. Quite fine.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001A4E7]

- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: But we should be done with murders in the Blue Palace. I've stepped up security around here. | ZH: 但我们是时候结束蓝宫谋杀案了。我已经加强了这里的安保。 | SID: 005378
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Was in over her head, I'm afraid. | ZH: 恐怕她无法理解。 | SID: 00913E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Ahhh. Quite fine my friend. Quite fine. | ZH: 啊。很好，朋友。非常好。 | SID: 00CC00

translations.english: Hmm... Yes, I've heard about all that fuss. I myself know it's all a terrible, terrible misunderstanding. I'm quite sure you're innocent in all this.
translations.chinese: 嗯……我是听说了那些大惊小怪的事。我也知道这是个可怕的误会。你肯定是无辜的。

translations.english: But going forward, I'm sure you realize that your fate is in your own hands. And the law can not be bent for personal friendships.
translations.chinese: 但还得向前看。我相信你知道命运在自己手里，法律可不能为私人友谊让路。

translations.english: This one time only, I'll grant you special immunity for any past transgressions, real or perceived.
translations.chinese: 只此一次。我特别豁免你过去的违法行为，不管是真的还是被察觉的。

translations.chinese: 如果你想抓住那些小偷，就去镇子东北方向的荒瀑古坟吧。

translations.english: But I know about him. And about the war. More than he might think.
translations.chinese: 但我了解他。也了解这场战争。懂得比他想象的还要多。

translations.english: My father doesn't know anything about me.
So the disgusting pig sent you to bother me? One day, I'll tear his face apart so he can leave me alone.
translations.chinese: 那个臭猪让你来烦我？总有一天，我会把他的脸扯碎，看他还能不能烦我。

translations.english: Yes, my youngest son. He's a dark child. I don't know what to do with him.
translations.chinese: 对，我的小儿子。这孩子有些阴暗。我不知道该拿他怎么办。

translations.english: He won't say a word to me, but I don't know how I upset him.
translations.chinese: 他什么都不肯和我说，我也不知道他为什么生气。

translations.english: He was always a quiet lad, but lately... something has changed. He's become brooding. Violent.
translations.chinese: 他以前很安静。但最近……变了。变得阴森、暴力。

translations.english: If you could speak to him. Draw out the truth. I would be immensely grateful.
translations.chinese: 如果你能和他谈谈，让他说出真相。那就不胜感激了。

translations.chinese: 你们好啊，女士们！天气这么好，高大强壮的男人能为你们做些什么吗？

translations.chinese: 在这儿等着。我去给你拿报酬来。

translations.chinese: 我的营地就在附近的尼尔海姆废墟。把我护送回去，你就能拿到报酬。

translations.english: Sadly, yes. Even the townsfolk have taken to calling her "Grelod the Kind." Her very existence has become something of a running joke.
translations.chinese: 不幸的是，没错。连城里的人都叫她“慈祥的桂罗”，她的存在已经成了一个笑话了。

translations.english: Grelod runs this orphanage because she's old, and set in her ways, and doesn't know any other life. These children need love, and comfort. I try...
translations.chinese: 桂罗经营孤儿院是因为她老了，而且习惯了自己的方式，不懂其他生活。这些孩子需要爱和安慰。我在尝试……

translations.english: But... I'm sorry, you should go. The children aren't up for adoption, and it's cruel to get their hopes up. Besides, Grelod hates... visitors.
translations.chinese: 但是……对不起，你该走了。孩子们不适合被收养，让他们抱太大希望太残忍了。而且，桂罗讨厌……游客。

translations.english: Is Grelod always like that?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001B9AA]
Translations:

translations.chinese: 等狗子回来，我就恢复了全部力量。整个世界都等着我呢！

translations.english: Hrmph. You're no fun at all. Guess I'll have to make my own fun elsewhere.
translations.chinese: 哎。你可真没劲。看来我得去别处找乐子了。

translations.english: And I'm sure Barbas doesn't want me to have that axe. He'd want it this way.
translations.chinese: 而且我敢肯定巴巴斯不想让我拿回斧子。他肯定这么想。

translations.english: The choice is yours, friend. We're all counting on you to make the right decision. Put him out of our misery!
translations.chinese: 选择权在你，朋友。我们都在等着你作出正确的决定。把他从我们的痛苦中解救出来！

translations.english: And I could absorb the spirit of poor, dead Barbas. He'd still be reunited with me.
translations.chinese: 这样我就能吸收死掉的巴巴斯的可怜精魂。他一样可以和我团聚。

EDID: [0001C4D7]

translations.english: You have business with Clavicus Vile?
translations.chinese: 你找卡拉威库斯·维尔何事？

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C4D8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You have business with Clavicus Vile? | ZH: 你找卡拉威库斯·维尔何事？ | SID: 001ADF

translations.english: Yes, I think you'll be just what I need.
translations.chinese: 没错，我想我需要的就是你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C4D9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, I think you'll be just what I need. | ZH: 没错，我想我需要的就是你。 | SID: 005D80

translations.english: They were suffering so from vampirism, and begged me for a cure. Then you came and ended their misery! I couldn't have planned it better myself.
translations.chinese: 他们被吸血鬼病折磨得厉害，想找我要解药。然后你就来结束了他们的痛苦！我都想不出这么好的点子。

translations.english: So, what's your heart's desire? What kind of deal can we strike?
translations.chinese: 所以，你的愿望是什么？我们能达成什么交易？

translations.english: By all means, let's hear it. It's the least I could do, since you already helped me grant one final wish for my last worshippers...
translations.chinese: 无论如何，说来听听吧。毕竟你也替我的信徒完成了最后的愿望……

translations.english: Lord Vile, I have a request of you.

translations.english: I know there's a cult that worships him at Haemar's Shame. We should be able to talk to him there.
translations.chinese: 我知道有人在海玛之羞拜他。我们可以去那儿找他谈谈。

translations.english: Thank you. Now, since he banished me, Vile's been rather weak. He can't manifest very far from one of his shrines.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。自从维尔把我赶出来，他的力量也变弱了。他不能离开自己的祭坛太远。

translations.english: If this works out, I'll make sure you're rewarded. Just don't trust any offer he makes you... okay?
translations.chinese: 如果成功了，我会奖励你的。不过不要相信他的任何提议……好吧？

translations.english: Very funny. My master is Clavicus Vile, Daedric prince of wishes. As you can imagine, he's quite the important person.
translations.chinese: 有意思吧。我主人是迪德拉中的愿望君王，卡拉威库斯·维尔。你肯定知道他是个大人物。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C4DC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Very funny. My master is Clavicus Vile, Daedric prince of wishes. As you can imagine, he's quite the important person. | ZH: 有意思吧。我主人是迪德拉中的愿望君王，卡拉威库斯·维尔。你肯定知道他是个大人物。 | SID: 002CFD

translations.english: Really? Power? You're a dragonborn; you already have more power than most people who aren't immense, fire-breathing monsters.
translations.chinese: 真的？力量？你是龙裔啊。你已经比大多数人都强了，又不是人人是会喷火的怪物。

agentText:

EDID: [0001C4DE]

Stop following me.

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Excellent work. A hero and his faithful companion, retrieving the ancient artifact for the prince. It's almost... storybook.
translations.chinese: 干得漂亮。英雄与忠诚的伙伴为君王找回了古老的神器。和故事书一模一样。

translations.english: Ah, but it almost seems a shame to give a weapon like that away, doesn't it? I suppose I could be persuaded to let you keep it...
translations.chinese: 啊，不过把这样的武器拱手让人很可惜吧？我想你应该留着它……

translations.english: But only if you use the axe to kill Barbas. Simple as that.
translations.chinese: 但前提是你用斧杀掉巴巴斯。就这么简单。

translations.english: We're back. Now fulfill your end of the bargain.
translations.chinese: 我们回来了。现在，履行你的约定。

Addon: Skyrim

I've been thinking it over...

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C4E2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And? | ZH: 所以？ | SID: 007F88
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I've been thinking it over... | ZH: 我一直在考虑…… | SID: 001702

translations.english: Enjoy that axe! And don't worry about poor old Barbas. After all, he really should have picked a better friend...
translations.chinese: 好好用那把斧头吧！可怜的老巴巴斯。毕竟，他真该选个更好的朋友……

translations.english: Oh, sure, he'll be back in a century or two, but think of the fun I can have 'til then.
translations.chinese: 哦，当然，他一两百年也就回来了，但在此之前我得好好享受。

translations.english: Absolutely! Now I can reabsorb his body, and return to full power. All without having to listen to his whining.
translations.chinese: 当然！现在我可以重新把他吸收，恢复全部力量。完全不用听他发牢骚。

translations.english: He's dead. Are we done here?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C4E3]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Oh, sure, he'll be back in a century or two, but think of the fun I can have 'til then. | ZH: 哦，当然，他一两百年也就回来了，但在此之前我得好好享受。 | SID: 00CCDC

- INFO:RNAM | EN: He's dead. Are we done here? | ZH: 他死了。完事了吗？ | SID: 00F7E7

translations.english: That's what I like to hear. I'll get the full report from Legate Rikke. Now then...
translations.chinese: 我就喜欢听这个。我会从瑞姬副官那拿取完整报告。现在……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C5C3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That's what I like to hear. I'll get the full report from Legate Rikke. Now then... | ZH: 我就喜欢听这个。我会从瑞姬副官那拿取完整报告。现在…… | SID: 000A51

translations.english: That's not for you to decide. Soldier.
translations.chinese: 这不是你能决定的。士兵。

translations.english: I wouldn't have sent you in the first place if it wasn't going to be worth it. Now then...
translations.chinese: 如果不值得，那一开始我就不会派你去。现在……

translations.english: Excellent work, soldier. I have to admit, I had my doubts it even existed. Did you run into any trouble?
translations.chinese: 做得好，士兵。我确实怀疑过它的真实性。有遇到麻烦吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C5C6]
Translations:

translations.english: But at least we ended up with the damn crown. Now then...
translations.chinese: 但至少我们拿到了那个破王冠。现在……

translations.english: Yes. Well, I didn't respond as quickly to the Legate's suggestion as perhaps I should have.
translations.chinese: 是的。好吧，我或许应该及时回应副官的建议。

agentText:

translations.english: Mind your own business.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C5CA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Mind your own business. | ZH: 自己管好自己吧。 | SID: 007F76

EDID: [0001C5CF]
Translations:

EDID: [0001C5EA]
Translations:

EDID: [0001C5EB]

EDID: [0001C5EC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Return when you have completed the Great Hunt. | ZH: 等你完成了大狩猎再回来。 | SID: 00A3C4

translations.english: It's said that Hircine will commune with whoever slays it. I tracked it into these woods, but then had my... accident with the child.
translations.chinese: 无论谁猎杀它，海尔辛都会与之交谈。我追踪到了这片树林，结果……就那孩子出了意外。

translations.english: I want to beg his forgiveness. Give him back the ring. But while I'm stuck in here, the beast wanders free.
translations.chinese: 我想恳求他的原谅，将戒指还给他。但我被困在这里，那头野兽还在外面游荡。

translations.english: I've been looking for a way to appease Hircine.
translations.chinese: 我一直想办法安抚海尔辛的怒火。

translations.english: There is a certain beast in these lands. Large, majestic.
translations.chinese: 传说有一种巨大、雄伟的野兽。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C5ED]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: It's said that Hircine will commune with whoever slays it. I tracked it into these woods, but then had my... accident with the child. | ZH: 无论谁猎杀它，海尔辛都会与之交谈。我追踪到了这片树林，结果……就那孩子出了意外。 | SID: 0059BC
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: I want to beg his forgiveness. Give him back the ring. But while I'm stuck in here, the beast wanders free. | ZH: 我想恳求他的原谅，将戒指还给他。但我被困在这里，那头野兽还在外面游荡。 | SID: 007B69
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: I've been looking for a way to appease Hircine. | ZH: 我一直想办法安抚海尔辛的怒火。 | SID: 00B7B7
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: There is a certain beast in these lands. Large, majestic. | ZH: 传说有一种巨大、雄伟的野兽。 | SID: 00F616

translations.english: To harness it is to know. The fundaments. The Dwemer lockbox hides it from me.
translations.chinese: 想要驾驭它就要了解它。很简单的道理。但锻莫的密锁箱把它和我隔绝了。

translations.english: The Elder Scroll gives insight deeper than the deep ones, though. To bring about the opening.
translations.chinese: 上古卷轴提供了比深地之民更深刻的洞察力。能够带来打开它的方法。

translations.english: The ice entombs the heart. The bane of Kagrenac and Dagoth Ur.
translations.chinese: 冰雪埋藏了心脏。这是卡格瑞纳克与达格斯·乌尔的祸根。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C5FC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: To harness it is to know. The fundaments. The Dwemer lockbox hides it from me. | ZH: 想要驾驭它就要了解它。很简单的道理。但锻莫的密锁箱把它和我隔绝了。 | SID: 000852
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: The Elder Scroll gives insight deeper than the deep ones, though. To bring about the opening. | ZH: 上古卷轴提供了比深地之民更深刻的洞察力。能够带来打开它的方法。 | SID: 00A40D
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: The ice entombs the heart. The bane of Kagrenac and Dagoth Ur. | ZH: 冰雪埋藏了心脏。这是卡格瑞纳克与达格斯·乌尔的祸根。 | SID: 00E37A

translations.english: Please, don't just let it stay like this. It's disgraceful.
translations.chinese: 拜托，不要放弃了。太不像话了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C602]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Please, don't just let it stay like this. It's disgraceful. | ZH: 拜托，不要放弃了。太不像话了。 | SID: 005F65

translations.english: It was taken by a lightning strike. Wish I had time to deal with it, but it's hard enough with all these wounded from the war.
translations.chinese: 它被雷击了。我也很想有时间来处理，但是战争中的伤员就够我受的了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C603]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It was taken by a lightning strike. Wish I had time to deal with it, but it's hard enough with all these wounded from the war. | ZH: 它被雷击了。我也很想有时间来处理，但是战争中的伤员就够我受的了。 | SID: 00DF14

translations.english: What is it... what has happened to the Gildergreen? I have traveled long here to worship beneath its branches.
translations.chinese: 这是怎么回事……镀绿树怎么了？我长途跋涉到这里，就是为了在它的枝杈之下膜拜。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C604]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What is it... what has happened to the Gildergreen? I have traveled long here to worship beneath its branches. | ZH: 这是怎么回事……镀绿树怎么了？我长途跋涉到这里，就是为了在它的枝杈之下膜拜。 | SID: 008F06

translations.english: Well, here as in this plane. Mundus. Tamriel. Nearby, relatively speaking.
translations.chinese: 在这个位面，在梦达思。在泰姆瑞尔。相对而言，很近。

translations.english: On the cosmological scale, it's all nearby.
translations.chinese: 从宇宙来衡量，都在附近。

translations.english: Here.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C607]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Well, here as in this plane. Mundus. Tamriel. Nearby, relatively speaking. | ZH: 在这个位面，在梦达思。在泰姆瑞尔。相对而言，很近。 | SID: 007FB1
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: On the cosmological scale, it's all nearby. | ZH: 从宇宙来衡量，都在附近。 | SID: 00CD50
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Here. | ZH: 在这儿。 | SID: 00F016

translations.english: Dig, Dwemer, in the beyond. I'll know your lost unknown and rise to your depths.
translations.chinese: 挖啊，挖到深处啊。锻莫，我将知道你失落的未知，达到你们的深度。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C662]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Dig, Dwemer, in the beyond. I'll know your lost unknown and rise to your depths. | ZH: 挖啊，挖到深处啊。锻莫，我将知道你失落的未知，达到你们的深度。 | SID: 007CF2

translations.english: So don't get your hopes up. It's mostly lies, leavened with rumor and conjecture.
translations.chinese: 所以不要抱太大希望。大部分都是些夹杂着谣传和猜测的谎言。

translations.english: I'll bring you everything we have on them, but it's not much.
translations.chinese: 我会把所有有关它们的资料都给你，不过不太多。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C677]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: So don't get your hopes up. It's mostly lies, leavened with rumor and conjecture. | ZH: 所以不要抱太大希望。大部分都是些夹杂着谣传和猜测的谎言。 | SID: 006160
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I'll bring you everything we have on them, but it's not much. | ZH: 我会把所有有关它们的资料都给你，不过不太多。 | SID: 0081B2

translations.english: The Dwemer were the last to touch it. It was thought to have been destroyed by the Nerevarine, but my lord told me otherwise.
translations.chinese: 锻莫是最后接触它的。大家以为它已经被尼瑞瓦因摧毁了。但我的主人说不是那样。

translations.english: The box contains the heart. The essence of a god.
translations.chinese: 这个盒子里装着心脏。一位神的精华。

translations.english: I have devoted my life to the Elder Scrolls, but their knowledge is a passing awareness when compared to the encompassing mind of divinity.
translations.chinese: 我毕生都在研究上古卷轴。但是它们的知识比起神明包罗万象的思想就像转瞬即逝的灵感。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C682]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: The Dwemer were the last to touch it. It was thought to have been destroyed by the Nerevarine, but my lord told me otherwise. | ZH: 锻莫是最后接触它的。大家以为它已经被尼瑞瓦因摧毁了。但我的主人说不是那样。 | SID: 000D8D
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: The box contains the heart. The essence of a god. | ZH: 这个盒子里装着心脏。一位神的精华。 | SID: 00E1D1
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I have devoted my life to the Elder Scrolls, but their knowledge is a passing awareness when compared to the encompassing mind of divinity. | ZH: 我毕生都在研究上古卷轴。但是它们的知识比起神明包罗万象的思想就像转瞬即逝的灵感。 | SID: 00F414

translations.english: Alftand. The point of puncture, of first entry, of the tapping.
translations.chinese: 艾尔夫坦德。刺入之地、首入之地、叩击之地。

translations.english: Under deep. Below the dark. The hidden keep. Tower Mzark.
translations.chinese: 在地下深处。黑暗之中，隐藏的堡垒。姆扎克塔。

translations.english: Delve to its limits, and Blackreach lies just beyond.
translations.chinese: 进入它的深处，黑境就在下面。

translations.english: But not all can enter there. Only Septimus knows the hidden key to loose the lock to jump beneath the deathly rock.
translations.chinese: 但不是所有人都能进去。只有赛普蒂莫斯知道打开那致命岩石的隐藏钥匙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001C6AD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Alftand. The point of puncture, of first entry, of the tapping. | ZH: 艾尔夫坦德。刺入之地、首入之地、叩击之地。 | SID: 001B2B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Under deep. Below the dark. The hidden keep. Tower Mzark. | ZH: 在地下深处。黑暗之中，隐藏的堡垒。姆扎克塔。 | SID: 00CAB5
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Delve to its limits, and Blackreach lies just beyond. | ZH: 进入它的深处，黑境就在下面。 | SID: 00E2F5
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: But not all can enter there. Only Septimus knows the hidden key to loose the lock to jump beneath the deathly rock. | ZH: 但不是所有人都能进去。只有赛普蒂莫斯知道打开那致命岩石的隐藏钥匙。 | SID: 00FBCA

translations.english: You're here! I was beginning to think you might not make it.
translations.chinese: 嘿！我还以为你撑不住了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001CB2A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're here! I was beginning to think you might not make it. | ZH: 嘿！我还以为你撑不住了。 | SID: 00745D

translations.english: But... I can't run the Temple without the support of people who are inspired by the Gildergreen. How can this little tree bring new worshippers?
translations.chinese: 但是……如果没有那些受镀绿树鼓舞的人，我又如何打理神殿呢？这株小树能带来新的信徒吗？

translations.english: I've got a sapling.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001CB7B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: But... I can't run the Temple without the support of people who are inspired by the Gildergreen. How can this little tree bring new worshippers? | ZH: 但是……如果没有那些受镀绿树鼓舞的人，我又如何打理神殿呢？这株小树能带来新的信徒吗？ | SID: 008BEB
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I've got a sapling. | ZH: 我拿到了一棵树苗。 | SID: 001912

translations.english: I'm sure that, in time, this little sapling will grow into a new Gildergreen that will tower over Whiterun. Thank you.
translations.chinese: 我相信，假以时日，这株树苗一定会长成新的镀绿树屹立在白漫城之上。谢谢你！

translations.english: I... you're right of course. It can be hard to hear the winds of Kynareth when all you hear are the rabble in the temple.
translations.chinese: 我……你说得对。当你满耳都是神殿里这群俗子嘈杂，也就很难听到凯娜瑞丝之风了。

translations.english: Death feeds new life.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001CD16]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I'm sure that, in time, this little sapling will grow into a new Gildergreen that will tower over Whiterun. Thank you. | ZH: 我相信，假以时日，这株树苗一定会长成新的镀绿树屹立在白漫城之上。谢谢你！ | SID: 0069FF
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I... you're right of course. It can be hard to hear the winds of Kynareth when all you hear are the rabble in the temple. | ZH: 我……你说得对。当你满耳都是神殿里这群俗子嘈杂，也就很难听到凯娜瑞丝之风了。 | SID: 008986
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Death feeds new life. | ZH: 死亡孕育新生。 | SID: 00AC28

translations.english: Don't worry. I'll make sure he sees the light. I trusted you, now you trust me.
translations.chinese: 别担心。我会说服他的。我相信你，现在你得相信我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001CDA9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't worry. I'll make sure he sees the light. I trusted you, now you trust me. | ZH: 别担心。我会说服他的。我相信你，现在你得相信我。 | SID: 00AD4C

translations.english: Of course, because of our separation, Vile is now much weaker. I guess he figured it was a small price to pay for not having to listen to me anymore.
translations.chinese: 当然，因为我们分离开，维尔的力量也弱多了。我猜他会觉得为了耳根子清净这点代价不算啥。

translations.english: Well... I guess you could say I got on his nerves. I tend to be the voice of reason and he finds that... irksome.
translations.chinese: 嗯……我觉得算是把他惹火了吧。我喜欢讲道理，但他觉得那……很讨厌。

translations.english: He couldn't just kill me, you see. We're technically part of each other. But he was able to banish me from his domain.
translations.chinese: 他不能杀了我。严格意义上我们都是彼此的一部分。但他还是把我赶出了他的领地。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001CDAA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Of course, because of our separation, Vile is now much weaker. I guess he figured it was a small price to pay for not having to listen to me anymore. | ZH: 当然，因为我们分离开，维尔的力量也弱多了。我猜他会觉得为了耳根子清净这点代价不算啥。 | SID: 004CE3
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Well... I guess you could say I got on his nerves. I tend to be the voice of reason and he finds that... irksome. | ZH: 嗯……我觉得算是把他惹火了吧。我喜欢讲道理，但他觉得那……很讨厌。 | SID: 00C41D
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He couldn't just kill me, you see. We're technically part of each other. But he was able to banish me from his domain. | ZH: 他不能杀了我。严格意义上我们都是彼此的一部分。但他还是把我赶出了他的领地。 | SID: 00E14E

translations.english: As I recall, it's resting in Rimerock Burrow. Barbas can lead you right to it. The little mutt might even earn his place back at my side.
translations.chinese: 我记得它在雾凇岩地洞。巴巴斯会带你去。这条小串儿狗说不定还能回到我身边呢。

translations.english: If you bring it to me, I'll grant you my boon. No strings attached. No messy surprises. At least, not for you.
translations.chinese: 如果你把它带回来。我就赠予你恩惠。没有附加条件。没有恶意惊喜。至少对你来说没有。

translations.english: There's an axe. An incredibly powerful axe. An axe powerful enough for me to have quite a bit of fun, indeed.
translations.chinese: 一把斧头，一把威力无比的斧头，一把能让我找到无数乐子的斧头。

translations.english: What's your offer?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001CDAB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: As I recall, it's resting in Rimerock Burrow. Barbas can lead you right to it. The little mutt might even earn his place back at my side. | ZH: 我记得它在雾凇岩地洞。巴巴斯会带你去。这条小串儿狗说不定还能回到我身边呢。 | SID: 00ACC7
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: If you bring it to me, I'll grant you my boon. No strings attached. No messy surprises. At least, not for you. | ZH: 如果你把它带回来。我就赠予你恩惠。没有附加条件。没有恶意惊喜。至少对你来说没有。 | SID: 00CBE7
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: There's an axe. An incredibly powerful axe. An axe powerful enough for me to have quite a bit of fun, indeed. | ZH: 一把斧头，一把威力无比的斧头，一把能让我找到无数乐子的斧头。 | SID: 00EE07
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What's your offer? | ZH: 你有什么提议？ | SID: 00F83A

translations.english: As much as I hate to say it, you're almost as powerful as I am right now. But that's just because half of my power resides in that mutt, Barbas.
translations.chinese: 虽然我不想这么说，但你和现在的我几乎一样强了。不过那是因为我一半的力量都在那个串儿狗巴巴斯身上。

translations.english: Come to think of it, I know of a win-win situation for both of us.
translations.chinese: 我想起来，有一个共赢的方案。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001CDAC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: As much as I hate to say it, you're almost as powerful as I am right now. But that's just because half of my power resides in that mutt, Barbas. | ZH: 虽然我不想这么说，但你和现在的我几乎一样强了。不过那是因为我一半的力量都在那个串儿狗巴巴斯身上。 | SID: 0005B2
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Come to think of it, I know of a win-win situation for both of us. | ZH: 我想起来，有一个共赢的方案。 | SID: 00BB14

translations.english: I knew I could trust you!

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001CDAE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I knew I could trust you! | ZH: 我就知道你靠得住！ | SID: 0026D7

translations.english: Well... perhaps there is a way he could earn his place back at my side. Maybe. But no promises.
translations.chinese: 嗯……也许有办法让他重回我身边。只是也许，我可打包票。

translations.english: Ugh. That insufferable pup? Forget it. Request denied. No deal.
translations.chinese: 啊。那个讨厌的狗子？算了吧。请求否决。没商量。

translations.english: I'm glad to be rid of him. Even if it does mean I'm stuck in this pitiful shrine, in the back end of... nowhere.
translations.chinese: 我很高兴能摆脱他。虽然我被困在这个……无聊的神殿里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001CDB0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Well... perhaps there is a way he could earn his place back at my side. Maybe. But no promises. | ZH: 嗯……也许有办法让他重回我身边。只是也许，我可打包票。 | SID: 00B9BB
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Ugh. That insufferable pup? Forget it. Request denied. No deal. | ZH: 啊。那个讨厌的狗子？算了吧。请求否决。没商量。 | SID: 00EDCD
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I'm glad to be rid of him. Even if it does mean I'm stuck in this pitiful shrine, in the back end of... nowhere. | ZH: 我很高兴能摆脱他。虽然我被困在这个……无聊的神殿里。 | SID: 00F410

translations.english: Yeah, rub it in. Just imagine what I could get done with my full power and none of these pesky "morals."
translations.chinese: 是啊，别哪壶不开提哪壶。如果没了这些讨厌的“道德”，我用自己的全部力量想做什么不行？

translations.english: Still, I've got this axe, and even if I can't use it, I'm sure someone would make a deal for it. Maybe I'll have a word with Molag Bal...
translations.chinese: 不过，我拿回了这把斧头，我倒是用不上，不过肯定能拿它去做交易。也许该和莫拉格·巴尔谈谈……

translations.english: I see he's having a good influence on you.
translations.chinese: 看起来他对你是有正面影响的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001CDB1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Yeah, rub it in. Just imagine what I could get done with my full power and none of these pesky "morals." | ZH: 是啊，别哪壶不开提哪壶。如果没了这些讨厌的“道德”，我用自己的全部力量想做什么不行？ | SID: 005DFA
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Still, I've got this axe, and even if I can't use it, I'm sure someone would make a deal for it. Maybe I'll have a word with Molag Bal... | ZH: 不过，我拿回了这把斧头，我倒是用不上，不过肯定能拿它去做交易。也许该和莫拉格·巴尔谈谈…… | SID: 00AF48
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I see he's having a good influence on you. | ZH: 看起来他对你是有正面影响的。 | SID: 0055D0

translations.english: I'd simply snap my fingers, and everyone in Skyrim would die. War resolved.
translations.chinese: 只要我打个响指，天际的人都死光光。战争也就结束了。

translations.english: Oh, if I had my full power, granting that would be trivial.
translations.chinese: 哦，要是我在全力状态，那也就罢了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001CDB3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'd simply snap my fingers, and everyone in Skyrim would die. War resolved. | ZH: 只要我打个响指，天际的人都死光光。战争也就结束了。 | SID: 000258
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Oh, if I had my full power, granting that would be trivial. | ZH: 哦，要是我在全力状态，那也就罢了。 | SID: 005181

translations.english: Yeah, yeah, dog gets master, master gets cosmic axe, everyone's happy. Just get over here, mutt.
translations.chinese: 对，对，狗子找到主子，主子拿回大斧子，皆大欢喜，皆大欢喜。快过来吧，你个串儿。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 我多年来都梦想目睹古光树。能让我跟你一起旅行吗？保证不会碍事的。

translations.chinese: 我想让你帮我和西比谈谈。然后，我要你找到寒霜，还有能够证明它价值的血统证明给我。

translations.english: And more, dribbling in from time to time. I'll assign them to you as they become available. To be completed at your leisure.
translations.chinese: 而且，时不时地有新的加进来。一有空我就把它们分配给你。抽空完成吧。

translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德说你有工作要给我。

Head to the Riften jail and talk to Sibbi. Get him to tell you where Frost and his Lineage Papers are and bring them to me outside Riften.

EDID: [0001F102]
Translations:

translations.english: Of course you are! I prayed, and you came, and now you'll accept my contract!
translations.chinese: 你当然是！我祈祷了，你就来了，现在你得接受我的契约！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F338]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Of course you are! I prayed, and you came, and now you'll accept my contract! | ZH: 你当然是！我祈祷了，你就来了，现在你得接受我的契约！ | SID: 002DB3

translations.english: So I ran away, and came home. And performed the Black Sacrament. Now you're here! And you can kill Grelod the Kind!
translations.chinese: 所以我逃回家了。然后执行了黑色圣礼。现在你来了！你应该去杀了慈祥的桂罗！

translations.english: The headmistress is an evil, cruel woman. They call her Grelod the Kind. But she's not kind. She's terrible. To all of us.
translations.chinese: 那个院长是个邪恶残忍的老女人。人家都叫她“慈祥的桂罗”。但她一点也不慈祥，她对我们所有人来说都很可怕。

translations.english: My mother, she... she died. I... I'm all alone now. So they sent me to that terrible orphanage in Riften. Honorhall.
translations.chinese: 我母亲，她……她去世了。我……成了孤儿。所以他们就把我送到了裂谷城那个可怕的荣耀堂孤儿院里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F339]

translations.english: Aretino? Why that little bastard! You tell him I'm coming for him! And when I find him, it will be the beating of his miserable life!

translations.english: Aventus Aretino says hello.
translations.chinese: 阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺向你问好。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F33A]

translations.english: The what? Why how dare you! I will not be intimidated in my own orphanage! Get out! Get out this instant!
translations.chinese: 什么？你敢威胁我！我还不会在自己的孤儿院被吓到！滚出去！立马滚出去！

translations.english: The Dark Brotherhood has come, Grelod.

translations.english: Assassinations don't come cheap, boy.
translations.chinese: 小子，请人刺杀价钱不便宜啊。

translations.english: It worked! I knew you'd come, I just knew it!

translations.english: It's Honorhall Orphanage, in Riften.
translations.chinese: 在裂谷城的荣耀堂孤儿院。

agentText:

EDID: [0001F346]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's Honorhall Orphanage, in Riften. | ZH: 在裂谷城的荣耀堂孤儿院。 | SID: 00456E

translations.english: Please don't kill Constance Michel. She really is kind.
translations.chinese: 千万不要杀了康斯坦斯·米切尔，她是个好人。

agentText:

translations.chinese: 你想干什么？你不该在这儿！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F349]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What do you want? You have no business being in here! | ZH: 你想干什么？你不该在这儿！ | SID: 005CC8

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F34A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Riff-raff! That's all you Riften people are! | ZH: 闲杂垃圾！你们裂谷城人都这个德行！ | SID: 00458B

translations.english: This is an orphanage, not an inn. Begone from here.
translations.chinese: 这是孤儿院，不是旅馆。赶紧出去。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F34B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This is an orphanage, not an inn. Begone from here. | ZH: 这是孤儿院，不是旅馆。赶紧出去。 | SID: 006126

translations.english: You don't scare me.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F34C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You don't scare me. | ZH: 你吓不倒我。 | SID: 00826E

translations.english: You're trying to frighten me, hmm? Do your worst!

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F34E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're trying to frighten me, hmm? Do your worst! | ZH: 想吓唬我？别做梦了！ | SID: 004531

translations.english: And don't you think of coming back to Rorikstead until you get her back from that Giant.
translations.chinese: 在你把她从巨人手里救回来前，别想回洛利克镇。

translations.english: You're damned right it does. I'll never breed another prize-winning goat like Gleda!
translations.chinese: 你说的太对了。我再也养不出像格丽达这样出色的山羊了！

agentText:
