- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You're damned right it does. I'll never breed another prize-winning goat like Gleda! | ZH: 你说的太对了。我再也养不出像格丽达这样出色的山羊了！ | SID: 0054BC

translations.english: This may have begun as a minor amusement, but it wasn't long before I realized you'd make a more interesting bearer of my not-quite-holy staff.
translations.chinese: 刚开始可能是个玩笑，但没过多久，我就意识到，你或许适合拿着我这把不咋神圣的法杖。

translations.english: Just a prank? Just a prank? The Daedric Lord of Debauchery does not deal in mere "pranks."
translations.chinese: 恶作剧？恶作剧？迪德拉的放荡君王可不止在“恶作剧”哦。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F37C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: This may have begun as a minor amusement, but it wasn't long before I realized you'd make a more interesting bearer of my not-quite-holy staff. | ZH: 刚开始可能是个玩笑，但没过多久，我就意识到，你或许适合拿着我这把不咋神圣的法杖。 | SID: 00D00F
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Just a prank? Just a prank? The Daedric Lord of Debauchery does not deal in mere "pranks." | ZH: 恶作剧？恶作剧？迪德拉的放荡君王可不止在“恶作剧”哦。 | SID: 00EE3A

translations.english: You really don't remember stealing a goat and selling her to a Giant? Are you thick?
translations.chinese: 你真的不记得自己偷了只山羊卖给巨人了？你糊涂了？

translations.english: Go get her! At least she's bound to follow you back - you smell just like the fermented feed she likes.
translations.chinese: 去找她！她应该会跟着你回来，你身上闻着就像她最喜欢的发酵饲料。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F37D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You really don't remember stealing a goat and selling her to a Giant? Are you thick? | ZH: 你真的不记得自己偷了只山羊卖给巨人了？你糊涂了？ | SID: 005CDB
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Go get her! At least she's bound to follow you back - you smell just like the fermented feed she likes. | ZH: 去找她！她应该会跟着你回来，你身上闻着就像她最喜欢的发酵饲料。 | SID: 0066FC

translations.english: Let's be honest, here. I don't always think my decisions through. But you... you're going places.
translations.chinese: 老实说吧。我做决定的时候时常不细考虑。但是你……去过不少地方。

translations.english: Maybe a little influence from your old uncle Sanguine could help adjust your course a bit...
translations.chinese: 也许啊，你桑吉恩老叔的一点影响可以帮你调整一下路线……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F37E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Let's be honest, here. I don't always think my decisions through. But you... you're going places. | ZH: 老实说吧。我做决定的时候时常不细考虑。但是你……去过不少地方。 | SID: 00631F
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Maybe a little influence from your old uncle Sanguine could help adjust your course a bit... | ZH: 也许啊，你桑吉恩老叔的一点影响可以帮你调整一下路线…… | SID: 009DBC

translations.english: My pleasure. But I think it's time for you to go. No fun keeping you locked up in here with the staff.
translations.chinese: 我的荣幸。不过，我觉得你该走了。把你和法杖关在这里也怪没意思的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F384]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My pleasure. But I think it's time for you to go. No fun keeping you locked up in here with the staff. | ZH: 我的荣幸。不过，我觉得你该走了。把你和法杖关在这里也怪没意思的。 | SID: 00E7AF

translations.english: So, you're finally back. Look, I've been patient, but you still owe me.
translations.chinese: 你终于回来了。看，我倒是很有耐心，但你还是欠我的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F385]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So, you're finally back. Look, I've been patient, but you still owe me. | ZH: 你终于回来了。看，我倒是很有耐心，但你还是欠我的。 | SID: 00D631

translations.english: Details, details. The Sanguine Rose breaks all the time and is fixed with but a thought.
translations.chinese: 小意思，小意思。血腥玫瑰总是会坏，修它也就是个念头的事儿。

translations.english: In fact, here it is now. Think of it - a never-ending stream of minions. And all of the prestige of being Sanguine's chosen.
translations.chinese: 事实上，它就在这儿。想想吧，一群不知疲惫的仆从。还有被桑吉恩选中的荣誉。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F386]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Details, details. The Sanguine Rose breaks all the time and is fixed with but a thought. | ZH: 小意思，小意思。血腥玫瑰总是会坏，修它也就是个念头的事儿。 | SID: 00A2E8
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: In fact, here it is now. Think of it - a never-ending stream of minions. And all of the prestige of being Sanguine's chosen. | ZH: 事实上，它就在这儿。想想吧，一群不知疲惫的仆从。还有被桑吉恩选中的荣誉。 | SID: 00A683

translations.english: Of course! You don't remember getting here.
translations.chinese: 当然！你不记得来过这里了。

translations.english: Where am I?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F387]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Of course! You don't remember getting here. | ZH: 当然！你不记得来过这里了。 | SID: 00C570
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Where am I? | ZH: 我这是在哪儿？ | SID: 008F57

translations.english: I still can't figure out why you stole her. You left a note explaining it, but half of it was gibberish and the rest had mead spilled on it.
translations.chinese: 我还是不太明白你为什么偷她。你留了张字条，但是上面一半是胡言乱语，另一半撒的全是蜜酒。

translations.english: Only bit I could make out was "repaying Ysolda in Whiterun," and even that's mostly scribbles. Guess you could try there.
translations.chinese: 我只能读懂一丁点，写着“把钱还给白漫城的伊索尔达”，不过写的也很潦草。我觉得你应该到那里问问。

translations.english: Gleda! And not a scratch on her! Happy day!
translations.chinese: 格丽达！毫发无损！太好了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F389]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I still can't figure out why you stole her. You left a note explaining it, but half of it was gibberish and the rest had mead spilled on it. | ZH: 我还是不太明白你为什么偷她。你留了张字条，但是上面一半是胡言乱语，另一半撒的全是蜜酒。 | SID: 005422
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Only bit I could make out was "repaying Ysolda in Whiterun," and even that's mostly scribbles. Guess you could try there. | ZH: 我只能读懂一丁点，写着“把钱还给白漫城的伊索尔达”，不过写的也很潦草。我觉得你应该到那里问问。 | SID: 006C54
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Gleda! And not a scratch on her! Happy day! | ZH: 格丽达！毫发无损！太好了！ | SID: 0079B4

translations.english: You! You've got a lot of nerve showing yourself in this town again. What do you have to say for yourself?
translations.chinese: 你！你还敢在镇子上露面。你还有什么要说的吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F38A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You! You've got a lot of nerve showing yourself in this town again. What do you have to say for yourself? | ZH: 你！你还敢在镇子上露面。你还有什么要说的吗？ | SID: 00B1F6

translations.english: You went right out to give it to your fiancee! Don't you even remember where you left her?
translations.chinese: 你把它给了你的未婚妻！你连把她留在哪里都不记得了吗？

translations.english: And after you told me that sweet story of how you met in Witchmist Grove! I can see why she left you.
translations.chinese: 你明明跟我说过你们在女巫迷雾树林相遇的甜蜜故事！我算是明白她为什么离开你了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F391]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You went right out to give it to your fiancee! Don't you even remember where you left her? | ZH: 你把它给了你的未婚妻！你连把她留在哪里都不记得了吗？ | SID: 0033E3
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: And after you told me that sweet story of how you met in Witchmist Grove! I can see why she left you. | ZH: 你明明跟我说过你们在女巫迷雾树林相遇的甜蜜故事！我算是明白她为什么离开你了。 | SID: 00A302

translations.english: Sorry's not good enough! Not while my Gleda is still out there, alone and afraid. You kidnapped her and sold her to that Giant.
translations.chinese: 光说对不起有什么用？我的格丽达还孤孤零零地在外面担惊受怕。你把她绑架了，还卖给了巨人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F392]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Sorry's not good enough! Not while my Gleda is still out there, alone and afraid. You kidnapped her and sold her to that Giant. | ZH: 光说对不起有什么用？我的格丽达还孤孤零零地在外面担惊受怕。你把她绑架了，还卖给了巨人。 | SID: 00E29A

translations.english: Pick up your mess, then apologize, and if we think you're sincere we'll consider lending you aid.
translations.chinese: 把你自己弄得烂摊子收拾好，然后道歉，如果够真诚，我们会考虑帮你。

translations.english: Dibella teaches love and compassion, but that doesn't mean we're just going to tell you what you want to know and let you walk away from this.
translations.chinese: 迪贝拉教导我们充满爱心和同情。但不代表我们要告诉你想知道的事，然后放你走。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F393]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Pick up your mess, then apologize, and if we think you're sincere we'll consider lending you aid. | ZH: 把你自己弄得烂摊子收拾好，然后道歉，如果够真诚，我们会考虑帮你。 | SID: 002C13
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Dibella teaches love and compassion, but that doesn't mean we're just going to tell you what you want to know and let you walk away from this. | ZH: 迪贝拉教导我们充满爱心和同情。但不代表我们要告诉你想知道的事，然后放你走。 | SID: 00EA23

translations.english: That's really a shame - I was so looking forward to the wedding. You said you'd have all the most interesting guests.
translations.chinese: 真遗憾，我本来很期待婚礼举行的。你说过会邀请一大群客人。

translations.english: Aw, what's wrong? Did the engagement fall through? Look, how about we call it even, as long as you bring back the wedding ring?
translations.chinese: 啊，怎么了？订婚泡汤了？这样，不如你把结婚戒指拿回来？这样我们扯平了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F396]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: That's really a shame - I was so looking forward to the wedding. You said you'd have all the most interesting guests. | ZH: 真遗憾，我本来很期待婚礼举行的。你说过会邀请一大群客人。 | SID: 00BC7D
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Aw, what's wrong? Did the engagement fall through? Look, how about we call it even, as long as you bring back the wedding ring? | ZH: 啊，怎么了？订婚泡汤了？这样，不如你把结婚戒指拿回来？这样我们扯平了。 | SID: 00C525

translations.english: I really just needed something to encourage you to go out into the world and spread merriment.
translations.chinese: 我只是想鼓励你去全世界传播欢乐而已。

translations.english: And you did just that! I haven't been so entertained in at least a hundred years.
translations.chinese: 然后你做到了！我少说也有一百年没这么开心了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F397]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I really just needed something to encourage you to go out into the world and spread merriment. | ZH: 我只是想鼓励你去全世界传播欢乐而已。 | SID: 009FF2
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: And you did just that! I haven't been so entertained in at least a hundred years. | ZH: 然后你做到了！我少说也有一百年没这么开心了。 | SID: 00EE7C

translations.english: You'd better remember her right fast, before I call the guards and have you hauled away.
translations.chinese: 在我喊卫兵把你拖走之前，最好把她想起来。

translations.english: Is that so? Does the name Gleda ring a bell? The star beauty of my farm? Kidnapped by a drunk lout and sold to a Giant?
translations.chinese: 是吗？格丽达，听着耳熟吗？我农场里的明星小美女？被一个酒鬼绑架卖给了巨人？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F399]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You'd better remember her right fast, before I call the guards and have you hauled away. | ZH: 在我喊卫兵把你拖走之前，最好把她想起来。 | SID: 00ABC4
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Is that so? Does the name Gleda ring a bell? The star beauty of my farm? Kidnapped by a drunk lout and sold to a Giant? | ZH: 是吗？格丽达，听着耳熟吗？我农场里的明星小美女？被一个酒鬼绑架卖给了巨人？ | SID: 00E35D

translations.english: It's not about the money, really. I wouldn't have given you the wedding ring on credit if you weren't so obviously in love.
translations.chinese: 真的跟钱没关系。如果你们不是那么相爱，我才不会赊账卖你婚戒呢。

translations.english: But if there isn't going to be a wedding, the least you can do is give the ring back. That was one of my best pieces.
translations.chinese: 但如果你不打算举行婚礼，至少把戒指还给我。那可是我最好的作品之一。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F39B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It's not about the money, really. I wouldn't have given you the wedding ring on credit if you weren't so obviously in love. | ZH: 真的跟钱没关系。如果你们不是那么相爱，我才不会赊账卖你婚戒呢。 | SID: 003552
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But if there isn't going to be a wedding, the least you can do is give the ring back. That was one of my best pieces. | ZH: 但如果你不打算举行婚礼，至少把戒指还给我。那可是我最好的作品之一。 | SID: 00EED3

translations.english: Wake up!
That's right, it's time to wake up, you drunken blasphemer!
translations.chinese: 没错，该醒醒了，你这醉鬼亵渎者！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F39D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Wake up! | ZH: 起来！ | SID: 000974
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: That's right, it's time to wake up, you drunken blasphemer! | ZH: 没错，该醒醒了，你这醉鬼亵渎者！ | SID: 00E00D

translations.english: You kept saying it would be a huge ceremony at Morvunskar. You said you even had some magic staff there that would handle all the guests.
translations.chinese: 你一直说会在莫万斯卡举办隆重的婚礼。你还说你还有法杖能招待所有宾客。

translations.english: Excellent! Sorry it didn't work out with you and your lady. I know how excited you were for the wedding.
translations.chinese: 太好了！你们俩没能结合真是憾事。我本来很期待你们的婚礼的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F3A3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You kept saying it would be a huge ceremony at Morvunskar. You said you even had some magic staff there that would handle all the guests. | ZH: 你一直说会在莫万斯卡举办隆重的婚礼。你还说你还有法杖能招待所有宾客。 | SID: 002A3D
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Excellent! Sorry it didn't work out with you and your lady. I know how excited you were for the wedding. | ZH: 太好了！你们俩没能结合真是憾事。我本来很期待你们的婚礼的。 | SID: 005A44

translations.english: How could you forget? It was the sweetest story I'd ever heard.
translations.chinese: 你怎么会忘了呢？这可是我听过最甜蜜的故事。

translations.english: You met at the full moon, under the biggest tree in Witchmist Grove, surrounded by fireflies. It was straight out of a storybook.
translations.chinese: 满月时，你们相识在女巫迷雾树林最大的树下，身旁还有萤火虫围绕。就像故事书里的描写一样。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F3A4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: How could you forget? It was the sweetest story I'd ever heard. | ZH: 你怎么会忘了呢？这可是我听过最甜蜜的故事。 | SID: 002600
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You met at the full moon, under the biggest tree in Witchmist Grove, surrounded by fireflies. It was straight out of a storybook. | ZH: 满月时，你们相识在女巫迷雾树林最大的树下，身旁还有萤火虫围绕。就像故事书里的描写一样。 | SID: 00EE49

translations.english: I suppose that'll do. Dibella teaches us forgiveness, after all. Even for a drunk like you.
translations.chinese: 我想这样就行了。毕竟迪贝拉教导我们要学会宽容。即使是你这种烂酒鬼。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F3A5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I suppose that'll do. Dibella teaches us forgiveness, after all. Even for a drunk like you. | ZH: 我想这样就行了。毕竟迪贝拉教导我们要学会宽容。即使是你这种烂酒鬼。 | SID: 00DC74

translations.english: What did I do? Please, whatever it is, I'm sorry.
translations.chinese: 我做了什么？求你了，不管做了什么，都是我不好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F501]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What did I do? Please, whatever it is, I'm sorry. | ZH: 我做了什么？求你了，不管做了什么，都是我不好。 | SID: 00E0C1

translations.english: I don't have time for this nonsense. I've got a home to keep and children to feed. Now let me out of here!
translations.chinese: 我没时间和你废话。我还要养家弄孩子。现在放我走!

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F50D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I don't have time for this nonsense. I've got a home to keep and children to feed. Now let me out of here! | ZH: 我没时间和你废话。我还要养家弄孩子。现在放我走! | SID: 009B7B

translations.english: Tell you what. You release me, and I promise my associates won't hunt you down like an animal and butcher you in the street. It's a win-win.
translations.chinese: 告诉你。你放了我，我保证我的同伙不会像抓畜生一样把你在街上宰了。双赢嘛。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F5C0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Tell you what. You release me, and I promise my associates won't hunt you down like an animal and butcher you in the street. It's a win-win. | ZH: 告诉你。你放了我，我保证我的同伙不会像抓畜生一样把你在街上宰了。双赢嘛。 | SID: 00F677

translations.english: My name is Fultheim. I'm a soldier. Well, mercenary, really. You know, a... a sellsword. I've lived in Skyrim all my life.
translations.chinese: 我叫弗瑟姆，是个士兵。嗯，给钱就行那种。你明白……雇佣兵。我一辈子都住在天际。

translations.english: That's all! I'm a nobody, really. So can't you just let me go?
translations.chinese: 就这些！我就是个无名小卒，真的。你就不能放了我吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F5E2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: My name is Fultheim. I'm a soldier. Well, mercenary, really. You know, a... a sellsword. I've lived in Skyrim all my life. | ZH: 我叫弗瑟姆，是个士兵。嗯，给钱就行那种。你明白……雇佣兵。我一辈子都住在天际。 | SID: 007BF7
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: That's all! I'm a nobody, really. So can't you just let me go? | ZH: 就这些！我就是个无名小卒，真的。你就不能放了我吗？ | SID: 00F378

translations.english: None of your damned business who I am! If you're going to kill me, just do it already!
translations.chinese: 我是谁和你有什么关系！要想杀我赶紧动手！

translations.english: As Mara is my witness, if I didn't have this hood on right now I would spit right in your face...
translations.chinese: 玛拉给我作证，要是没戴着这个破麻袋，我早啐你了……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F5E7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: None of your damned business who I am! If you're going to kill me, just do it already! | ZH: 我是谁和你有什么关系！要想杀我赶紧动手！ | SID: 00A339
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: As Mara is my witness, if I didn't have this hood on right now I would spit right in your face... | ZH: 玛拉给我作证，要是没戴着这个破麻袋，我早啐你了…… | SID: 00A946

translations.english: Have you not heard of me? Perhaps I will have my people carve my name in your corpse, as a reminder.
translations.chinese: 没听说过我吗？也许我该叫我手下人把我的名字刻在你尸体上作为纪念。

translations.english: Ahhh... Vasha, at your service. Obtainer of goods, taker of lives, and defiler of daughters.
translations.chinese: 啊……鄙人瓦沙，乐意效劳。敛财、杀人、糟蹋姑娘，我都干。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F652]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Have you not heard of me? Perhaps I will have my people carve my name in your corpse, as a reminder. | ZH: 没听说过我吗？也许我该叫我手下人把我的名字刻在你尸体上作为纪念。 | SID: 00E467
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ahhh... Vasha, at your service. Obtainer of goods, taker of lives, and defiler of daughters. | ZH: 啊……鄙人瓦沙，乐意效劳。敛财、杀人、糟蹋姑娘，我都干。 | SID: 00E686

translations.english: Excuse me? What kind of question is that?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F653]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Excuse me? What kind of question is that? | ZH: 我没听清，你问的什么？ | SID: 008072

translations.english: What? Oh gods, I don't want to die...

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F656]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What? Oh gods, I don't want to die... | ZH: 什么？哦天啊，我不想死…… | SID: 00EE87

translations.english: Me? Ha! Are you serious?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0001F657]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Me? Ha! Are you serious? | ZH: 我？哈！你开玩笑呢？ | SID: 00EF5C

translations.english: Here, just like I promised. This should fetch you a nice price. And thank you. Thank you again.
translations.chinese: 给，这是我承诺的报酬。应该能卖个好价钱。谢谢你，真的很谢谢你。

translations.english: Aha! I knew you could do it! I just knew it! I knew the Dark Brotherhood would save me!

translations.english: I do indeed.
The girl's been running her mouth, wants an ex-lover killed. She's apparently performed the Black Sacrament.

translations.english: But they'll keep you busy. Just do them as you're able. There's no real time limit - the targets aren't going anywhere.
translations.chinese: 但他们也够你忙的了。尽你所能去做就是。没有时间限制，反正目标也不会乱跑。

translations.english: It is. These aren't particularly glamorous assassinations, I'll be honest. Don't pay much, either.
translations.chinese: 没错。说实话，这些暗杀不出彩。也付不了你多少钱。

translations.english: Sounds simple enough.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020015]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You can turn each one in as it's completed, or wait and turn in the whole group when all the targets have been eliminated. Whichever works for you. | ZH: 你可以每完成一个过来上交一次，也可以等目标全消灭之后一起上交。这都无所谓。 | SID: 0077D8
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But they'll keep you busy. Just do them as you're able. There's no real time limit - the targets aren't going anywhere. | ZH: 但他们也够你忙的了。尽你所能去做就是。没有时间限制，反正目标也不会乱跑。 | SID: 00810E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: It is. These aren't particularly glamorous assassinations, I'll be honest. Don't pay much, either. | ZH: 没错。说实话，这些暗杀不出彩。也付不了你多少钱。 | SID: 00E1E2
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Sounds simple enough. | ZH: 听起来很简单。 | SID: 00ACD4

translations.english: Oh, but don't misunderstand. I'm not criticizing. It was a good kill. Old crone had it coming. And you saved a group of urchins, to boot.
translations.chinese: 哦，但别误会。我这不是批评你。杀得漂亮。那老东西自找的。而且你还救了一群孩子。

translations.english: Ah, but there is a slight... problem.
translations.chinese: 啊，但是有一个小小的……问题。

translations.english: Half of Skyrim knows. Old hag gets butchered in her own orphanage? Things like that tend to get around.
translations.chinese: 半个天际都传遍了。老妖婆在自己的孤儿院被杀了？这事儿想传开太容易了。

translations.english: You know about that?

translations.english: Your targets are the beggar Narfi, an ex-miller named Ennodius Papius, and Beitild, a mine boss.
translations.chinese: 你的目标是乞丐纳菲、前木材厂主恩诺迪尤斯·帕尤斯，还有矿场老板贝提尤德。

translations.english: When you've completed all those, we'll see if I might have some more.
translations.chinese: 等做完这些，再看看还有没有其他的。

translations.english: Well then, let's get started. I've got three available right now.
translations.chinese: 那我们开始吧。我这里有三份没做的契约。

translations.english: I'm ready for the first set of contracts.
translations.chinese: 我准备好接第一份契约了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020018]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: A problem? | ZH: 问题？ | SID: 00AA1B

translations.english: If you turn around, you'll notice my guests. I've "collected" them from... well, that's not really important. The here and now. That's what matters.
translations.chinese: 如果你转过头去，就会看到我的客人了。我把他们从……不重要了。此时此地才最要紧。

translations.english: You see, there's a contract out on one of them, and that person can't leave this room alive. But... which one? Go on, see if you can figure it out.
translations.chinese: 你看，他们中的一个就是契约的目标，那个人不能活着离开。但……到底是谁呢？去吧，看看你能不能弄明白。

translations.english: Make your choice. Make your kill. I just want to observe... and admire.
translations.chinese: 你来选，你来杀。我只想观察……然后赞叹你。

translations.english: Well now. Funny you should ask.
You want me to murder someone else? Who?

agentText:

translations.english: I see.
Well, please let me know when you are.
translations.chinese: 好吧，等你准备好请告诉我一声。

EDID: [00020027]

translations.english: The prominent feature here is the Hall of the Elements. It's our primary location for lectures, practice sessions, and general meetings.
translations.chinese: 这里最突出的特色就是元素大厅了。这里是我们演讲、练习、集会的地方。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020028]
Translations:

translations.english: Well, first you'll need these. While you're not required to wear them, you may find them more to your liking than your current clothes.
translations.chinese: 好吧，先给你这些。虽然不强制着装，但你可能会发现它们比你现在的衣服更合适。

translations.english: Another new student... I'm surprised at how many of you there are lately.
translations.chinese: 又是新生吗……最近居然有这么多人。

translations.english: I'll give you a brief tour, and then we'll get you to your first class. Are you ready to begin?
translations.chinese: 我会带你简单参观一下，然后带你去上第一堂课。准备好开始了吗？

translations.english: Yes, just a brief overview of our facilities. Are you ready?
translations.chinese: 对，只是简单介绍一下我们的配置。准备好了吗？

translations.english: You said something about a tour?

translations.english: The College of Winterhold has been a fixture in Skyrim for thousands of years.
translations.chinese: 冬堡学院已经在天际屹立数千年了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002002B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The College of Winterhold has been a fixture in Skyrim for thousands of years. | ZH: 冬堡学院已经在天际屹立数千年了。 | SID: 006E42

translations.english: Wonderful. Please follow me, and don't wander off.
translations.chinese: 很好。请跟我来，不要乱走。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002002C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Wonderful. Please follow me, and don't wander off. | ZH: 很好。请跟我来，不要乱走。 | SID: 00AB12

translations.english: There you go. Take a look around, there should be plenty of gear to choose from. I'm going to see if I can find something for these burns.
translations.chinese: 好了。四处找找看，这应该有很多装备可以拿。我看看能不能找到治疗烧伤的东西。

translations.english: Let me see if I can get that door open.
translations.chinese: 我试试能不能把门打开。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002012E]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let me see if I can get that door open. | ZH: 我试试能不能把门打开。 | SID: 00D17F

translations.english: We should keep moving. Come here. Let me see if I can get those bindings off.
translations.chinese: 我们得继续前进。过来点，我试下能不能把这些绳索弄断。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020130]

translations.english: Looks like we're the only ones who made it. Was that really a dragon? The bringers of the End Times?
translations.chinese: 看来只有我们成功了。那真的是头龙？末日的使者？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Let's keep moving. That thing is still out there.

translations.english: Well would you look at that!
This appears to lead somewhere. Let's see where it goes.
translations.chinese: 这似乎是通往某个地方。我们去看看它通往哪里。

translations.english: This appears to lead somewhere. Let's see where it goes.

translations.english: Unfortunately, we've had to implement more stringent entry procedures, due to some problems with the local Nords.
translations.chinese: 不幸的是，我们不得不实施更严格的入学程序，因为我们和当地诺德人出了些问题。

translations.english: We don't anticipate any real violence, but it never hurts to be prepared.
translations.chinese: 我们应该不会真的演化出暴力事件，但还是要有备无患。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020303]

translations.english: Now I'll show you to your quarters. You're going to be sharing space with your fellow Apprentices, who you'll meet shortly.
translations.chinese: 现在我带你去看看住处。你们这些学徒会住一起，你很快就会见到他们了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020304]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Now I'll show you to your quarters. You're going to be sharing space with your fellow Apprentices, who you'll meet shortly. | ZH: 现在我带你去看看住处。你们这些学徒会住一起，你很快就会见到他们了。 | SID: 00D097

translations.english: This is where you'll be staying. This bed and desk are yours. Please try and be considerate of others.
translations.chinese: 这就是你的住处了。这床和桌子归你了。请尽可能替别人着想。

translations.english: Now, let's go back to the Hall of the Elements, where most of the members gather for lectures and study sessions.
translations.chinese: 好了，我们回元素大厅吧，大部分成员都会聚集在那儿参加讲座或者进行学习。

translations.english: Initially you'll be learning from Tolfdir, one of our most esteemed Wizards.
translations.chinese: 一开始教导你们的是我们这里最受人尊敬的巫师，托夫迪尔。

translations.english: Our newest members are housed here in the Hall of Attainment.
translations.chinese: 我们的新学员都住在成就大厅。

translations.english: I'll ask that you please keep your voice down while inside, as others may be working on research or... delicate experiments.
translations.chinese: 希望你在里面能安静点，因为其他人可能正在进行研究或者……微妙的实验。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Tolfdir is likely already addressing the new Apprentices. Go on in, and if you have any problems, let one of our senior members know.
translations.chinese: 托夫迪尔可能已经在给新生上课了。去吧，如果你有什么问题，随时和老成员交流。

agentText:

EDID: [00020308]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Tolfdir is likely already addressing the new Apprentices. Go on in, and if you have any problems, let one of our senior members know. | ZH: 托夫迪尔可能已经在给新生上课了。去吧，如果你有什么问题，随时和老成员交流。 | SID: 006A34

translations.english: Your payment, my friend. Well done.
translations.chinese: 朋友，拿着报酬吧。干得好。

translations.english: Ah, so the hunter came to know the fear of the hunted, hmm?
translations.chinese: 啊，这么说猎人已经了解猎物的恐惧了？

translations.english: Anoriath is dead.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020428]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ah, so the hunter came to know the fear of the hunted, hmm? | ZH: 啊，这么说猎人已经了解猎物的恐惧了？ | SID: 006F96
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Anoriath is dead. | ZH: 阿诺利亚斯死了。 | SID: 00E1B5

translations.english: I hope the elf didn't give you too much trouble. I once got set on fire by a sorcerer. Nasty business, that.
translations.chinese: 希望那个精灵没给你添太多麻烦。我以前就被一个巫师给点着过。这不是个讨喜的差事。

translations.english: But I digress. Here's your payment.
translations.chinese: 说跑题了。这是你的报酬。

translations.english: Maluril is dead.

translations.english: Unless, of course, that was your goal all along. Here's your payment.
translations.chinese: 啊，当然了，除非你一直都想变。这是报酬。

translations.english: And if you contracted Sanguinare Vampiris, be sure to get that taken care of. Else you'll end up like our own Babette.
translations.chinese: 如果你感染了血腥吸血热的话，别忘了治一下。不然就和我们的巴贝特一样咯。

translations.english: No sarcasm this time. You faced a vampire, and lived to tell the tale. Well done.
translations.chinese: 这次就不讽刺你了。你单独面对吸血鬼，还活了下来。干得好。

translations.english: Hern is dead.

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: And if you contracted Sanguinare Vampiris, be sure to get that taken care of. Else you'll end up like our own Babette. | ZH: 如果你感染了血腥吸血热的话，别忘了治一下。不然就和我们的巴贝特一样咯。 | SID: 006CB7
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: No sarcasm this time. You faced a vampire, and lived to tell the tale. Well done. | ZH: 这次就不讽刺你了。你单独面对吸血鬼，还活了下来。干得好。 | SID: 008E39
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Hern is dead. | ZH: 赫恩死了。 | SID: 00EB0D

translations.english: By Sithis, now I am truly impressed!
translations.chinese: 西帝斯在上，我太感动了！

translations.english: You've not only earned your payment, but my respect as well. And believe me, friend - that does not come easily.
translations.chinese: 你不仅得到了报酬，还有我的尊重。相信我，朋友，这可不是容易事。

translations.english: To kill a pirate captain, on her own ship no less? Simply masterful!
translations.chinese: 杀死一个海盗船长，还是在她自己船上？真是熟练啊！

translations.english: I'm afraid that concludes our business. You have exhausted all available additional contracts.
translations.chinese: 我们的交易恐怕到此也就结束了。你已经做完了所有额外契约。

translations.english: But I'm sure you've got plenty to keep you busy right about now, hmm?
translations.chinese: 但我相信你现在还有很多事要忙对吧？

translations.english: Safia is dead.

translations.english: Here's your payment.
Congratulations. You slaughtered an emaciated beggar in cold blood. You are truly an opponent to be feared.
translations.chinese: 祝贺你。冷血地残杀了一个瘦弱的乞丐。真是个令人畏惧的人啊。

translations.english: Narfi is dead.

agentText:

translations.english: Your payment, as per the usual.
Wonderful. The only good bard is a dead one, as far as I'm concerned. All that singing and... mirth.
translations.chinese: 太好了。我看啊，只有死了的吟游诗人才是好诗人。那些歌唱还有笑声太烦人了。

translations.english: Lurbuk is dead.

agentText:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Lurbuk is dead. | ZH: 卢布克死了。 | SID: 001AD5

translations.english: In any event, nice work. Here's your payment.
translations.chinese: 不管怎么说，干得漂亮。这是你的报酬。

translations.english: Personally, I've always found Argonians to be incredibly unpredictable opponents. Especially near water.
translations.chinese: 我一直觉得阿尔贡很不好对付。尤其是在水边。

translations.english: Deekus is dead.

agentText:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Deekus is dead. | ZH: 蒂库斯死了。 | SID: 000D25

translations.english: Here's your payment. Well earned, indeed.
Ah! Well done! Well done!
Those caravaners can be an elusive bunch. Takes a fair bit of stalking to take one down. But then, that's half the fun, isn't it?
translations.chinese: 那些车队商人可是不好捉摸。想要干掉一个也得花不少功夫呢。但这也是乐趣的一部分，对吧？

translations.english: Ma'randru-jo is dead.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020430]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Ma'randru-jo is dead. | ZH: 玛'兰德鲁-约死了。 | SID: 002FC9

translations.english: Good. And I hope you were careful in that lumber mill. Those splinters and rusty nails can be quite nasty.
translations.chinese: 很好。希望你路过锯木厂的时候小心点。那里碎屑和锈铁钉太多了。

translations.english: Your payment, for a job well done.
Ennodius Papius is dead.
translations.chinese: 恩诺迪尤斯·帕尤斯死了。

translations.english: Here's your payment. Well earned, as always.
translations.chinese: 这是你一如既往应得的报酬。

translations.english: Hmph. Well, that's sure to throw a branch into Falkreath's well-oiled political machine.
translations.chinese: 嗯。这肯定会给佛克瑞斯运转良好的政治机器带来麻烦的。

translations.english: Helvard is dead.

translations.english: Infiltrating an occupied fort and making it out in one piece is nothing to joke about. Well done.
translations.chinese: 潜入一个被盘踞的堡垒又毫发无损的逃出来可不是开玩笑的。干得好。

translations.english: Your payment for services rendered.
Don't worry, my friend, I'll spare you the facetious quip about killing a defenseless old woman.
translations.chinese: 别担心，朋友。我不会笑话你杀了个手无寸铁的老女人的。

translations.english: Agnis is dead.

translations.english: Well, what happens now is you start your new life in the Dark Brotherhood. You're part of the Family, after all.
translations.chinese: 现在你要在黑暗兄弟会开始新生活了。毕竟你已经是这个家的一员了。

translations.english: This, as you can see, is our Sanctuary. You won't find a safer place in all of Skyrim. So get comfortable.
translations.chinese: 如你所见，这里是我们的圣所。在天际没有比这里更安全的地方。所以放松点。

translations.english: So what happens now?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020435]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: So what happens now? | ZH: 那现在怎么办？ | SID: 005FE0

translations.english: Of course she is. I hear the mining business is extremely cutthroat. And those hours... they're murder.
translations.chinese: 当然。我听说采矿业是十分残酷的。而且那个工作时长……他们才是凶手。

translations.english: I could do this all day. Here's your payment.
translations.chinese: 杀多少我都不嫌累。报酬拿好。

translations.english: Beitild is dead.

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Beitild is dead. | ZH: 贝提尤德死了。 | SID: 00EF50

translations.english: Keerava, Bersi Honey-Hand and Haelga.
translations.chinese: 基拉瓦，“甜手”波西还有哈尔嘉。

translations.english: Do this right, and I can promise you a permanent place in our organization.
translations.chinese: 好好干，我保证你能在组织里拿个铁饭碗。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020535]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Do this right, and I can promise you a permanent place in our organization. | ZH: 好好干，我保证你能在组织里拿个铁饭碗。 | SID: 00A15F

translations.english: Honestly, the debt is secondary here. What's more important is that you get the message across that we aren't to be ignored.
translations.chinese: 老实说，清债是次要的。更重要的事，你要让大伙明白，不能忽视我们。

translations.english: A word of warning though... I don't want any of them killed. Bad for business.
translations.chinese: 不过我要警告你一句……我不想他们有人被杀。这对业务不利。

translations.english: Well, well... color me impressed, lad. I wasn't certain I'd ever see you again!
translations.chinese: 嗯嗯……真不错啊，小子。我都不知道还能不能再见到你！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020537]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well, well... color me impressed, lad. I wasn't certain I'd ever see you again! | ZH: 嗯嗯……真不错啊，小子。我都不知道还能不能再见到你！ | SID: 00EF66

translations.english: So... now that I've whetted your appetite with our little scheme at the market, how about handling a few deadbeats for me?
translations.chinese: 所以……既然我在市场上的小计划勾起了你的胃口，帮我处理几个老赖怎么样？

translations.english: Reliable and headstrong? You're turning out to be quite the prize!
translations.chinese: 可靠又任性？你还挺值这个价钱的！

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Have anything for us yet?
translations.chinese: 有什么要交给我们的吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002053C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Have anything for us yet? | ZH: 有什么要交给我们的吗？ | SID: 0045C8

translations.english: I'll be here when you're done.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020540]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll be here when you're done. | ZH: 搞定了就来这里找我。 | SID: 00FA2C

translations.english: Come back when you grow a backbone.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020541]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come back when you grow a backbone. | ZH: 等你有骨气了再来吧。 | SID: 000891

translations.english: Keerava's stubborn, but she's got a soft spot for family.
translations.chinese: 基拉瓦很固执，但对家庭很看重。

translations.english: Talk to Talen-Jei at the Bee and Barb and see if you can get something out of him. They're... well acquainted if you catch my meaning.
translations.chinese: 和蜂与钩的塔伦-杰聊聊，看看能不能从他那套出些什么。他们……很熟悉彼此，你懂得。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Talk to Talen-Jei at the Bee and Barb and see if you can get something out of him. They're... well acquainted if you catch my meaning. | ZH: 和蜂与钩的塔伦-杰聊聊，看看能不能从他那套出些什么。他们……很熟悉彼此，你懂得。 | SID: 00FCEB

translations.english: Hmph. Yes. Yes, I believe you are. Very well, then.
translations.chinese: 嗯。对，对。我相信你准备好。很好。

translations.english: You need to find and kill Safia, the captain of the pirate ship Red Wave.
translations.chinese: 你需要找到并杀死赤红波浪号海盗船的船长萨非亚。

translations.english: The ship travels the northern coast, and sometimes isn't even in Skyrim at all. So you'll have to be patient. Good luck.
translations.chinese: 那艘船会在北部海岸航行，有时甚至不在天际。所以你要有耐心。祝你好运。

translations.english: I'm ready for the last contract.
translations.chinese: 我已经准备好接最后一份契约了。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000205BD]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: I'm ready for the last contract. | ZH: 我已经准备好接最后一份契约了。 | SID: 006C32

translations.english: Your first target is an Orc bard named Lurbuk. The other is a vampire by the name of Hern.
translations.chinese: 第一个目标是兽人吟游诗人卢布克，另一个是吸血鬼赫恩。

translations.english: Happy hunting.
As it turns out, I've got two new contracts. One rather easy assignment, and another that should prove quite a challenge.
translations.chinese: 我这里刚好有两份新契约。一份简单点，一份就相当有挑战性了。

translations.english: Well then, your timing couldn't be better.
Astrid wanted me to see you about some more work.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德派我来看有没有更多工作。

translations.english: Well aren't we the eager one? Sorry to disappoint, but there's nothing. Try me again later.
translations.chinese: 嗯，这么积极啊？但抱歉了，现在没有。过会儿再来找我吧。

translations.english: Are there any more contracts available?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Are there any more contracts available? | ZH: 还有其他契约吗？ | SID: 00E916

translations.english: Well, yes. Two of them. But you're reaching the end of what I have available.
translations.chinese: 嗯，好吧。还有两个。但你快把我手头的都做完了。

translations.english: Kill these two, and I'll have one last contract to give you. I'm just finalizing some details now.
translations.chinese: 杀完之后，我还有最后一份契约给你。我还在敲定一些细节。

translations.english: Your targets are a dark elf wizard named Maluril, in the dwarven ruin of Mzinchaleft. And Helvard, the housecarl of Falkreath.
translations.chinese: 你的目标，一个是矮人遗迹姆津查莱夫特里的暗精灵巫师玛鲁利尔。还有佛克瑞斯的侍卫黑尔沃德。

translations.english: Are there any more contracts available?

translations.chinese: 我必须对消息来源保密以保护他们。但我可以保证，内容绝对真实可靠。

translations.english: Bah. My organization's been having a run of bad luck, but I suppose that's just how it goes.
translations.chinese: 哎。我的组织最近运气不大好，但我想情况就是这样。

translations.english: But never mind that, even though you fouled up the job I still think you've got that spark I'm looking for.
translations.chinese: 不过没关系，就算你把工作搞砸了，我还是觉得你有我想要的那种激情。

translations.english: You and me, we're the only people around who aren't complete fools.
translations.chinese: 你和我，咱俩是这附近唯二不是傻瓜的人了。

translations.english: Meet me then if you've still got the stomach for it.
translations.chinese: 有想法的话就来找我吧。

translations.english: There's someone that wants to see him put out of business permanently. That's all you need to know.
translations.chinese: 有人想让他永远做不成生意。你知道这些就够了。

translations.english: I'll be out in the market all day, from eight in the morning until eight in the evening.
translations.chinese: 我每天都会在市场上，早八点到晚八点。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020BD9]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: There's someone that wants to see him put out of business permanently. That's all you need to know. | ZH: 有人想让他永远做不成生意。你知道这些就够了。 | SID: 00847D
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I'll be out in the market all day, from eight in the morning until eight in the evening. | ZH: 我每天都会在市场上，早八点到晚八点。 | SID: 00F343

translations.english: Damn. I knew I shouldn't have waited.
translations.chinese: 该死。我就知道不该犹豫。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020BDA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Damn. I knew I shouldn't have waited. | ZH: 该死。我就知道不该犹豫。 | SID: 00DA0C

translations.english: But you must be anxious to get to work. I'm arranging a job, but need a bit more time. For now, go see Nazir. He's got several smaller contracts.
translations.chinese: 但你一定急于投入工作吧。我正在安排，需要些时间。现在去找纳兹尔吧。他手里有几个小契约。

translations.english: Our Family, my dearest. Our Family. Together, united as one, the Dark Brotherhood can accomplish anything.
translations.chinese: 是我们的家庭了，亲爱的。我们的家。团结一致，黑暗兄弟会就能所向披靡。

translations.english: Ah, but one last thing. A welcome home present. The armor of the Dark Brotherhood. May it serve you well in all your... endeavors.
translations.chinese: 啊，最后一件事。回家礼物。黑暗兄弟会的护甲。愿它陪伴你的……努力。

translations.english: Soon, the Night Mother will arrive. And things around here are sure to get even more interesting.
translations.chinese: 夜母快要到了。这里的事情一定会变得更加有趣的。

translations.english: I am honored to be a part of your Family, Astrid.
translations.chinese: 我很荣幸能加入你的家庭，阿斯垂德。

translations.english: I'm arranging a job for you, but I need some more time. For now, go talk to Nazir. He may have some smaller contracts to tide you over.
translations.chinese: 我正在为你准备工作，但还需要些时间。现在先去找纳兹尔谈谈吧。他那里有些小契约可以帮你适应适应。

translations.english: Soon, the Night Mother will arrive. And things around here are sure to get even more interesting.
translations.chinese: 夜母快要到了。这里的事情一定会变得更加有趣的。

translations.english: Soon, my dearest. Soon.
Ah, but one last thing. A welcome home present. The armor of the Dark Brotherhood. May it serve you well in all your... endeavors.
translations.chinese: 啊，最后一件事。回家礼物。黑暗兄弟会的护甲。愿它陪伴你的……努力。

translations.english: When do I get to kill someone?

- INFO:RNAM | EN: When do I get to kill someone? | ZH: 我什么时候能去杀人？ | SID: 0045D2

translations.english: Ah, but one last thing. A welcome home present. The armor of the Dark Brotherhood. May it serve you well in all your... endeavors.
translations.chinese: 啊，最后一件事。回家礼物。黑暗兄弟会的护甲。愿它陪伴你的……努力。

translations.english: Hmm... Yes, the silence suits you. Gives you an air of mystery.
translations.chinese: 嗯……沉默和你很搭。给你增添了一股神秘感。

translations.english: Soon, the Night Mother will arrive. And things around here are sure to get even more interesting.
translations.chinese: 夜母快要到了。这里的事情一定会变得更加有趣的。

translations.english: Now, down to business. I'm arranging a job for you. But in the meantime, go talk to Nazir. He may have some smaller contracts to tide you over.
translations.chinese: 现在，说正题。我要给你准备一份工作。这段时间，就去找纳兹尔谈谈吧。他或许会有一些小契约可以让你适应适应。

translations.english: (Remain silent)

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Now, down to business. I'm arranging a job for you. But in the meantime, go talk to Nazir. He may have some smaller contracts to tide you over. | ZH: 现在，说正题。我要给你准备一份工作。这段时间，就去找纳兹尔谈谈吧。他或许会有一些小契约可以让你适应适应。 | SID: 00E4EE

translations.english: Then you know where we stand. Make your kill, and we're square. Repayment of your debt is but a discreet knife thrust away.
translations.chinese: 那你应该知道我们的立场。把人杀了，我们就扯平了。只需要小心翼翼地把刀捅进去，你的债就还清了。

translations.english: Am I to take your silence as acceptance?
translations.chinese: 我可以把你的沉默当做同意吗？

translations.english: (Remain silent)

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020BE0]
Translations:

translations.english: Well, get to it then. Pick your guest, and send the poor fool to the Void. I'll give you the key to this shack, and you'll be on your way.
translations.chinese: 好了，那就开始吧。选一个客人，把那个可怜的傻瓜送到虚空去。我就把小屋的钥匙给你，然后你就能离开了。

translations.english: See, I knew we could resolve this civilly. A debt owed must be repaid. You understand that.
translations.chinese: 我就知道我们能用文明的方式解决问题。欠债还债，理解理解。

translations.english: All right, I'll do it. I'll kill one of them.
translations.chinese: 好吧，我去做。我会杀了他们之一的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00020BE1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Well, get to it then. Pick your guest, and send the poor fool to the Void. I'll give you the key to this shack, and you'll be on your way. | ZH: 好了，那就开始吧。选一个客人，把那个可怜的傻瓜送到虚空去。我就把小屋的钥匙给你，然后你就能离开了。 | SID: 00155B

translations.english: Now that is a shame.
Now it's time to face the consequences of your actions. You don't leave this shack until someone dies.
translations.chinese: 现在是时候为自己的行为买单了。除非有人死，否则你是离不开这个小屋的。

translations.english: But what you fail to realize is that you involved yourself in this "insanity" when you took Grelod's life. You made your choice.
translations.chinese: 但你没意识到吗，你杀了桂罗的时候就已经卷进“疯狂”中了。你已经选了这条路。

translations.english: I'll have no part of this insanity.
translations.chinese: 我不会参与这种疯狂之举的。

agentText:

translations.english: This isn't over.
You hear me you old fool! This isn't over!
translations.chinese: 听见了吗，老匹夫！还没结束！

translations.english: I went to Windhelm to see the Shatter-Shields. They were old and dear friends, and... in mourning. Friga was killed recently. Murdered...
translations.chinese: 我去风舵城看望碎盾一家。他们和我是亲密无间的老朋友，而且……正沉浸在悲哀中。弗丽嘉最近遇害了。谋杀……

translations.english: Alain used me to get close to my friends. And now they all think I'm some kind of... monster. Alain Dufont took my life. And now I'm taking his.
translations.chinese: 阿兰利用我去接近我的朋友。现在他们都觉得我是……怪物。阿兰·杜峰特毁了我的人生。现在我也要毁了他。

translations.english: Alain made all the pain just... go away. But it was all lies! Alain used me. He ruined my name, destroyed my friendship with the Shatter-Shields...
translations.chinese: 阿兰让我所有的痛苦都……消失了。但这都是谎言！他利用了我，毁了我的名声，也毁了我和碎盾家的友谊……

translations.english: Do you know why Alain was in Windhelm? He heard about Friga's murder. He wanted to befriend the family, in their grief... and rob them blind.
translations.chinese: 知道阿兰为什么出现在风舵吗？他听说弗丽嘉遇害了，想趁着他们一家悲伤不已的时候，把他们洗劫一空。

translations.english: I met Alain in the tavern, while I was... drinking my sadness away. He was handsome, and charming. He said I was the "beautiful lily" of his dreams.
translations.chinese: 我在酒馆里遇到了阿兰，当时我在……借酒浇愁。他长得很英俊，也很有魅力。他说我就是他的梦中情人。

translations.english: Tell me the full story. Why do you want Alain dead?
translations.chinese: 告诉我来龙去脉。你为什么要杀阿兰？

translations.english: Now, I need your assistance with a matter of a more... personal nature.
translations.chinese: 我现在需要你帮我，处理一件更加……私密的事。

translations.english: Of course, dear. Of course. And, from what my little ravens tell me, you handled yourself quite well.
translations.chinese: 当然，亲爱的。当然。我的小乌鸦告诉我你处理得很好。

translations.english: Excellent. Once Alain is dead, I'll pay you. In gold. I've saved up a bit. I hope that'll do.
translations.chinese: 太好了。等阿兰一死，就给你报酬。用金币。我存了些钱，但愿足够。

translations.chinese: 我会教你们使用结界术，看看你们能否成功用它来阻挡魔法，好吗？

translations.english: In continuing with our theme of safety, we'll start with Wards. Wards are protective spells that block magic.
translations.chinese: 为了继续我们的安全主题，就先从学习结界术开始吧。结界术是用来阻挡魔法的保护性咒语。

translations.english: Keerava has some family at a farm just inside of Morrowind. If you mention you know about it, she might just listen to you.

translations.chinese: 听着，我告诉你这些只是因为我在乎她。不要误以为这是接受了你的所作所为。

translations.english: Just please, don't harm anyone. I couldn't bear the thought.

translations.english: Good, and take this little message back to your bosses.
translations.chinese: 很好，那就给你的老板们捎个信。

translations.english: I'm not paying any of you a single septim... ever! Now get out of my inn!

translations.english: She's as stubborn as she is beautiful, isn't she? Glad you found a way to get her to pay.
translations.chinese: 她既漂亮又固执是吧？很高兴你找到办法让她付钱了。

translations.english: Here's Keerava's payment, courtesy of her family.
translations.chinese: 这是基拉瓦的欠款，可得谢谢她的家人了。

translations.chinese: 前几天她还帮我倒过酒……但我确实和她不太熟。

translations.english: Another girl killed. This is Susanna, from Candlehearth Hall.
translations.chinese: 又一个女孩儿被杀了。是烛炉堂的苏珊娜。

translations.english: Was I correct in hearing that you were traveling to the grove of the Eldergleam?

translations.english: Sorry. I thought I saw a fellow running away, but didn't get a good look at him.
translations.chinese: 抱歉。我可能看见有个家伙跑开了，但没看清是谁。

translations.english: Please, I need your help and there isn't anyone I can trust here in the city.
translations.chinese: 拜托，我需要你的帮助，城里没有我可以信任的人。

translations.english: You can't tell them!

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I need you to root them out and drive them away before they find me and drag me back to Hammerfell for an execution.
translations.chinese: 我需要你把他们都揪出来，在我被拖回落锤处死之前把他们都赶走。

translations.english: I am not the person that the people of Whiterun think I am. My real name is Iman. I am a noble of House Suda in Hammerfell.
translations.chinese: 我其实不是白漫人以为的那种人。真名伊曼。是落锤苏达家族的贵族。

translations.english: The men who are looking for me, the Alik'r, they are assassins in the employ of the Aldmeri Dominion. They wish to exchange my blood for gold.
translations.chinese: 那些在找我的阿里克'尔，他们是先祖神洲雇佣的刺客。他们想拿我的命换钱。

translations.english: Oh no! They've found me? I need your help!
translations.chinese: 哦不！他们已经找到我了？我需要你的帮助！

translations.english: Please, come with me. I need to speak to you privately.
translations.chinese: 拜托，请跟我来。我要和你单独谈谈。

translations.english: Are you sure?

Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Are you sure? | ZH: 你确定？ | SID: 00A42C

translations.english: There will be. Of that, you can be assured.
translations.chinese: 会有的。这点你大可放心。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000215B2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There will be. Of that, you can be assured. | ZH: 会有的。这点你大可放心。 | SID: 00490B

translations.english: We're looking for a fugitive who comes from Hammerfell. A Redguard woman. She may be somewhere in this city.
translations.chinese: 我们在找一个从落锤过来的逃犯，是个红卫女人。她可能就藏在这个城市的某个地方。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000215B4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We're looking for a fugitive who comes from Hammerfell. A Redguard woman. She may be somewhere in this city. | ZH: 我们在找一个从落锤过来的逃犯，是个红卫女人。她可能就藏在这个城市的某个地方。 | SID: 00818E

translations.english: No doubt she's convinced you that she's the victim. But, do you know why we pursue her?
translations.chinese: 毫无疑问的是，她让你确信了她就是个受害者。但是，你知道我们为什么要追她吗？

translations.english: Did she appeal to your sense of honor? Your greed? A more... base need, perhaps? It doesn't matter.
translations.chinese: 她唤起了你的荣誉感？贪婪？或者是更……基本的需求？无所谓。

translations.english: Of course, sent by... what is it that she's calling herself these days? Shazra? Saadia? One of those, correct?
translations.chinese: 当然，被……那谁派来的，这几天她叫什么了？沙扎拉？还是萨蒂亚？反正就是其中之一对吧？

translations.english: No. There are too many people around. Come with me.
translations.chinese: 不。周围人太多了。跟我来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000215B8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No. There are too many people around. Come with me. | ZH: 不。周围人太多了。跟我来。 | SID: 0054CB

translations.english: So the Alik'r know where I am? What did they offer you? Gold? How many more of them are coming?
translations.chinese: 所以阿里克'尔知道我在哪儿了？他们给了你什么好处？金币？他们还有多少人要来？

translations.english: Tell me!

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000215B9]

translations.english: We are not welcome here in Whiterun, so we will be in Rorikstead if you learn anything.
translations.chinese: 白漫不欢迎我们，所以如果你有什么发现，就到洛利克镇找我们吧。

translations.english: She is likely not using her true name. We will pay for any information regarding her location.
translations.chinese: 她用的可能不是真名。任何有关她的消息，我们都会付钱。

translations.english: A woman -- a foreigner in these lands. Redguard, like us.
translations.chinese: 一个异邦女人。和我们一样的红卫人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000215BD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: We are not welcome here in Whiterun, so we will be in Rorikstead if you learn anything. | ZH: 白漫不欢迎我们，所以如果你有什么发现，就到洛利克镇找我们吧。 | SID: 00A4ED
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: She is likely not using her true name. We will pay for any information regarding her location. | ZH: 她用的可能不是真名。任何有关她的消息，我们都会付钱。 | SID: 00F022
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: A woman -- a foreigner in these lands. Redguard, like us. | ZH: 一个异邦女人。和我们一样的红卫人。 | SID: 00FCA9

translations.english: You have a death wish, then? If you know that name, you must know to meet him would be to meet your end.
translations.chinese: 你就那么想找死吗？你既然知道他的名字，就该明白你俩一碰面就能要了你的命。

translations.english: But it seems we both have needs, friend. Perhaps we can help each other out.
translations.chinese: 但看起来我们都有所需，朋友。也许我们可以互相帮助。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: You buy my way out of here, and I'll tell you what you want to know.
translations.chinese: 你帮我保释出去，我就告诉你你想知道的。

translations.english: Let's talk about how we can help each other.
translations.chinese: 我们来谈谈如何互帮互助吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000215BF]
Translations:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Let's talk about how we can help each other. | ZH: 我们来谈谈如何互帮互助吧。 | SID: 001365

translations.english: 100 gold will secure my release. You can afford that, can't you?
translations.chinese: 100金币就能放我走了。你肯定出得起，对吧？

translations.english: I suppose you'd better hope you can, if you want the information.
translations.chinese: 我想你最好是能出得起，如果你想知道消息的话。

translations.english: Get the money into the hands of one of these guards, and I'll tell you what you want to know.
translations.chinese: 把钱交给卫兵，我就告诉你你想知道的事。

translations.english: Kematu is west of Whiterun. It's an unassuming little cave called Swindler's Den.
translations.chinese: 凯马图在白漫城以西。很不起眼的小洞穴，叫骗子老巢。

translations.english: But that's your problem, not mine.
translations.chinese: 但这是你的问题，与我无关了。

translations.english: Very well.
You realize if you set foot in there, you're never coming back out. They'll kill you.
translations.chinese: 你得想清楚，一旦踏进去，可就出不来了。他们会杀了你的。

translations.english: Your fine's been paid. Now tell me about Kematu.
translations.chinese: 你的罚款已经交完了。现在该跟我说说凯马图了。

translations.chinese: 我的人已经筋疲力尽了。如果你想帮忙，我很高兴。卫兵会在必要时协助你的。

There is a letter, one I have had for some time now. I think it is time it gets delivered.

translations.english: Well, I'll take it under advisement. Thank you.
translations.chinese: 好了，我会考虑的。谢谢你。

translations.english: Now, what's he's asking, it's just impossible. Even if it worked, the questions and accusations it would cause...
translations.chinese: 现在，他问的事情根本不可能。就算成功也会引起质疑和指责……

translations.english: The last time we'd discussed this issue was before this damnable war broke out. Things were different then.
translations.chinese: 上次我们讨论这个问题还是在这场该死的战争爆发之前。当时情况不同。

translations.english: Balimund pulled me out of Grelod's orphanage when I was just a child. I don't know what he saw in me, but I was glad to get out of there.

translations.english: I've spent years watching his techniques and learning his tricks. Sadly, I don't think I'll ever be as talented as he was.
translations.chinese: 多年来我一直在观察学习他的技巧。可惜我永远也不会有他那样的天赋。

translations.english: I was apprenticed to Balimund before he died. He taught me everything I know about forging armor and weapons.

translations.english: I ended up selling that ship to open this place. Seemed only fitting to name it after her. Well, changed it a bit I suppose.

translations.english: In my youth I was a fisherman... I had a beautiful ship named "The Brawny Prawn." But the years have a way of creeping up on you.
translations.chinese: 我年轻的时候是个渔夫……我有一艘漂亮的船，叫做“强壮大虾”。但岁月不饶人啊。

translations.english: If I had been smarter, I would have kept my boat. Coming to this city was a big mistake.
translations.chinese: 如果我再聪明点，我就会留下我的船。来这座城市就是个重大错误。

translations.english: So you meet me at Fallowstone Cave, and we'll get this over with. I can have my tribe back, and you can... You can leave us alone.
translations.chinese: 所以到休石洞穴和我会合，一起把这件事搞定。我就能夺回我的部落，而你……你也就能离我们远点了。

translations.english: You're going to clear a path to the giant, so I can conserve my strength. I'll make sure you're paid for it.
translations.chinese: 你要扫清通往巨人处的道路，这样我就能保存实力了。我保证会付钱给你。

translations.english: I didn't say I wouldn't fight the giant. I just said you're going to help me get to it.
translations.chinese: 我会跟巨人战斗，但你得帮我找到它。

translations.english: Meet me outside Fallowstone Cave. You clear the way to the giant for me, and I'll make sure you get paid for it.
translations.chinese: 在休石洞穴外和我碰头。你帮我扫清前往巨人那里的道路，我保证酬谢你。

translations.english: She... she said that? She said those words... to you? "Darkness rises when silence dies"?
translations.chinese: 她……这么说的？她对你说了这些话？“沉寂消亡之时，便是黑暗崛起之日”？

translations.english: But those are the words. The Binding Words. Written in the Keeping Tomes. The signal so I would know. Mother's only way of talking to sweet Cicero...
translations.chinese: 但这些话，是束缚之语。写在《守护之典》里。只有我知道。那是母亲和西塞罗交谈的唯一方式……

translations.english: Then... it is true! She is back! Our Lady is back! She has chosen a Listener! She has chosen you! Ha ha ha! All hail the Listener!
translations.chinese: 那……是真的！她回来了！我们的母亲回来了！她选择了新的聆听者！她选中了你！哈哈哈！聆听者万岁！

translations.english: Wait! She said to tell you, "Darkness rises when silence dies."
translations.chinese: 等等！她说让我告诉你“沉寂消亡之时，便是黑暗崛起之日”。

translations.english: I ain't afraid of the old hag. Still, I wish Constance was in charge. She treats us real good.
translations.chinese: 我才不怕那个老妖婆呢。但我还是希望康斯坦斯能管理这里，她对我们真的很好。

translations.english: I'm a growing boy. I need as much food as I can get.
translations.chinese: 我还在成长啊。我需要更多一点吃的东西。

translations.english: Constance, sometimes she gives me little snacks. Which is good, 'cause we only get but one meal. Late, too, in the afternoon.
translations.chinese: 康斯坦斯有时候会拿些零食给我们。这很好，因为我们一天只能吃一顿饭。还是在下午，太晚了。

translations.english: Like I said. Hagraven.
translations.chinese: 样子就像我说的，乌鸦鬼婆。

translations.english: Miss Grelod is... well she's a terrible old crone. No person could be that cruel. I think she's part hagraven.
translations.chinese: 桂罗……是个可怕的老太婆。从没见过这么残忍的人。我觉得她就是个乌鸦鬼婆。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I'd hoped we could work something out, that you would see reason. | ZH: 我本希望能跟你讲清楚道理。 | SID: 00D1B6

translations.english: It will be good to finally be able to return home.
translations.chinese: 终于可以回家了，真是太好了。

translations.english: Good. We'll be waiting for you at the stables.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00022E84]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Good. We'll be waiting for you at the stables. | ZH: 好。我们在马厩等你。 | SID: 00E780

translations.english: Good. Wipe them out. So long as one of them is left alive, they will come for me!
translations.chinese: 好。消灭他们。但凡有一个活口，他们也会来找我的！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00022E87]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. Wipe them out. So long as one of them is left alive, they will come for me! | ZH: 好。消灭他们。但凡有一个活口，他们也会来找我的！ | SID: 003E47

translations.english: Molag Bal. You think you can best Boethiah's faithful? I have won this contest before!
translations.chinese: 莫拉格·巴尔。你觉得能打倒伟大波耶西亚的忠实信徒吗？这场比赛我早就赢了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00022EE3]
Translations:

translations.english: Ah. But I have my own champion this time, Logrolf.
translations.chinese: 啊。但我这次有自己的勇士了，罗格洛夫。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00022EE8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah. But I have my own champion this time, Logrolf. | ZH: 啊。但我这次有自己的勇士了，罗格洛夫。 | SID: 00C242

translations.english: What? You!

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00022EE9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What? You! | ZH: 什么？是你！ | SID: 00DE6F

translations.english: No more.... No more.... I submit, Molag Bal. I submit!
translations.chinese: 别……别再……我投降，莫拉格·巴尔。我服了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00022EEB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No more.... No more.... I submit, Molag Bal. I submit! | ZH: 别……别再……我投降，莫拉格·巴尔。我服了！ | SID: 0005CA

translations.english: Mortal. I give you my mace, in all its rusted spitefulness.
translations.chinese: 凡人，拿着我因生锈而充满恶意的钉锤。

translations.english: Crush the spirit from Logrolf's bones. Make him bend to me.
translations.chinese: 把罗格洛夫的精魂从骨头里榨出来。让他屈服于我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00022EED]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Crush the spirit from Logrolf's bones. Make him bend to me. | ZH: 把罗格洛夫的精魂从骨头里榨出来。让他屈服于我。 | SID: 00E5C8

translations.english: Very little. You have my word on that. The Night Mother represents a chapter in the Dark Brotherhood's history that has long since been closed.
translations.chinese: 非常小。我保证。夜母代表黑暗兄弟会历史上早已终结的一章。

translations.english: My only worry is her "Keeper." I'm not sure what Cicero expects to gain by bringing the Night Mother here, but he'll soon learn this is my Sanctuary.
translations.chinese: 我唯一担心的就是她的“守护者”。我不知道西塞罗把夜母带来是想得到什么，但他很快就会知道，这里是我的圣所。

translations.english: Today we live by our own rules. We're the last Sanctuary in all of Tamriel, and only by forgoing the old ways have we survived for so long.
translations.chinese: 我们现在按照自己的规则生活着。咱们这里已经是泰姆瑞尔最后的圣所了，正是因为摒弃传统方式，我们才存活了这么久。

translations.english: What will change, now that the Night Mother is here?
translations.chinese: 现在夜母来了，会有什么改变吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00022F30]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Very little. You have my word on that. The Night Mother represents a chapter in the Dark Brotherhood's history that has long since been closed. | ZH: 非常小。我保证。夜母代表黑暗兄弟会历史上早已终结的一章。 | SID: 000088
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: My only worry is her "Keeper." I'm not sure what Cicero expects to gain by bringing the Night Mother here, but he'll soon learn this is my Sanctuary. | ZH: 我唯一担心的就是她的“守护者”。我不知道西塞罗把夜母带来是想得到什么，但他很快就会知道，这里是我的圣所。 | SID: 00156C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Today we live by our own rules. We're the last Sanctuary in all of Tamriel, and only by forgoing the old ways have we survived for so long. | ZH: 我们现在按照自己的规则生活着。咱们这里已经是泰姆瑞尔最后的圣所了，正是因为摒弃传统方式，我们才存活了这么久。 | SID: 006563
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What will change, now that the Night Mother is here? | ZH: 现在夜母来了，会有什么改变吗？ | SID: 00CA59

translations.english: Bottom line - respect your Family. Do that, and everything else will fall into place.
translations.chinese: 底线就是，尊重你的家人。做到这一点，其他自然水到渠成。

translations.english: Used to be the Dark Brotherhood was bound by Five Tenets, but we stopped following those years ago.
translations.chinese: 过去黑暗兄弟会有五大信条，但我们已经摒弃多年了。

translations.english: All those rules, all that discipline, and look where the Dark Brotherhood ended up. We're the last of our kind, and we live the way we see fit.
translations.chinese: 看看吧，遵循这些规矩、律条，黑暗兄弟会是什么下场。我们已经是仅存的了，所以只按自己觉得合适的方式生活。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00022F31]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Bottom line - respect your Family. Do that, and everything else will fall into place. | ZH: 底线就是，尊重你的家人。做到这一点，其他自然水到渠成。 | SID: 003A27
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Used to be the Dark Brotherhood was bound by Five Tenets, but we stopped following those years ago. | ZH: 过去黑暗兄弟会有五大信条，但我们已经摒弃多年了。 | SID: 00AF3C

translations.english: Today, she's... well, she's a skeleton. An ancient corpse. But, more importantly, a corpse that's being brought to this Sanctuary by her Keeper.
translations.chinese: 现如今，她是……呃，一具骷髅。一个老尸。但更重要的是，这具尸体被她的守护者带到了这个圣所。

translations.english: Ages past, Sithis gave a woman five children. She killed them to win his favor, thus becoming the Night Mother. If you believe that sort of thing.
translations.chinese: 很久以前，西帝斯给了一个女人五个孩子。为了博得他的青睐，女人杀死了孩子们，从而成为夜母。前提是你相信这种故事。

translations.english: The Unholy Matron, the Shrouded Lady, the Mistress of the Void. She goes by many names.
translations.chinese: 不洁主母、隐蔽女士、虚空夫人。名号很多。

translations.english: Who is the Night Mother?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00022F32]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Today, she's... well, she's a skeleton. An ancient corpse. But, more importantly, a corpse that's being brought to this Sanctuary by her Keeper. | ZH: 现如今，她是……呃，一具骷髅。一个老尸。但更重要的是，这具尸体被她的守护者带到了这个圣所。 | SID: 0001D7
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Ages past, Sithis gave a woman five children. She killed them to win his favor, thus becoming the Night Mother. If you believe that sort of thing. | ZH: 很久以前，西帝斯给了一个女人五个孩子。为了博得他的青睐，女人杀死了孩子们，从而成为夜母。前提是你相信这种故事。 | SID: 002CD5
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: The Unholy Matron, the Shrouded Lady, the Mistress of the Void. She goes by many names. | ZH: 不洁主母、隐蔽女士、虚空夫人。名号很多。 | SID: 00B5E6
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Who is the Night Mother? | ZH: 夜母是谁？ | SID: 009E94

translations.english: They used to come from the Night Mother. Potential clients would perform the Black Sacrament, and she would hear their prayers.
translations.chinese: 通常都是来自夜母。潜在的客户会执行黑色圣礼，夜母能够听到他们的祈祷。

translations.english: But people don't know that. So they still perform the ritual... and we eventually hear about it. When someone wants us, we find out.
translations.chinese: 但人们并不知道。所以他们依旧会举行仪式……最后早晚会传到我们的耳朵里。只要有人需要，我们就会去联络。

translations.english: The Night Mother would communicate this to the Listener, who would then dispatch a Speaker to arrange the contract with the client.
translations.chinese: 夜母会联络聆听者。聆听者会派遣发言者去安排与客户接洽契约。

translations.english: But that was a long time ago. There hasn't been a Listener in years, not since Cyrodiil was overrun in the war with the Thalmor.
translations.chinese: 但那都是很久前的事了。自从希罗帝尔在对抗梭默的战争中被占领之后，已经很多年没有聆听者了。

translations.english: Where do the contracts come from?
translations.chinese: 这些契约都是从何而来？

translations.english: In the southwest reaches of Skyrim, in the Pine Forest, you'll find the entrance to our Sanctuary. It's just beneath the road, hidden from view.
translations.chinese: 在天际西南部有个松林，我们圣所的入口就在路下面隐藏着。

translations.english: Of course. And you've repaid your debt, in full. Here's the key to the shack. But why stop here? I say we take our relationship to the next level.
translations.chinese: 当然。你已经还清了债。这是钥匙。但是就止步于此吗？我觉得咱们的关系应该更进一步。

translations.english: I would like to officially extend to you an invitation to join my Family. The Dark Brotherhood.
translations.chinese: 我想正式邀请你加入我的家庭。黑暗兄弟会。

translations.english: I'll see you at home.
When questioned by the Black Door, answer with the correct passphrase: "Silence, my brother." Then you're in. And your new life begins.
translations.chinese: 当被黑门询问时，要用正确的密语回答：“是沉寂，我的兄弟。”然后，你就能进去了。就此开始新生。

translations.english: So... I'm free to go?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [4/4] | EN: I'll see you at home. | ZH: 我们家里再见。 | SID: 00B577

- INFO:RNAM | EN: So... I'm free to go? | ZH: 那……我能走了吗？ | SID: 0089A9

translations.english: The Night Mother's crypt, in Bravil, was destroyed. A result of the chaos caused by the war with the Thalmor. That forced a relocation.
translations.chinese: 梭默战争引发的混乱导致布拉维尔的夜母墓穴遭到了破坏。他们被迫迁移了。

translations.english: Yes. A few months ago I received word from the Night Mother's Keeper that he had arrived in Skyrim from Cyrodiil.
translations.chinese: 没错，几个月前我收到了夜母守护者的消息，他从希罗帝尔启程来到了天际。

translations.english: I don't know where the Keeper has been these past few months, but I recently received another letter. He's bringing the Night Mother here. Soon.
translations.chinese: 我不知道这几个月守护者到哪里去了，但我最近又收到一封信。他把夜母带来了。很快就到。

translations.english: The Sanctuary is in the southern Pine Forest. Close to the road, but away from prying eyes.
translations.chinese: 圣所就在南部的松林里。离大路不远，但不太容易被窥探到。

translations.english: Have you talked to Nazir? He's sure to have some additional contracts for you.
translations.chinese: 和纳兹尔谈过了？他肯定有额外的契约要给你。

translations.english: That twisted jester will pay for what's he's done...
translations.chinese: 那个扭曲的小丑要为他的所作所为付出代价……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: No! Roggi and Kjeld need some more support timbers for the mine.
translations.chinese: 不是！罗吉和克耶尔德需要更多木材来支撑矿场。

translations.english: Papa, mama's making me do kitchen work again.
translations.chinese: 爸，妈又让我去厨房干活。

translations.english: What about Ulfric? Did you ever hear back from him?
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克怎么样了？有他的消息吗？

EDID: [00022F97]

translations.english: Oh dear, I hadn't thought of that.
translations.chinese: 啊对啊，我怎么没想到呢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00022F98]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh dear, I hadn't thought of that. | ZH: 啊对啊，我怎么没想到呢。 | SID: 00D6CA

translations.english: I don't know what your aunts told you, but...
translations.chinese: 我不知道你姑姑们和你说了些什么，但……

translations.chinese: 嗯，那就是另一回事儿了……

agentText:

EDID: [00022F9A]

translations.english: No, I don't need to mark it. I remember it.
translations.chinese: 没有，我不需要标记。我能记得住。

agentText:

translations.english: Lore holds that the Skull of Corruption holds a constant hunger for the memories of others.
translations.chinese: 传说堕落头骨对他人的记忆有着永恒的渴望。

translations.english: What it does with these memories is just conjecture and an argument for scholars and historians to this very day.
translations.chinese: 至于它拿这些记忆做什么，目前学界还在争论猜测。

translations.english: With the Emperor's arrival in Skyrim now a certainty, his security service, the Penitus Oculatus, will need to begin its preparations immediately.
translations.chinese: 随着皇帝确定要抵达天际，他的护卫，洞察眼，也会立刻开始准备工作。

translations.english: Security is being handled by a Commander Maro. Astrid and I have devised a plan to break the man, and in doing so, cripple the Emperor's protection.
translations.chinese: 安保工作由马洛指挥官负责。阿斯垂德和我想出了一个计划来击垮此人，借此削弱皇帝的保护。

translations.english: You are to slay the commander's son, Gaius Maro, and once he is dead, plant false evidence on his body implicating him in a plot to kill the Emperor.
translations.chinese: 你需要杀了指挥官的儿子加留斯·马洛。他死了之后，在他尸体上放上栽赃假证，诬陷他参与刺杀皇帝的阴谋。

translations.english: He seeks information about the Eye, but what he will find shall be quite different.
translations.chinese: 他在寻找关于“眼”的情报，但他将会发现完全不同的东西。

translations.english: His path will cross yours in time, but first you must find that which you need.
translations.chinese: 他的道路会与你相交，但你必须先找到你需要的东西。

translations.english: The one who calls himself Ancano.

translations.english: Your path differs from most. You are being guided, pushed towards something.
translations.chinese: 你的道路异于大多数人。你在被引导着推向某些事物。

translations.english: No, though you may be the last. The one who calls himself Ancano has sought my knowledge as well, through very different questions.
translations.chinese: 不是第一个，但有可能是最后一个。那个自称安卡诺的人也想通过不同的问题来寻求我的知识。

translations.english: It is a good path, one untraveled by many. It is a path that can save your College. I will tell you what you need to know to follow it further.
translations.chinese: 这是一条无人走过的好路，也是一条能够拯救你们学院的道路。我会告诉你需要知道的东西，以便继续前进。

translations.english: To see through Magnus' Eye without being blinded, you require his staff.
translations.chinese: 想要看穿玛格努斯之眼而不被蒙蔽，你需要他的法杖。

translations.english: Events now spiral quickly towards the inevitable center, so you must act with haste. Take this knowledge to your Arch-Mage.
translations.chinese: 现在，事件已经迅速被卷进不可避免的中心，所以你必须尽快行动。把这些消息告诉你们的大法师。

translations.english: You, and those aiding you, wish to know more about the Eye of Magnus. You wish to avoid the disaster of which you are not yet aware.
translations.chinese: 你，还有那些帮助你的人，都想更加深入地了解玛格努斯之眼。你希望避免你还未知的灾难。

translations.chinese: 不是弃誓者想袭击我的城镇，就是诺德人想把我逼走。

translations.chinese: 你在……威胁我？走开，蠢蛋。别来烦我。

translations.english: Only cowards hunt animals. True game walks on two legs.
translations.chinese: 只有懦夫才会去捕食动物。真正的猎物都是两条腿的。

translations.chinese: 这么说兄弟会来找老赫恩了？那我们就开诚布公吧。

translations.english: Assassin versus vampire. A fight for the ages.
translations.chinese: 刺客对吸血鬼。一场好斗。

translations.chinese: 几个月前她和丈夫分居了。现在两家矿场正在竞争。贝提尤德又气又绝望。真是个斗士啊。

translations.chinese: 那你就别想活着离开了！

translations.english: I know what you are, nightspawn.
translations.chinese: 我知道你是什么，暗夜之子。

translations.chinese: 一个阿尔贡流浪者，喜欢搜寻沉船残骸。我猜，他要是受到威胁可能会水遁而走。

translations.chinese: 别忘了她还有船员，个个忠诚又嗜杀。

translations.english: Ah, yes. The pirate captain. A ruthless she-devil, by all accounts. Deadly with a blade.
translations.chinese: 啊，没错。海盗船长。人人都说她是个杀人不眨眼的女魔头，刀刀致命啊。

translations.english: This is my final contract, and certainly the most challenging. Be careful with this one, my friend.
translations.chinese: 这是我这里最后一份契约，当然，挑战性也最大。小心点，朋友。

translations.chinese: 佛克瑞斯的侍卫。知道意味着什么吗？他会贴身保护领主。所以小心点。

translations.english: I represent the Dark Brotherhood. Your death is at hand!
translations.chinese: 我代表黑暗兄弟会。你的死期到了！

translations.chinese: 他是个住在伊瓦尔镇外废墟里的倒霉乞丐。就算是你也能对付。

translations.chinese: 阴影在蠕动，然后……然后幻影飞跃！一个人开始……他开始害怕。恶魔们竟然！嗯……造访了他们所惧怕的一切！

translations.english: Hmm... All right... How about this?
Brilliant, I know. It's a gift.
translations.chinese: 我知道，很完美。算是礼物吧。

translations.english: Sing me a song, bard. A song of fear, and death!
translations.chinese: 诗人，给我唱首歌吧。一首恐惧与死亡之歌！

translations.english: Just not by you.

translations.english: Sleep? I can't sleep now! There's too much to be done. And what's this Void you're rambling on about?
translations.chinese: 睡觉吗？我现在可睡不着！要做的事太多了。你说的虚空是什么意思？

translations.english: Sleep now, old woman. Embrace the Void.
translations.chinese: 沉睡吧，老太太。拥抱虚空。

translations.english: Ha! Oh, that's a good one, friend. Killing Lurbuk... I mean, can you even imagine something so ludicrous? Depriving the world of my unique talents?
translations.chinese: 哈！哦，这话很不错，朋友。杀死卢布克……你能想象出这有多好笑吗？难不成有人嫉妒我独一无二的才华吗？

translations.english: Someone hired the Dark Brotherhood to kill you, Lurbuk.
translations.chinese: 某人雇了黑暗兄弟会来杀你，卢布克。

translations.chinese: 但是我还有很多房间要打扫。灰色荒原堡很大，而且很脏。

translations.english: You've cleaned your last room, servant.
translations.chinese: 仆人，这是你打扫的最后房间了。

What? What do you mean?
You were right to be paranoid, Ennodius.

translations.chinese: 你……你有什么需要吗？听着，如果你不说话，也不愿意施舍给我点钱，那就走开吧……

translations.english: (Remain silent)

Beg! Beg for your miserable life!
translations.chinese: 乞求吧！乞求你那悲惨的人生吧！

translations.english: Well now, you are a strange one. You remind me a bit of myself, when I'm stalking a deer. I'm not quite sure how I feel about that...
translations.chinese: 哎呀，你可真是个怪人。你让我想起了我追踪一头鹿的时候。我不确定当时我是怎么想的……

translations.english: (Remain silent)

translations.english: He's a vampire, and has blended into human society for years. He's never far from his female companion, Hert. Also a vampire.
translations.chinese: 他是个融入人类社会多年的吸血鬼。他有个女伴赫特。也是个吸血鬼。

translations.english: The contract is for the male, Hern. But you'll probably have to contend with the female, too. So for Sithis' sake, watch yourself.
translations.chinese: 契约是要杀那个男的，赫恩。但有可能还得和那个女的搏斗。看在西帝斯的份上，一定小心。

translations.english: Oh... Oh no... Please, please... I ain't never harmed no one... Old Narfi just wants to be left alone...
translations.chinese: 哦……哦不……求，求你了……我没伤害过谁啊……老纳菲只想一个人待着啊……

translations.english: Your pathetic existence has come to an end, Narfi.
translations.chinese: 纳菲，你可悲的一生就要结束了。

translations.english: Leave here. Leave here and never return.
translations.chinese: 离开这里。离开就再也不要回来。

translations.english: (Remain silent)

translations.english: And he's right.
He lives just outside Anga's Mill, in the woods. He was once the miller. Now Papius is just a paranoid recluse who thinks someone is out to get him.
translations.chinese: 他住在安佳木材厂外的树林里。曾经是木材厂主。现在就是个多疑的隐居者，总觉得有人要害他。

translations.english: Your political affairs are your own, but any allegiance you may have in the ongoing war could very well affect your access to Fort Greymoor.
translations.chinese: 你的政治立场没人干涉，但你在战争中效忠任何一方都有可能影响你进入灰色荒原堡。

translations.english: She's a maid. Old, and feeble. But with this contract it's much more a matter of "where" than "who."
translations.chinese: 一个老而虚弱的女佣。但这份契约的关键不在“杀谁”而是“去哪儿杀”。

translations.chinese: 显然想要他命的人太多了。以致阿斯垂德不得不抽签选取客户。

translations.english: He is, by all accounts, the worst bard in all of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 众所周知，他是天际最烂的吟游诗人。

translations.english: Is that so? We shall see, villain. We shall see!
translations.chinese: 是吗？那咱们走着瞧吧，恶棍。走着瞧！

translations.english: I am the predator. You are my prey.
translations.chinese: 我是捕食者。而你，是我的猎物。

translations.english: There once was a stranger, with eyes full of danger, he spoke not a word, but his meaning was heard... Sing on, sweet Lurbuk, sing on!
translations.chinese: 从前有个陌生人，眼里充满了危险，他一句话也不说，但一切不言而喻……唱吧，可爱的卢布克，唱吧！

translations.english: What's the matter, friend? Khajiit got your tongue? Maybe you need a little ditty to loosen your gob, hmm?
translations.chinese: 怎么了朋友？卡吉特把你舌头偷走了吗？要不要来首小曲润滑一下嘴巴啊？

translations.english: (Remain silent)

translations.chinese: 他是个有点本事的巫师。而且，想要追踪他有点难度，毕竟他是跟着商队四处旅行。

translations.english: Without that axe, this whole land would be overrun still.

translations.chinese: 一群知道了我们小秘密的狼人猎手。

translations.english: They've made it their mission to hunt us down, but we are hunters ourselves.

translations.chinese: 看来你也不是个精明的侦探啊。

translations.english: Oh, isn't that a shame. And here I am in the Bloodworks.

translations.english: Indeed. I... I thought you captured the Butcher.

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not many Nords would work for a Reachman, but Ainethach is a good man. | ZH: 没有多少诺德人愿意替瑞驰人工作，但艾尼塔克是个好人。 | SID: 0022EE

translations.english: Damn it. The priests must have activated this barrier when the Miasma was released.
translations.chinese: 该死。肯定是祭司们在释放毒气时激活了这个屏障。

translations.english: The good mine is closed and the other mine has no ore. Gods have cursed me.
translations.chinese: 好的矿场被关闭了，剩下那座没矿了，诸神在诅咒我。

translations.english: You're not from here, and we don't need to be talking.
translations.chinese: 你不是本地人，我们没话可说了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024258]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're not from here, and we don't need to be talking. | ZH: 你不是本地人，我们没话可说了。 | SID: 00C407

translations.english: Ainethach's in charge of Karthwasten. You should bother him.
translations.chinese: 艾尼塔克负责卡斯威斯腾。你应该去找他。

agentText:

translations.english: These Reach folk are so... nosy.
translations.chinese: 这些瑞驰人太……多管闲事了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024265]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: These Reach folk are so... nosy. | ZH: 这些瑞驰人太……多管闲事了。 | SID: 000053

translations.english: Ragnar has a strong arm. Pity he isn't an Orc.
translations.chinese: 拉格纳的力气很大。可惜他不是个兽人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024267]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ragnar has a strong arm. Pity he isn't an Orc. | ZH: 拉格纳的力气很大。可惜他不是个兽人。 | SID: 006F0C

translations.english: I will watch over you as you slumber to ensure your safety. If I deduce anything is amiss, I will use my arts to bring you back.
translations.chinese: 我会在你入睡之后确保你的安全。一旦我察觉不对劲，就会用我的手段把你唤醒。

translations.english: Otherwise, I am uncertain what will end your Dreamstride. Perhaps when Vaermina's curious appetite has been filled.
translations.chinese: 否则，我也不确定如何会结束你的梦中漫步。也许是瓦尔迷纳的好奇心被满足时。

agentText:

translations.english: From her citadel at the center, she reaches forth to collect our memories, leaving nothing in return apart from visions of horror and despair.
translations.chinese: 她从领域中心的堡垒伸出摄取我们记忆的手，留给我们的只有恐怖与绝望的景象。

translations.english: Vaermina resides in a strange realm known as Quagmire... a nightmarish land where reality shifts upon itself in seemingly impossible ways.
translations.chinese: 瓦尔迷纳住在一个叫“噩梦沼泽”的古怪领域……一个噩梦般的地方，其中的存在会以不可能的方式转变。

translations.english: Thank Mara. I was afraid I'd never be able to convince you.
translations.chinese: 感谢玛拉。我还担心永远说服不了你呢。

translations.english: Allow me to gather the materials I need for my ritual, and then I will meet you outside the ruins.
translations.chinese: 请允许我继续收集仪式所需的材料，我们遗迹外见。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Allow me to gather the materials I need for my ritual, and then I will meet you outside the ruins. | ZH: 请允许我继续收集仪式所需的材料，我们遗迹外见。 | SID: 00F1BB

translations.english: I believe there is a laboratory in the east wing. If we proceed there, we should be able to locate a sample.
translations.chinese: 我想东侧应该有个实验室。如果我们继续往下走，应该能找到样本。

agentText:

translations.english: You'll be viewing the memory of another through your own eyes and with your own body.
translations.chinese: 你将通过自己的眼睛、身体来观察别人的记忆。

translations.english: Thanks to all of these odd principles, there is quite a lot of debate as to whether this is really a dream or just the machinations of Vaermina.
translations.chinese: 正是这些奇怪的原则，产生了不少争论，谁也不知道这究竟是梦，还是瓦尔迷纳的阴谋。

translations.english: Those around you will perceive you as normal and you will find the words you utter may not be your own.
translations.chinese: 周围人会认为你很正常，而你会发现自己说的话不是自己的。

translations.english: It ended the war and saved the Empire to fight another day.
translations.chinese: 它结束了战争并挽救了帝国，让帝国有机会重新战斗。

translations.english: The Great War... only thirty years past and already ancient history to most people.
translations.chinese: 浩大战争……只是过去三十年，大多数人却觉得已是古老的历史了。

translations.english: But to answer your question, the White-Gold Concordat was the fancy name they put on the peace treaty between the Empire and the Thalmor.
translations.chinese: 但还是回答一下你的问题，白金协定是帝国和梭默签订和平条约取的花哨名字。

translations.english: Also trampled on the sacred name of Talos, and gave the Thalmor free reign to stamp out Talos worship throughout the Empire.
translations.chinese: 但也践踏了塔洛斯的圣名，赋予梭默在帝国境内扑灭塔洛斯信仰的自由权力。

translations.english: Seems to me like it just ended... it's never really ended for me.
translations.chinese: 似乎这一切刚刚结束……但对我而言，从未结束。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/4] | EN: The Great War... only thirty years past and already ancient history to most people. | ZH: 浩大战争……只是过去三十年，大多数人却觉得已是古老的历史了。 | SID: 00486B
