translations.english: Dragons are coming back, and you're a born dragonslayer. That's all you need to know right now.
translations.chinese: 龙族回归了，而你是天生的屠龙者。你现在只需要明白这些。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002435B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Dragons are coming back, and you're a born dragonslayer. That's all you need to know right now. | ZH: 龙族回归了，而你是天生的屠龙者。你现在只需要明白这些。 | SID: 005BDD

translations.english: Soul gems are the subject, friend. They're used in enchanting, then they break. Except one.
translations.chinese: 没有跑题，朋友。大部分灵魂石在进行附魔之后，就会破碎。但有一个例外。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024399]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Soul gems are the subject, friend. They're used in enchanting, then they break. Except one. | ZH: 没有跑题，朋友。大部分灵魂石在进行附魔之后，就会破碎。但有一个例外。 | SID: 00AAA4

translations.english: A few coins for my soul? If only you understood the irony.
translations.chinese: 几个破钱就想让我出卖灵魂？不觉得可笑么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000243BC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: A few coins for my soul? If only you understood the irony. | ZH: 几个破钱就想让我出卖灵魂？不觉得可笑么。 | SID: 00F26F

translations.english: I don't think you understand. I'm not answering questions.
translations.chinese: 我看你还是不懂。我不会回答的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000243BD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I don't think you understand. I'm not answering questions. | ZH: 我看你还是不懂。我不会回答的。 | SID: 00F9D1

translations.english: Do not fight it. Azura's prophecies always come to pass. To deny them is to go headlong into the darkness with no light to guide you.
translations.chinese: 不要与之抗争。阿祖拉的预言百发百中。否定预言就是在没有光的指引下一头扎进黑暗一样。

translations.english: Perhaps that is what you are meant to believe. To better serve your role as Azura's champion.
translations.chinese: 为了更好地发挥身为阿祖拉勇士的作用。也许还是应该相信的。

agentText:

translations.english: Some of us wanted to find out how. I was working under Malyn Varen, then. If only we knew what he was really planning.
translations.chinese: 我们中的一些人希望弄清原理。当时我正在马林·瓦伦手下工作。如果我们知道他真正的计划就好了。

translations.english: Azura's Star. A Daedric artifact that allows any number of souls to pass through it.
translations.chinese: 阿祖拉之星。一个可以承载无限灵魂的迪德拉神器。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002450D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Some of us wanted to find out how. I was working under Malyn Varen, then. If only we knew what he was really planning. | ZH: 我们中的一些人希望弄清原理。当时我正在马林·瓦伦手下工作。如果我们知道他真正的计划就好了。 | SID: 004C44
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Azura's Star. A Daedric artifact that allows any number of souls to pass through it. | ZH: 阿祖拉之星。一个可以承载无限灵魂的迪德拉神器。 | SID: 00F26B

translations.english: Azura? Gods, it's all finally coming back to haunt me.
translations.chinese: 阿祖拉？老天，还是找上我了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002450E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Azura? Gods, it's all finally coming back to haunt me. | ZH: 阿祖拉？老天，还是找上我了。 | SID: 00DB26

translations.english: But I refuse to abandon the shrine. The visions are a gift. Azura warns me of tragedy, war, death before it happens. I won't leave her guidance.
translations.chinese: 但我不会丢下祭坛不管。启示是馈赠。阿祖拉会在悲剧、战争、死亡到来前警告我。我不会离开她的引导。

translations.english: Yes. There were others at first, but Azura's visions tested everyone's faith. One by one, they left. Afraid to know their own future.
translations.chinese: 没错。起初还有其他人。但是阿祖拉的启示考验着每个人的信念。他们因害怕知道未来，一个接一个地离开了。

translations.english: That's what caused all the trouble. Soul gems are used in enchanting, but they break afterwards. Except one.
translations.chinese: 这就是麻烦的根源。灵魂石被用于附魔后就会破碎。但有一个例外。

translations.english: My people, the Dunmer, built it. We fled from Morrowind after Vvardenfell erupted almost 200 years ago.
translations.chinese: 大概两百年前，瓦登费尔火山喷发时，我们逃离了晨风，我的丹莫同族在那之后建造了它。

translations.english: Those of us who were faithful to Azura were given a vision that led us away from the island before the worst came.
translations.chinese: 我们这些忠于阿祖拉的信徒在厄运到来前接到了阿祖拉的启示，指引我们离开了瓦登费尔岛。

translations.english: This shrine is our thanks to her. That none will forget that she watches over us all.
translations.chinese: 为了感激她并铭记她对我们的庇护，所以才建造了这座祭坛。

translations.chinese: 没错。这些脆弱的灵魂石都会被消耗掉。但有一个另外。

translations.english: What do you know about soul gems?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024523]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What do you know about soul gems? | ZH: 你对灵魂石了解多少？ | SID: 00F696

translations.english: That's for the best.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024524]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That's for the best. | ZH: 那再好不过。 | SID: 00872D

translations.english: We are children of the Twilight. Beings who are to be guided from the darkness into the light. And from the light into darkness.
translations.chinese: 我们是暮光之子。被指引从黑暗走向光明，亦从光明走入黑暗。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024525]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We are children of the Twilight. Beings who are to be guided from the darkness into the light. And from the light into darkness. | ZH: 我们是暮光之子。被指引从黑暗走向光明，亦从光明走入黑暗。 | SID: 008C00

translations.english: Azura. Who led her children away from the disaster of Vvardenfell. You are the prophet that reveals our true future.
translations.chinese: 阿祖拉。是您带着孩子们逃离了瓦登费尔的灾难。您就是揭示我等真正未来的预言者。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024526]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Azura. Who led her children away from the disaster of Vvardenfell. You are the prophet that reveals our true future. | ZH: 阿祖拉。是您带着孩子们逃离了瓦登费尔的灾难。您就是揭示我等真正未来的预言者。 | SID: 001B00

translations.english: No harm shall come to me, for I live under Azura's wisdom. Her foresight protects me. Her insight sustains me.
translations.chinese: 我活在阿祖拉的智慧之下，永不受到伤害。她的远见保护着我，她的洞察支持着我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024527]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No harm shall come to me, for I live under Azura's wisdom. Her foresight protects me. Her insight sustains me. | ZH: 我活在阿祖拉的智慧之下，永不受到伤害。她的远见保护着我，她的洞察支持着我。 | SID: 006B74

translations.english: Have you seen that Shrine of Azura? They say the dark elves built it after they fled from Morrowind. Sight to see.
translations.chinese: 有没有见过阿祖拉的祭坛？听说是暗精灵逃离晨风后建造的。十分壮观。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024528]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Have you seen that Shrine of Azura? They say the dark elves built it after they fled from Morrowind. Sight to see. | ZH: 有没有见过阿祖拉的祭坛？听说是暗精灵逃离晨风后建造的。十分壮观。 | SID: 005F3A

translations.english: Did you say an "elf" and "stars"? I hope you don't know what you're asking.
translations.chinese: 你说“精灵”和“星辰”？希望你不知道自己在问什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 然后我们需要猛犸牙粉，制作方法只有巨人知道。

translations.english: Why are you still standing around here? Go get me the Phial, you fool.
translations.chinese: 为什么还站在那儿？去把白瓶给我找来，你个傻瓜。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024A3D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Why are you still standing around here? Go get me the Phial, you fool. | ZH: 为什么还站在那儿？去把白瓶给我找来，你个傻瓜。 | SID: 00BE24

translations.english: Your free will is an illusion. Whether you acknowledge me or not is your own business. But I will be in your mind.
translations.chinese: 你的自由意志不过是幻觉。认不认我是你的事，但我会深刻在你的脑海里。

translations.english: Who do you think brought Septimus here? Who do you think protected you on your journey to open the box and loose my knowledge on this world?
translations.chinese: 你以为是谁引导赛普蒂莫斯至此？你以为是谁在你打开盒子、把我之知识泄露于世的旅途中庇护了你？

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Who do you think brought Septimus here? Who do you think protected you on your journey to open the box and loose my knowledge on this world? | ZH: 你以为是谁引导赛普蒂莫斯至此？你以为是谁在你打开盒子、把我之知识泄露于世的旅途中庇护了你？ | SID: 00F9AF

translations.english: But it was hidden away. Not by the Dwarves, you see. They were already gone.
translations.chinese: 但是它被藏起来了。看看，不是矮人锁的，他们早就消失了。

translations.english: This Dwemer lockbox. Look upon it and wonder.
translations.chinese: 这个锻莫密锁箱。看看吧，惊叹吧。

translations.english: The scroll will give the deep vision needed to open it.
translations.chinese: 卷轴会提供深邃的理解来打开它。

translations.english: Inside is the heart. The heart of a god! The heart of you. And me.
translations.chinese: 里面就是心脏！神之心！你的心。也是我的心。

translations.english: Someone else. Unseen. Unknown. Found the heart, and with a flair for the ironical, used Dwarven trickery to lock it away.
translations.chinese: 是别人，看不见的人，未知的人。找到了心，用某种天赋和矮人的诡计把它锁起来了。

translations.english: For not even the strongest machinations of the Dwemer can hold off the all-sight given by an Elder Scroll.
translations.chinese: 即使是矮人最强大的阴谋也没法阻挡上古卷轴赋予的全视之力。

translations.english: Ooooh, an observant one. How clever to ask of Septimus.
translations.chinese: 哦~善于观察的人。来问赛普蒂莫斯，真聪明。

translations.english: When the top level was built, no more could be placed. It was and is the maximal apex.
translations.chinese: 当顶层建好，就无法再被超越了。它就是过去与现在的最高点。

agentText:

translations.english: How long will it be sung? My feet were set upon the rock but it turned to mud and drew me down.
translations.chinese: 这首歌还要唱多久？我的脚已经把磐石踏成了泥，我都快陷进去了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024B41]
Translations:

translations.english: It lick the panes and smokes the glass...
translations.chinese: 舔着窗户，玻璃都快冒烟了……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024B43]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It lick the panes and smokes the glass... | ZH: 舔着窗户，玻璃都快冒烟了…… | SID: 001EE7

translations.english: Now if you'll excuse me, I have a mine that needs new workers to fill it.
translations.chinese: 恕我失陪了，矿场还需要新工人来填满呢。

translations.english: I guess we also owe you something for locking you up. Here, my family's ring. And everything the guards confiscated from you.
translations.chinese: 因为你被关起来，我想我们还欠你些什么。这是我家族的戒指。还有卫兵从你那儿没收的东西。

translations.english: Yes, you're innocent. As innocent as anyone can be in this city.
translations.chinese: 没错，你是无辜的。全城里最无辜的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I guess we also owe you something for locking you up. Here, my family's ring. And everything the guards confiscated from you. | ZH: 因为你被关起来，我想我们还欠你些什么。这是我家族的戒指。还有卫兵从你那儿没收的东西。 | SID: 005CCC
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Yes, you're innocent. As innocent as anyone can be in this city. | ZH: 没错，你是无辜的。全城里最无辜的。 | SID: 00C500

translations.english: My eyes inside Cidhna Mine tell me that Madanach is dead.
translations.chinese: 我的耳目告诉我迈德纳奇死了。

translations.english: You've done a great service to the Silver-Blood family. I've had the Jarl officially pardon you, and taken care of a few other loose ends.
translations.chinese: 你替银血家族做了很大贡献。我已经让领主正式赦免你了，还处理了其他一些问题。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024CE9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: My eyes inside Cidhna Mine tell me that Madanach is dead. | ZH: 我的耳目告诉我迈德纳奇死了。 | SID: 00796C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You've done a great service to the Silver-Blood family. I've had the Jarl officially pardon you, and taken care of a few other loose ends. | ZH: 你替银血家族做了很大贡献。我已经让领主正式赦免你了，还处理了其他一些问题。 | SID: 00EA12

translations.english: I'm a pirate, sweetie. Assassination attempts are an occupational hazard. Now, shall we?
translations.chinese: 我是海盗，宝贝儿。暗杀可是高危行业哦。现在，要开始吗？

translations.english: The Dark Brotherhood? Yeah, yeah, yeah. You think this is the first contract I've had on my life?
translations.chinese: 黑暗兄弟会？知道，知道。你以为我这辈子头一回被下单吗？

translations.english: I represent the Dark...

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E56]

translations.english: I'm going to beat you like a house cat!
translations.chinese: 我要像揍家猫一样揍扁你！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E57]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I'm going to beat you like a house cat! | ZH: 我要像揍家猫一样揍扁你！ | SID: 0028FF

translations.english: And why would you be looking for me, hmm? I'm not sure I appreciate your presence here. Friend.
translations.chinese: 你找我干什么？我不太欢迎你的光临。朋友。

translations.english: You're one hard mage to track down, Ma'randru-jo.
translations.chinese: 你可真是个难追的法师啊，玛'兰德鲁-约。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E58]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And why would you be looking for me, hmm? I'm not sure I appreciate your presence here. Friend. | ZH: 你找我干什么？我不太欢迎你的光临。朋友。 | SID: 004CDC
- INFO:RNAM | EN: You're one hard mage to track down, Ma'randru-jo. | ZH: 你可真是个难追的法师啊，玛'兰德鲁-约。 | SID: 002961

translations.english: Death? Oh, there's death to be found here, to be sure.
translations.chinese: 死亡？哦，这里肯定会死人。

translations.english: But not my own!
The only thing you will discover in Mzinchaleft is death.
translations.chinese: 你在姆津查莱夫特只能找到死亡。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E59]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But not my own! | ZH: 但不是我！ | SID: 006D43
- INFO:RNAM | EN: The only thing you will discover in Mzinchaleft is death. | ZH: 你在姆津查莱夫特只能找到死亡。 | SID: 002FEC

translations.english: Ah, I see. The old Dark Brotherhood "silent intimidation" treatment.
translations.chinese: 啊，我知道了。老黑暗兄弟会刺客的“沉默恐吓”。

translations.english: Oh, I know who you are. Don't be so surprised. You ain't the first assassin sent to kill me. Won't be the last. Now let's get this over with.
translations.chinese: 哦，我知道你是谁。别那么惊讶。你不是第一个来刺杀我的。也不会是最后一个。现在赶紧了结吧。

translations.english: (Remain silent)

translations.english: Go away! I don't know who you are, but this is my spot! Whatever's on that ship is mine!
translations.chinese: 走开！我不知道你是谁，但这是我的地盘！那艘船的东西也是我的！

translations.english: (Remain silent)

agentText:

EDID: [00024E5B]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: (Remain silent) | ZH: （保持沉默） | SID: 0087F7

translations.english: Who are you? Why are you here? Leave this place. I have much work to conduct....
translations.chinese: 你是谁？你来干什么？离开这里。我有很多活儿要干呢……

translations.english: (Remain silent)

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E5C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Who are you? Why are you here? Leave this place. I have much work to conduct.... | ZH: 你是谁？你来干什么？离开这里。我有很多活儿要干呢…… | SID: 00F200
- INFO:RNAM | EN: (Remain silent) | ZH: （保持沉默） | SID: 008752

translations.english: But... who exactly are you? And why are you in here? I think it best you leave Mzinchaleft. These ruins can be quite... dangerous.
translations.chinese: 不过……你到底是谁？为什么在这里？你最好还是离我远点。这些遗迹可能很……危险的。

translations.english: Yes... quite. But if that power could be harnessed. Controlled. The possibilities would be...
translations.chinese: 对……很迷人。但如果这种力量能够被利用，控制。那可能……

translations.english: Fascinating race, the Dwemer. Powerful... and extinct.
translations.chinese: 迷人的种族啊，锻莫。强大……却也灭绝了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Yes... quite. But if that power could be harnessed. Controlled. The possibilities would be... | ZH: 对……很迷人。但如果这种力量能够被利用，控制。那可能…… | SID: 0053ED
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Fascinating race, the Dwemer. Powerful... and extinct. | ZH: 迷人的种族啊，锻莫。强大……却也灭绝了。 | SID: 0067C9

translations.english: You'll have to catch me first!
I'm going to kill you. Slowly. Painfully.
translations.chinese: 我要慢慢地，痛苦地，杀了你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E5E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You'll have to catch me first! | ZH: 你先抓住我再说！ | SID: 00DD9E
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I'm going to kill you. Slowly. Painfully. | ZH: 我要慢慢地，痛苦地，杀了你。 | SID: 004B21

translations.english: Sithis? Let me guess: "In the Void!" By the gods, you Dark Brotherhood are a predictable lot, aren't you?
translations.chinese: 西帝斯？我猜猜看啊，“在虚空里！”。天啊，你们这些黑暗兄弟会真是好猜，不是吗？

translations.english: Okay, here's how this works. You try to assassinate me, and I kill you. Horribly. I have done this dance before, you know.
translations.chinese: 好吧，就这样吧。你想暗杀我，我想杀了你。真可怕。我以前跳过这种舞。

translations.english: You face the Dread Lord...

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E5F]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Okay, here's how this works. You try to assassinate me, and I kill you. Horribly. I have done this dance before, you know. | ZH: 好吧，就这样吧。你想暗杀我，我想杀了你。真可怕。我以前跳过这种舞。 | SID: 00FC5F
- INFO:RNAM | EN: You face the Dread Lord... | ZH: 你在面对恐惧之主…… | SID: 002ED0

translations.english: You are a disgrace to our race! I spit on your fur!
translations.chinese: 你真是我们一族的耻辱！我要在你的毛皮上吐口水！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E60]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: You are a disgrace to our race! I spit on your fur! | ZH: 你真是我们一族的耻辱！我要在你的毛皮上吐口水！ | SID: 00FC36

translations.english: Fiend! You will not leave here alive! Guards! Guards!
translations.chinese: 恶魔！你休想活着离开！卫兵！卫兵！

translations.english: The Dark Brotherhood has come!

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E63]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Fiend! You will not leave here alive! Guards! Guards! | ZH: 恶魔！你休想活着离开！卫兵！卫兵！ | SID: 00ED8A
- INFO:RNAM | EN: The Dark Brotherhood has come! | ZH: 黑暗兄弟会来了！ | SID: 00F1FE

translations.english: I'm sorry, Argonian, but I've been sent to kill you.
translations.chinese: 抱歉了阿尔贡。我是来杀你的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E64]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I'm sorry, Argonian, but I've been sent to kill you. | ZH: 抱歉了阿尔贡。我是来杀你的。 | SID: 00F20C

translations.english: I'm sorry, egg brother, but I've been sent to kill you.
translations.chinese: 抱歉了，卵生兄弟，我是被派来杀你的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E65]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I'm sorry, egg brother, but I've been sent to kill you. | ZH: 抱歉了，卵生兄弟，我是被派来杀你的。 | SID: 00A6DF

translations.english: Now aren't you a strange one. Well, if you're here to shop, shop. If not, find some other caravan to stalk.
translations.chinese: 你可真够怪的。如果想买东西，那就去买。如果不是，去跟踪别的商队吧。

translations.english: (Remain silent)

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E66]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: (Remain silent) | ZH: （保持沉默） | SID: 0076A2

translations.english: I've been expecting you.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E67]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I've been expecting you. | ZH: 我一直在等你。 | SID: 00B4A0

translations.english: Should have figured the little lunatic would completely snap.
translations.chinese: 我早该想到这个小疯子会彻底爆发的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E68]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Should have figured the little lunatic would completely snap. | ZH: 我早该想到这个小疯子会彻底爆发的。 | SID: 006F79

translations.english: Still here? What's the matter, can't handle what I'm throwing your way?
translations.chinese: 还在呢？怎么了，我给你的任务处理不了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E69]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Still here? What's the matter, can't handle what I'm throwing your way? | ZH: 还在呢？怎么了，我给你的任务处理不了吗？ | SID: 00F56F

translations.english: And why would I... Oh. Oh! Guards! Guards, I need assistance!
translations.chinese: 我为什么要……哦。哦！卫兵！卫兵，我需要支援！

translations.english: You protect the Jarl. But who protects you?
translations.chinese: 你来保护领主，那谁来保护你呢？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E6A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And why would I... Oh. Oh! Guards! Guards, I need assistance! | ZH: 我为什么要……哦。哦！卫兵！卫兵，我需要支援！ | SID: 004262
- INFO:RNAM | EN: You protect the Jarl. But who protects you? | ZH: 你来保护领主，那谁来保护你呢？ | SID: 00F1FF

translations.english: Right. Well. If you have some kind of official business with the jarl, I'm afraid now's not the time. Go on then. Off with you.
translations.chinese: 好吧。听着。如果你有要事要找领主的话，很抱歉现在不是时候。请自行离开吧。

translations.english: (Remain silent)

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00024E6B]

translations.english: Now, let's see. What shall we have the rest of you do?
translations.chinese: 好了，我们来看看。剩下的人该干些什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: J'zargo... what shall we have you do... Ah! Why don't you verify that we're the first ones here? Look for any amount of tampering with the tombs.
translations.chinese: 杰'扎格……看看你要做些什么……啊！你去确认一下我们是否是第一批到达的。看看坟墓有没有被动过的痕迹。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 好了，大家。小心一点，但是要开心！

translations.english: Any enchanted items will do; the usefulness of the enchantment is irrelevant. If you find anything, the class can look it over.
translations.chinese: 任何附魔物品都可以，附魔的功用无关。如果发现了什么，可以让全班看看。

translations.english: Ah, yes. Hmm. Well, why don't you see if you can assist Arniel Gane? He's one of our scholars, here working on cataloging our finds.
translations.chinese: 啊，对。要不你去看看能不能帮上阿内尔·甘？他是咱们学院的学者，正在整理我们在这里的发现。

translations.english: I expect he'd appreciate some help in locating any additional magical artifacts here in the ruins.
translations.chinese: 如果你能在遗迹里找到其他魔法物品，他会很感激你的。

translations.chinese: 去找阿内尔·甘。他在遗迹北部的某个地方。他会告诉你怎么做。

translations.chinese: 还没有吗？咱们可不能等一整天啊。

translations.chinese: 不，不对，孩子。先是腌制的蜘蛛舌，然后是腐烂的直立根。方式一变，解药就变成毒药了。

translations.english: Me? I like to talk to my targets before the kill. Taunt them, scare them... even challenge them.
translations.chinese: 我吗？我喜欢在杀人前先和目标谈谈。奚落他们，吓唬他们……乃至挑衅他们。

translations.english: If you can goad a target into attacking you first, you may even find any local guards coming to your aid.
translations.chinese: 如果你能先刺激目标来攻击你，甚至连当地的卫兵都会跑来帮你。

translations.english: That can have interesting results. Some victims may flee, others may cower in fear.
translations.chinese: 这样可能会产生很多有趣的结果。有些受害者可能会逃跑，也有些会哆嗦着缩成一团。

translations.english: What's your preferred method of assassination, Astrid?
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德，你喜欢什么样的刺杀方式？

translations.english: Just be yourself. Eliminate the targets any way you see fit. Quiet, loud, quick, slow - whatever you feel is best.
translations.chinese: 做好你自己就行。用你自认为最合适的方式消灭目标。或静或闹，或快或慢，怎么样都好。

translations.english: Occasionally I'll give you a contract with certain parameters. Stay within them, and you'll earn yourself a bonus.
translations.chinese: 我偶尔会给你些有特定条件的契约。能够完成条件的话，就能够赢得奖励。

translations.english: Can you offer me any advice on the contracts?
translations.chinese: 能给我些执行契约的建议吗？

translations.chinese: 哈。我就想看这群自大的混蛋自降身份。总是瞧不起我们这些徒步的。

translations.english: So we send in Vex and find out he's hired a bunch of mercenaries to guard the place.
translations.chinese: 所以我们就派出了小烦，结果发现他雇佣了一群佣兵守着那里。

translations.english: Then out of the clear blue, Aringoth stops sending us our cut. Mercer was... well, angry to put it kindly.
translations.chinese: 然后阿林格斯突然就不再给我们分红，墨瑟当时……非常生气。

translations.english: Goldenglow Estate brought in a mountain of gold for the Guild. You could almost call it our sweetest deal.
translations.chinese: 金色光辉庄园给公会提供了大量资金。可以说是我们最划算的一笔交易。

translations.chinese: 玛雯更希望阿林格斯活着。但如果他试图阻拦，就做掉他。

translations.english: We need you to teach him a lesson by burning down three of the estate's hives and clearing out the safe in the main house.
translations.chinese: 我们要你给他个教训，烧毁庄园里三个蜂箱，并清理主屋里的保险柜。

translations.chinese: 在我们继续前，我先说清楚。如果你按规矩做事，就能赚大钱。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Same as the others. Looks like she was stabbed, and then cut apart. | ZH: 和其他人一样。先被刺伤，接着被切割。 | SID: 006611

translations.english: You'll need to talk to Jorleif, though. We can't just let anyone go around claiming to be on official business.
translations.chinese: 去和乔雷福谈谈。我们不能放任随便什么人到处说自己在执行公务。

translations.english: Look, friend, if you think you can do better than the legion of guards, be my guest.
translations.chinese: 听着，朋友，如果你觉得能比卫兵做得更好，请便吧。

translations.english: If he's willing, then we'll talk.
translations.chinese: 如果他愿意，我们再谈吧。

translations.english: Look, there's a war going on, if you hadn't heard. We barely have enough soldiers to walk the streets, much less patrol every corner.
translations.chinese: 听着，现在正在打仗，你不会没听说过吧。我们没有足够的兵力在街上巡逻，更别提每个角落都照顾到了。

translations.english: I don't want to believe it. Wuunferth has been a trusted friend to Ulfric for many years.
translations.chinese: 不敢相信。巫恩菲斯多年来一直是乌弗瑞克信赖的朋友。

translations.english: It pains me to see that the whispers had truth to them.
translations.chinese: 那些流言居然是真的，我很悲痛。

translations.english: The streets of Windhelm are now safe.
translations.chinese: 风舵城的街道现在安全了。

translations.english: Wuunferth shall be apprehended. I thank you for your diligence in getting to the bottom of this matter.
translations.chinese: 巫恩菲斯会被逮捕。感谢你的调查。

translations.english: Well... all right. What exactly do you need to know?

agentText:

translations.english: I've never seen anything like it. I would take this to Calixto at the House of Curiosities. He has a good eye for strange trinkets.
translations.chinese: 从来没见过。应该带到珍品屋给卡利斯托看看。他对这些古怪的小饰品很在行。

translations.english: Might even give you a bit of gold for it.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Eehh.. Calixto and his books are often confused about such matters. It happens to the best of us.
translations.chinese: 嗯……卡利斯托的那些书经常搞错这些问题。不过这也在所难免。

agentText:

translations.english: Suit yourself. It's only of value to collectors, though. Good luck finding anyone else who will appraise it that highly!
translations.chinese: 随你便吧。不过它也只对收藏家有些价值。希望你能找到其他出价这么高的人！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00025E50]

translations.english: They say they're too busy with the war -- I say what good is winning a war if we're still terrorized by one of our own?
translations.chinese: 他们说战争让他们忙不开，但要我说，如果我们还会被自己城里的人吓住，打赢了又如何？

agentText:

translations.english: I've had enough troubles recently. What is it that you're after?
translations.chinese: 我最近的麻烦已经够多了。你想要什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00025E52]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I've had enough troubles recently. What is it that you're after? | ZH: 我最近的麻烦已经够多了。你想要什么？ | SID: 00654C

translations.english: Susanna's the third. It's always the same: young girl, killed at night, body torn up.
translations.chinese: 苏珊娜是第三个。案情都一样，年轻的女孩，案发时间在夜里，尸体还撕得破烂。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00025E53]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Susanna's the third. It's always the same: young girl, killed at night, body torn up. | ZH: 苏珊娜是第三个。案情都一样，年轻的女孩，案发时间在夜里，尸体还撕得破烂。 | SID: 00C15C

translations.english: This information needs to go straight to the steward. He'll listen to you.
translations.chinese: 这些消息必须直接送给总管。他会听你的。

translations.english: Wuunferth. There have been rumors swirling about him for years. As long as I can remember.
translations.chinese: 巫恩菲斯。这么多年一直有关于他的谣言。从我记事起就有了。

translations.english: But he's a dangerous man. It's why they call him "the Unliving." I wouldn't approach him directly.
translations.chinese: 但他是个危险的家伙。所以大家都叫他“活死人”，我可不敢接近他。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00025E54]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: This information needs to go straight to the steward. He'll listen to you. | ZH: 这些消息必须直接送给总管。他会听你的。 | SID: 004DD3
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Wuunferth. There have been rumors swirling about him for years. As long as I can remember. | ZH: 巫恩菲斯。这么多年一直有关于他的谣言。从我记事起就有了。 | SID: 00AE67
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But he's a dangerous man. It's why they call him "the Unliving." I wouldn't approach him directly. | ZH: 但他是个危险的家伙。所以大家都叫他“活死人”，我可不敢接近他。 | SID: 00F58A

translations.english: Besides, I wouldn't want to be the one to give it to him. Gives me the creeps. They say he dabbles in necromancy.
translations.chinese: 而且，我也不想把这东西给他。他们都说他涉猎死灵法术。听着叫人害怕。

translations.english: Wuunferth? Bah. It's purely ceremonial, and he has no use for it.
translations.chinese: 巫恩菲斯？呸。这纯粹就是个纪念品，他拿来做什么。

agentText:

translations.english: They haven't allowed necromancy for hundreds of years!
translations.chinese: 他们就从来不允许使用死灵法术！

translations.english: Necromancy? I am a member of the College of Winterhold, in good standing!
translations.chinese: 死灵法术？我是冬堡学院成员，素来信誉卓著！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I'm going to examine the body before the rats can get to it.
translations.chinese: 我得在尸体招老鼠之前好好检查。

translations.english: If you want to help, ask some of these gawkers if they saw anything useful.
translations.chinese: 如果你想帮忙，就去问问这些旁观者，看他们有没有目击到什么有价值的线索。

translations.english: I've been noting a pattern to when the killings happen.
translations.chinese: 我注意到了凶案发生的规律。

translations.english: Now that we know they're tied in to some sort of necromantic ritual, I think I know when the next might occur.
translations.chinese: 既然我们知道了它们与某种死灵仪式有关，那我应该能推断出下次是什么时候。

translations.english: Keep watch in the Stone Quarter tomorrow night. That's almost certainly where the killer will strike next.
translations.chinese: 明天晚上继续到石区巡逻。凶手肯定会在那里下手。

translations.english: Let's see. From a Loredas of Last Seed until a Middas of Heartfire... it will happen soon. Very soon.
translations.chinese: 来看看。从末种月的周六到炉火月的周三……应该快了。很快就到。

translations.english: My what, now? I've never kept a journal, I can assure you.
translations.chinese: 我的什么？我从来不写日记，我可以保证。

translations.english: What exactly did this amulet look like?
translations.chinese: 那个护身符长什么样子？

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: What exactly did this amulet look like? | ZH: 那个护身符长什么样子？ | SID: 006E48

translations.english: I've been trying to put those up around the city, to warn people. Have them keep their eyes open.
translations.chinese: 我一直试着在城内散布这些，来警告人们保持警惕。

translations.english: I've got a feeling about this one.
You say you found it in Hjerim? Friga's old place. Let's go have a look around there.
translations.chinese: 你跟我说是在霜斋找到的？弗丽嘉的故居。我们去那里看看吧。

translations.english: But someone keeps taking them down.

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: But someone keeps taking them down. | ZH: 但一直有人在阻碍。 | SID: 007B0C

translations.english: Follow me.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00025E5C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Follow me. | ZH: 跟着我。 | SID: 006E4C

translations.english: I'll meet you over there.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00025E5D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll meet you over there. | ZH: 我在那里等你。 | SID: 00508E

translations.english: Good day.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00025E5E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good day. | ZH: 日安。 | SID: 0065D9

translations.english: They say I'm just snooping around bothering people, but I'm trying to save lives!
translations.chinese: 他们说我是在四处窥探，打扰他人，但我是在拯救生命！

translations.english: Oh, they care all right. Just none of them thinks to do anything about it.
translations.chinese: 哦，他们很在乎。就是没人想做些什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00025E5F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: They say I'm just snooping around bothering people, but I'm trying to save lives! | ZH: 他们说我是在四处窥探，打扰他人，但我是在拯救生命！ | SID: 0059FA
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Oh, they care all right. Just none of them thinks to do anything about it. | ZH: 哦，他们很在乎。就是没人想做些什么。 | SID: 00B3A7

translations.english: Wonderful. This will be a splendid addition to my private collection.
translations.chinese: 太好了。我的私人藏品又锦上添花了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00025E60]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Wonderful. This will be a splendid addition to my private collection. | ZH: 太好了。我的私人藏品又锦上添花了。 | SID: 00F0E9

translations.english: That is the Necromancer's Amulet, of legend.
translations.chinese: 那是传说中的“死灵法师护符”。

translations.english: It appears you were at least half-right. There is necromancy at the heart of this.
translations.chinese: 看来你至少说对了一半。这里面确实有死灵法术作祟。

translations.english: I know it well. Or at least, I've heard of it. I would wager that carving once depicted a skull.
translations.chinese: 我很了解。至少，是听说过。我敢打赌这个雕刻是个头骨。

translations.english: Let's go. I'd rather not stay out here alone any longer than I have to.
translations.chinese: 我们走吧。除非迫不得已，我也不想一个人在外面待太久。

agentText:

translations.english: I'm sorry -- she was very dear to me, and it's rather painful to think about.
translations.chinese: 对不起，她是我的至亲骨肉，一想到她我就很痛苦。

translations.english: I have some questions about your daughter.
translations.chinese: 我想问几个关于你女儿的问题。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00025E63]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm sorry -- she was very dear to me, and it's rather painful to think about. | ZH: 对不起，她是我的至亲骨肉，一想到她我就很痛苦。 | SID: 00F20A
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I have some questions about your daughter. | ZH: 我想问几个关于你女儿的问题。 | SID: 00013A

translations.english: I'd rather not talk about my daughter, if you'll excuse me.
translations.chinese: 恕我失陪了。我不想谈论我女儿。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00025E64]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'd rather not talk about my daughter, if you'll excuse me. | ZH: 恕我失陪了。我不想谈论我女儿。 | SID: 00521E

translations.english: For a piece like that, I could pay... 500 gold?
translations.chinese: 这么一件好东西，我可以付……500金币怎么样？

translations.english: Traditionally it's carried by the court mage.
translations.chinese: 一般都是由宫廷法师携带的。

translations.english: Let me see... ah, yes. This is the Wheelstone. It's an heirloom symbol of the power of Windhelm.
translations.chinese: 我来看看……啊，没错。轮之石。风舵城权力祖传象征。

translations.english: I would... eh... be interested in acquiring it. If you're willing to part with it, that is.
translations.chinese: 我……呃……对它有点兴趣。如果你愿意出手的话。

translations.english: The Wheelstone? Have you decided to sell it, yet?
translations.chinese: 轮之石？你决定出手了吗？

translations.english: About that amulet...

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: It ain't right, movin' in with a new love the day after your kin die like that. | ZH: 这不合适啊，亲人刚死就另寻新欢。 | SID: 00FC9B

translations.english: Aye. Our Jarl would sure like to know if he did though. Might even pay to find out.
translations.chinese: 没错。领主肯定很想知道真实情况。甚至会悬赏线索。

translations.english: Hroggar claims it was a hearth fire. Some folks say Hroggar started it himself.
translations.chinese: 赫鲁加说是炉火引燃的。但别人说就是赫鲁加自己放的火。

translations.english: So enters Maven Black-Briar, the glint of Imperial coin in her eyes. So tell me, what's the price for a woman's integrity these days?
translations.chinese: 所以玛雯·黑棘就这么走进来了。眼睛里闪烁着对帝国钱币的渴望。告诉我，这个时代一个女人的正直是什么价？

translations.english: One day when you can see past your own interests, you will come to see that we were right.
translations.chinese: 总有一天，当你超越了自己的利益，你就会明白我们是对的。

translations.english: And this... This is all wrong.

agentText:

translations.english: You never were able to see the forest for the trees, were you?
translations.chinese: 你从来都是见树不见林的人，对吧？

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Oh? I don't expect anyone to miss my meaning.
translations.chinese: 哦？我可不想别人误解我的意思。

translations.english: Come, Legate. There's much to do.
translations.chinese: 来吧，副官。还有事要做呢。

translations.english: I knew you looked like a clever one...

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00025F5B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I knew you looked like a clever one... | ZH: 我就知道你够聪明…… | SID: 00B590

translations.english: Of course not! Thieves take what is precious. Thieves steal.
translations.chinese: 当然不是！小偷只拿值钱东西。只知道偷。

translations.english: We just take what will not be missed. What no one needs anymore. Maybe we take some weapons and stop a few deaths. Who would call that thievery?
translations.chinese: 我们只是拿不该被浪费的东西。没人要的。也许我们可以拿些武器来阻止一些死亡的发生。谁能说这算偷？

translations.english: Don't worry about them. We'll make sure they wash up safe. Maybe they'll even pay us for the heroic rescue from their sad crash.
translations.chinese: 别担心他们。我们会确保他们安全上岸的。也许他们还会为我们的见义勇为付感谢费。

translations.chinese: 把我吗？为什么？我犯了什么罪？我只是在胡言乱语罢了，这确实是个悲剧事故……

translations.english: A tragic, and very, very profitable event.
translations.chinese: 悲剧，但非常，非常赚钱的事故。

translations.english: Yes, but not likely the one you intend.
translations.chinese: 没错，但可能不是你要的那种。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00025F62]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, but not likely the one you intend. | ZH: 没错，但可能不是你要的那种。 | SID: 00E13D

translations.english: The Solitude Lighthouse will be guiding it in... but if its fire were to go out, the Icerunner would run aground.
translations.chinese: 独孤城的灯塔会引导它……但如果火熄灭了，冰驰者就会搁浅。

translations.english: With the war, many more ships come through these docks. Loaded with weapons and pay, but few people. And they pass through dangerous waters.
translations.chinese: 由于战争的关系，越来越多的船只经过这些码头。武器齐全、报酬丰厚，但人手却不多。他们会穿过一些危险的水域。

translations.english: We have an interest in one of those boats, the Icerunner.
translations.chinese: 我们对其中一艘很感兴趣，叫冰驰者号。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Where's Anuriel?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00025F64]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Where's Anuriel? | ZH: 安努瑞尔呢？ | SID: 007D32

translations.english: Without the Lighthouse, the Icerunner will have swung wide of the western shoal and run aground on the eastern coast.
translations.chinese: 没了灯塔，冰驰者号就会在西部的浅滩摇摆，然后在东海岸搁浅。

translations.english: The effects have already been felt. The Icerunner has failed to dock on time.
translations.chinese: 影响很明显了。冰驰者号没按时靠岸。

translations.english: My sister Deeja will be at the wreck with our Blackblood Marauders. She knows to expect you.
translations.chinese: 我的姐妹蒂亚会和我们的黑血掠夺者一起去沉船。她知道你会跟着来的事。

translations.english: But no, you're content to snatch scraps falling off the Emperor's table. Fine. Take my home. Take my city. May it burn down around you.
translations.chinese: 但是你没有。你满足于偷取皇帝桌上掉下来的残汤剩饭。很好。拿上我的家园。我的城市。愿它在你周围燃烧吧。

translations.english: We Nords were proud warriors once. And we still could be. Evidenced by the men and women who fought and died bravely today.
translations.chinese: 我们诺德人曾经是骄傲的战士。现在依旧是。今天英勇战斗、壮烈牺牲的人们证明了这一点。

translations.english: You could see that if you had any faith left in that black heart of yours.
translations.chinese: 如果你那颗脏心烂肺还有半点信仰可言，那就应该明白。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00025F6E]
Translations:

translations.english: You look new. I'm new, too. I think we could be friends.
translations.chinese: 面生的很，我也是个新人。我觉得咱们可以交个朋友。

As you wish.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00025F86]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Protect the Jarl! | ZH: 保护领主！ | SID: 003FB0
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: As you wish. | ZH: 如你所愿。 | SID: 006062

translations.english: Riften denies the Emperor. You are here illegally. Stand down and you will be arrested and tried in the morning. Resist and you will die.
translations.chinese: 裂谷城不承认皇帝。你这是非法入侵。退下，明早就把你拘捕受审。胆敢反抗，死路一条。

agentText:

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: This warning is passed to you because the Psijic Order believes in you.
translations.chinese: 正因赛伊克教团对你的信任，故而向你传递警告。

translations.english: Judgment will be passed on your actions to come, and how you deal with the dangers ahead of you.
translations.chinese: 你的行动和对危机的处理会影响最终的判决。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00026182]
Translations:

translations.english: You, mage, and you alone, have the potential to prevent disaster.
translations.chinese: 你，只有法师你，有能力阻止灾难的发生。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00026183]

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00026185]
Translations:

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00026186]
Translations:

translations.english: Know that you have set in motion a chain of events that cannot be stopped.
translations.chinese: 你已经开启了一连串无法阻止的事件。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00026187]
Translations:

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00026188]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm afraid I didn't see anything... | ZH: 恐怕我什么也没看见…… | SID: 00620A

translations.english: Really? Perhaps the amulet is important somehow. Is there some way you can use it?
translations.chinese: 是吗？也许这个护身符很重要。你有什么办法使用它吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00026189]
Translations:

translations.english: I don't dare leave this unattended. Can you return to the College and inform Savos Aren of this discovery? Please, hurry.
translations.chinese: 这东西必须留人看管。你能回去把这一发现报告萨沃斯·阿冉吗？请快一点。

translations.english: I have no idea! This is amazing. Absolutely amazing. The Arch-Mage needs to be informed immediately. He needs to see this for himself.
translations.chinese: 我也不知道！惊人，太惊人了。需要立刻知会大法师，让他来亲自看看。

translations.english: Now please do be careful. Who knows what we're going to find.
translations.chinese: 请一定小心。谁也不知道我们会发现什么。

translations.english: Perhaps we should take a look inside these coffins...
translations.chinese: 也许我们应该看看棺材里面……

translations.english: The Psijics have no connection to these ruins. And no one's seen any of their order in a long time.
translations.chinese: 赛伊克和这些遗迹没有任何联系。而且已经很久没人见过他们教团的人了。

translations.chinese: 你这是在帮老乞丐，圣灵会向你微笑的。

translations.chinese: 但里面有个宝贝。纯金的雕像，跟个小孩儿那么大。不知道她们拿来做什么，但我知道我能拿来做什么。

translations.english: Its name is no accident. The palace was originally built to hold a captive dragon.
translations.chinese: 它并非无故得名。这座宫殿最早是为了关押一头被囚的巨龙而兴建的。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Its name is no accident. The palace was originally built to hold a captive dragon. | ZH: 它并非无故得名。这座宫殿最早是为了关押一头被囚的巨龙而兴建的。 | SID: 007C56

translations.english: You might be able to trap him there, exactly.
translations.chinese: 没错，那样你就能把他困在那里。

translations.english: You must trust in the rightness of your cause, and the strength of your Voice.
translations.chinese: 相信你事业的正义和吼声的力量。

translations.english: You'd require the Jarl's cooperation, of course. That might not be easy to come by.
translations.chinese: 但你先得争得领主的合作。这一点很难做到。

translations.english: In those days, dragons could still be found among the remote mountain peaks.
translations.chinese: 那时，龙族还出没在偏僻的山巅。

translations.english: Before the Blades wiped them all out.
Oh, this was back in the days of Olaf One-Eye, thousands of years ago.
translations.chinese: 啊，那是几千年前，“独眼”奥拉夫的时代。

translations.english: This is High Hrothgar, our temple, sanctuary, and home. We ask that you respect our solitude while you are here.
translations.chinese: 这里是霍斯加修道院，我们的神庙、圣殿、家园。我们希望你来到这里时能够尊重我们的宁静独处。

agentText:

translations.english: We are not warriors. What is overlooked in the Dragonborn is not permitted to any other followers of the Way of the Voice.
translations.chinese: 我们不是战士。龙裔可以忽视的东西，吼声之道的追随者却需要遵循。

agentText:

translations.english: May the strength and truth of your Voice serve you well. Breath and focus.
translations.chinese: 愿吼声的力量与真理守护你。调整呼吸，集中精力。

translations.english: Remember, the Way of the Voice trains you for more than battle. Indeed, we believe that battle is the least of its uses.
translations.chinese: 记住，修炼吼声之道不仅是为了战斗。我们认为战斗远非它之精髓。

translations.english: Ah! Dragonsreach! There are many difficulties, but I cannot think of a better plan.
translations.chinese: 啊！龙临宫！虽然困难重重，但我想不出更好的办法了。

translations.english: Although I fear the Jarl may not be easy to persuade.
translations.chinese: 恐怕领主不容易被说服。

translations.english: I'm going to try to capture a dragon, if <Alias.ShortName=Jarl> will help me.
translations.chinese: 我想要擒获一头龙, 如果<Alias.ShortName=Jarl>肯帮我的话。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Remember, the Way of the Voice trains you for more than battle. Indeed, we believe that battle is the least of its uses. | ZH: 记住，修炼吼声之道不仅是为了战斗。我们认为战斗远非它之精髓。 | SID: 004869

translations.english: Alduin... we heard the Dragonrend Shout from here... you defeated him?
translations.chinese: 那奥杜因……我们听到那边传来的“龙魂撕裂”之声……你把他打败了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00026741]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Alduin... we heard the Dragonrend Shout from here... you defeated him? | ZH: 那奥杜因……我们听到那边传来的“龙魂撕裂”之声……你把他打败了？ | SID: 00DEED

translations.english: I feared as much. I thought it was him we saw flying east after your battle.
translations.chinese: 我也很担心。我想他应该是在与你一战之后向东飞去了。

translations.english: Yes, but he escaped. I need to find his portal to Sovngarde.
translations.chinese: 对，但他逃了。我得找到他前往松加德的传送门。

translations.english: Ah, an excellent question. Mehrunes Dagon is the Daedric Lord of Change, Destruction, and Ambition.
translations.chinese: 啊，问得好。梅鲁涅斯·大衮是变革、毁灭与野心的迪德拉君王。

translations.english: Dagon's Mythic Dawn cult killed the Septim Dynasty and opened the Oblivion Gates into Tamriel. They called it the Oblivion Crisis.
translations.chinese: 大衮的神话黎明邪教终结了塞普汀皇朝，在泰姆瑞尔开启众多湮灭之门。也就是史称的“湮灭危机”。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: It's held many names: Dagger of the Final Wounds, Bane of the Righteous, the Kingslayer.
translations.chinese: 它还有很多名字：终创匕首、正义灾祸、弑王者。

translations.english: The Razor is Mehrunes Dagon's personal artifact. It has always heralded bloody change and carnage.
translations.chinese: 这把剃刀是梅鲁涅斯·大衮的神器，经常预示着血腥的变革与杀戮。

translations.english: The Mythic Dawn worshipped Dagon as a god. Having his Razor would be invaluable to my collection.
translations.chinese: 神话黎明将大衮视为神明。他的剃刀是我无价的收藏。

translations.english: Get moving. I'll see if I can't delay any patrols out there.
translations.chinese: 行动吧。我去看看能不能拖住巡逻队。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000267D8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Get moving. I'll see if I can't delay any patrols out there. | ZH: 行动吧。我去看看能不能拖住巡逻队。 | SID: 000F35

translations.english: The "problem" is your disrespect for the laws of this land. It's time to face the Jarl's justice.
translations.chinese: “问题”就是你不尊重这片土地的法律。是时候接受领主的审判了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000267DF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The "problem" is your disrespect for the laws of this land. It's time to face the Jarl's justice. | ZH: “问题”就是你不尊重这片土地的法律。是时候接受领主的审判了。 | SID: 00B404

translations.english: Smart man. Now come along with us. We'll take any stolen goods, and you'll be free to go. After you pay the fine, of course.
translations.chinese: 聪明人。现在跟我们走吧。我们拿走所有赃物，然后你就可以走了。当然是你交清罚款之后。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I guess you're smarter than you look.
translations.chinese: 你比看上去聪明多了啊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000267E1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I guess you're smarter than you look. | ZH: 你比看上去聪明多了啊。 | SID: 00A1BE

translations.english: Then pay with your blood.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000267E2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Then pay with your blood. | ZH: 那就血债血偿吧。 | SID: 00FFC5

translations.english: We got everything in hand here. You aren't needed 'round here.
translations.chinese: 一切都在我们掌控，这里不需要你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000268DA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We got everything in hand here. You aren't needed 'round here. | ZH: 一切都在我们掌控，这里不需要你。 | SID: 0082FE

translations.english: We chop trees, we mill the wood. What more would you want to know?
translations.chinese: 我们负责砍树、锯木头。你还想知道什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000268DB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We chop trees, we mill the wood. What more would you want to know? | ZH: 我们负责砍树、锯木头。你还想知道什么？ | SID: 000B1A

translations.english: It's a hard way to make a living, but we find ways to make ends meet.
translations.chinese: 谋生是很艰难的，但我们总能找到收支平衡的办法。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000268DC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's a hard way to make a living, but we find ways to make ends meet. | ZH: 谋生是很艰难的，但我们总能找到收支平衡的办法。 | SID: 009F86

translations.english: We don't take kindly to people snooping around our business.
translations.chinese: 我们不喜欢有陌生人窥探我们的生意。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000268DD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We don't take kindly to people snooping around our business. | ZH: 我们不喜欢有陌生人窥探我们的生意。 | SID: 00865D

translations.english: These axes can chop a lot more than wood, you know.
translations.chinese: 这些斧子不止能砍树，你懂的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000268DF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: These axes can chop a lot more than wood, you know. | ZH: 这些斧子不止能砍树，你懂的。 | SID: 00401F

translations.english: Hey, welcome to the mill!

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000268E0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hey, welcome to the mill! | ZH: 嘿，欢迎来到锯木厂！ | SID: 005C6F

translations.english: My brother and me bought this place when we left the army. Boy, did we lose a bundle, but at least we're not fighting the war!
translations.chinese: 我们哥俩儿退伍之后买下了这里。哎，真是花了不少钱，但至少我们不用再打仗了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000268E1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My brother and me bought this place when we left the army. Boy, did we lose a bundle, but at least we're not fighting the war! | ZH: 我们哥俩儿退伍之后买下了这里。哎，真是花了不少钱，但至少我们不用再打仗了。 | SID: 00778A

translations.english: We're making our money back, bit by bit. Every extra bit of work helps...
translations.chinese: 我们正在一点点回本。每多做一点活儿都会有帮助……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000268E2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We're making our money back, bit by bit. Every extra bit of work helps... | ZH: 我们正在一点点回本。每多做一点活儿都会有帮助…… | SID: 0006FF

translations.english: We served our time in the Legion. Now we're just trying to make it day to day.
translations.chinese: 我们在军团当过兵，现在只想好好过日子。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000268E3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We served our time in the Legion. Now we're just trying to make it day to day. | ZH: 我们在军团当过兵，现在只想好好过日子。 | SID: 005B30

translations.english: I used to serve with Trilf and Steirod. Good guys, but don't get on their bad side, you know?
translations.chinese: 我为崔尔夫和斯特罗德干过活儿。都是好人，但别跟他们作对，知道吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000268E5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I used to serve with Trilf and Steirod. Good guys, but don't get on their bad side, you know? | ZH: 我为崔尔夫和斯特罗德干过活儿。都是好人，但别跟他们作对，知道吗？ | SID: 002B88

translations.english: I once saw Steirod tear a whole tree out the ground with his bare hands. Glad he's on our side!
translations.chinese: 我有一次看见斯特罗德徒手把树拔起来了。还好他是我们的人！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000268E6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I once saw Steirod tear a whole tree out the ground with his bare hands. Glad he's on our side! | ZH: 我有一次看见斯特罗德徒手把树拔起来了。还好他是我们的人！ | SID: 00BC42

translations.english: These boys do good work for the Empire!
translations.chinese: 这些人为帝国干得不错。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000268E7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: These boys do good work for the Empire! | ZH: 这些人为帝国干得不错。 | SID: 00CB64

translations.english: Nice to be here on the home-front. Wouldn't mind being down in Cyrodiil, though.
translations.chinese: 很高兴能来到后方。不过我也不介意去希罗帝尔。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000268E8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Nice to be here on the home-front. Wouldn't mind being down in Cyrodiil, though. | ZH: 很高兴能来到后方。不过我也不介意去希罗帝尔。 | SID: 00EA92

translations.english: It's considered a great honor for the family. Their daughter will never know hardship, and the goddess blesses them with great bounty.
translations.chinese: 这会被视为家族的莫大荣誉。他们的女儿将永不受苦，他们一家也会受女神的庇佑。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00026A5F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's considered a great honor for the family. Their daughter will never know hardship, and the goddess blesses them with great bounty. | ZH: 这会被视为家族的莫大荣誉。他们的女儿将永不受苦，他们一家也会受女神的庇佑。 | SID: 00F59F

translations.english: We prefer not to announce that the Sybil has died until we can introduce the new one. People like to know that we're connected to the goddess.
translations.chinese: 在我们推选新的女预言家之前，我们不想宣布前任预言家的死讯。人们还是喜欢认为我们和女神时刻保持联系的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00026A61]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We prefer not to announce that the Sybil has died until we can introduce the new one. People like to know that we're connected to the goddess. | ZH: 在我们推选新的女预言家之前，我们不想宣布前任预言家的死讯。人们还是喜欢认为我们和女神时刻保持联系的。 | SID: 00C793

translations.english: From her reverie, we know the mind of our god.
translations.chinese: 从她的启示中，我们就能知道神的想法。

translations.english: We have had a vision of the next Sybil, living in a village to the north. She must be brought to the temple for her reverie to begin.
translations.chinese: 我们已经收到了下一位女预言家下落的启示，就住在北边的村庄里。必须把她带回神庙，她才能开始接受启示。

translations.english: From the time she's a little girl to the moment she expires, she is a direct connection with the heavenly mother.
translations.chinese: 从她孩提开始，直至生命的最后一刻，她都会与天母直接相连。

translations.english: The Sybil of Dibella spends her entire life in direct communion with the goddess.
translations.chinese: 迪贝拉的女预言家一生都可以和女神直接沟通。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00026A62]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: From her reverie, we know the mind of our god. | ZH: 从她的启示中，我们就能知道神的想法。 | SID: 000B16
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: We have had a vision of the next Sybil, living in a village to the north. She must be brought to the temple for her reverie to begin. | ZH: 我们已经收到了下一位女预言家下落的启示，就住在北边的村庄里。必须把她带回神庙，她才能开始接受启示。 | SID: 0011D0
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: From the time she's a little girl to the moment she expires, she is a direct connection with the heavenly mother. | ZH: 从她孩提开始，直至生命的最后一刻，她都会与天母直接相连。 | SID: 007BA2
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: The Sybil of Dibella spends her entire life in direct communion with the goddess. | ZH: 迪贝拉的女预言家一生都可以和女神直接沟通。 | SID: 008659

translations.english: Damn it, woman, are you trying to taunt us?
translations.chinese: 该死的，女人，你是在嘲笑我们吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00026A69]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Damn it, woman, are you trying to taunt us? | ZH: 该死的，女人，你是在嘲笑我们吗？ | SID: 00DB91

translations.english: Our daughter, Fjotra, was taken from here. The Forsworn descended and... they didn't touch anything else. Just our little girl.
translations.chinese: 我们的女儿，弗洛格拉，被绑架了。被弃誓者……他们没碰别的东西，就只把我们女儿带走了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00026A6A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Our daughter, Fjotra, was taken from here. The Forsworn descended and... they didn't touch anything else. Just our little girl. | ZH: 我们的女儿，弗洛格拉，被绑架了。被弃誓者……他们没碰别的东西，就只把我们女儿带走了。 | SID: 00A1C2

translations.english: It was the Forsworn from Broken Tower. Never been much trouble before. What's it to you?
translations.chinese: 破碎塔楼据点。那群弃誓者从来没这么惹过麻烦。这和你有什么关系？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Or give you strength if you happen to offend one.
translations.chinese: 或者在你冒犯别人时给你力量。

translations.english: Typically we avoid bestowing it upon men, but for the Sybil's escort, we could make an exception.
translations.chinese: 通常情况我们是不会把它赐予男人的，但为了护送女预言家回来，我们可以破例一次。

translations.chinese: 给你。记住，天际的人们会做出反应的。如果你帮助过他们，会有更多人对你的爱情感兴趣。

translations.english: Good luck. Mara bless you.

translations.chinese: 你想结婚？真高兴看到即使是这么艰难的时期仍然有爱情之花盛开。

translations.english: Don't be late, you don't want to miss your own wedding!
translations.chinese: 千万别迟到，你不会想着错过自己的婚礼吧！

translations.english: Your wedding will be held tomorrow, from dawn until dusk.
translations.chinese: 你的婚礼将在明天举行，从早一直到晚。

translations.chinese: 用手套净化节点。等做完之后再来找我。我说得应该够清楚了。

translations.chinese: 到每一个节点位置，清除你发现的一切杂质。

translations.english: Return the gloves to me when you have finished.
translations.chinese: 等做完之后再把手套还我。

translations.english: Very well. These specially enchanted gloves will allow you to delve directly into the focal points for these energies.
translations.chinese: 很好。这是进行了特别附魔的手套，能够让你直接接触这些能量节点。

translations.english: Please exercise caution. This is not a procedure without possible... consequences.
translations.chinese: 请小心。有可能出现无法预料的……结果。

translations.english: These energies, on occasion, become... polluted. Effort must be made to see that they are kept pure, clean.
translations.chinese: 这些能量偶尔会……受到污染。必须努力保证它们的清洁。

translations.english: This both enhances our connection to the realm of magic, and eliminates possible interference from outside sources.
translations.chinese: 这既能够增强我们与魔法位面的联系，也能消除外界可能存在的干扰。

translations.english: Do you wish to aid in this cleansing?
translations.chinese: 你愿意帮我净化一下吗？

translations.english: As you may be aware, the College has gone to great lengths to purify and enhance the natural energies of the world.
translations.chinese: 如你所知，学院竭尽所能净化和提升世界的自然能量。

Yes, they have. I can feel the difference already. But of course, I'm far more in tune with these sorts of things than most.

translations.chinese: 有人说狼头骨洞穴附近有些怪事。有旅行者失踪，还发出奇怪的光。我怀疑不是野兽就是强盗。

translations.chinese: 甩卖？吸引新客户？凯米拉，河木镇所有人都在这里购物，没有什么新客户了。

translations.english: This is the prayer heard by the goddess and relayed to her servants. Return when she has seen her path.
translations.chinese: 这就是女神听到的祈祷，并传给了她的仆人。为她找到道路之后再回来吧。

translations.english: The dawn surely opens upon you, child. You must bear its light that all may see.
translations.chinese: 黎明会向你走来，孩子。你要带着它的光芒去照亮所有人。

translations.english: Mara has reflected an image to me. At the foot of the throat and young woman... almost a girl... her fickle love must resolve itself.
translations.chinese: 玛拉向我展示了一幅景象。在喉峰之下，年轻的女人……应该叫女孩……她那变幻无常的爱情必须得到解决。

translations.english: I will entreat Mara on your behalf.
translations.chinese: 我会为你向玛拉祈祷的。

translations.english: The village of Ivarstead. The woman, Fastred.
translations.chinese: 伊瓦尔镇。女人名为，法斯莱德。

translations.chinese: 为了接受玛拉的爱抚，你得先像她的手一样行动于世。

translations.english: Not all can hear the broad echoes of deepest dawn.
translations.chinese: 不是所有人都能听到黎明最深处传来的宽阔回声。

translations.english: Explore the facets of the infinite jewel.
translations.chinese: 去探索无限宝石的每一面。

translations.english: Bassianus, sweetie, what is it?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00026EBB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Bassianus, sweetie, what is it? | ZH: 巴夏努斯，甜心，怎么了？ | SID: 00F42A

translations.english: There is one final aspect we wish for you to explore. For a strong love can withstand storms and even survive death.
translations.chinese: 最后还有一个方面希望你去探索。一份强烈的爱足以抵御风吹雨打，乃至超越死亡。

translations.english: Take this symbol of Mara. She will guide you to the wandering souls of two whose love was so great that their entwinement binds them to this world.
translations.chinese: 拿上玛拉的信物。她会指引你找到两个漂泊的灵魂。他们伟大的爱恋将他们与这个世界纠缠在了一起。

translations.english: You have seen the young, fickle love of youth, and helped a more seasoned love find its way.
translations.chinese: 你见过了年轻人变幻无常的爱情，也帮助更加老成的爱恋找到了道路。

translations.english: The goddess smiles at your efforts, child. The dawn shines bright upon you.
translations.chinese: 女神正在因你的努力而微笑，孩子。黎明的光辉照耀着你。

translations.english: Oh my. Probably something about the men. We all wish we had her problems.
translations.chinese: 哦，天。又是和男人有关吧。我们都知道她的问题了。

translations.english: Even if it means her leaving Ivarstead, I want Fastred to be happy.
translations.chinese: 即便这意味着她要离开伊瓦尔镇，我也希望法斯莱德开心。

translations.english: If they just snuck out of town together, I could manage my husband.
translations.chinese: 让他们溜出镇子，我能搞定我丈夫。

translations.english: Now, don't tell my husband, but I don't have any problem with Bassianus.
translations.chinese: 行了，别告诉我丈夫，但其实我对巴夏努斯没什么意见。

translations.chinese: 我们侍奉玛拉女神，她所赠与的爱之礼物，让凡人也能拥有少许的永恒。

translations.english: Her blessings are many. To love is to know the true nature of the gods.
translations.chinese: 她的祝福很多。爱就是了解诸神本质的途径。

translations.chinese: 你的努力光耀全省啊。我相信你现在对爱有了更深刻的理解。

translations.english: Carry the blessings of Mara with you, so the rest of the province may shine with her glories.
translations.chinese: 请带上玛拉的祝福，让这个省的其他地方也沐浴她的光芒。

The trouble is that I can't seem to speak around her.

translations.chinese: 以前这里可是个大镇，但人们都开始往裂谷城搬了。

translations.english: Look around here. There's not much left.
translations.chinese: 看看这里吧。不剩几个人了。

translations.english: If all the young people leave, what happens to Ivarstead?

translations.english: I'll bet Bassianus would know what's going on. He understands women.
translations.chinese: 我打赌巴夏努斯知道些什么。他很懂女人。

translations.english: My parents are being impossible.
He only cares about this stupid town, but Bassianus makes me happier than anyone ever has.
translations.chinese: 他只关心这个傻兮兮的小镇子，但巴夏努斯能让我比任何人都快乐。

translations.english: My mother's not any help, either.
Bassianus wants to marry me. And I think I love him. But he wants to move to Riften afterwards, and my father won't allow it.
translations.chinese: 巴夏努斯想娶我。我也觉得他是真心爱我。可是他想搬到裂谷城去住，我父亲就是不同意。

translations.chinese: 呃……你知道吗……我一直在想法琳的事。你认识她吗？

translations.english: I was beginning to lose faith that any help would come.

translations.english: Well, suffice to say she is resplendent, but not without resolve. Striking, in all senses.
translations.chinese: 一言蔽之，那就是光彩照人，又充满坚毅。各种方面都让人赞叹。

translations.english: She thinks she's in love with Bassianus and wants to leave town. With him.
translations.chinese: 她自以为爱上了巴夏努斯，想离开这里和他在一起。

translations.english: Let me tell you how I see it.
I'm sure I know what this is about.
Until a few months ago, the girl was head over heels for Klimmek. Wouldn't stop talking about him.
translations.chinese: 直到几个月之前，这丫头还在因为科林麦神魂颠倒。成天嘴里离不开他。

translations.english: It will pass.
Now if I thought she was really in love with Bassianus, that would be one thing. But she's a child.
translations.chinese: 如果我认定她真的爱上了巴夏努斯，那是另一回事了。但她还是个孩子。

translations.english: The final tempering of the Phial was performed with a type of old magic that's been lost since the Dragon War.
translations.chinese: 白瓶最后一次锤炼用的是一种在巨龙战争之后就失传的古老魔法。

translations.english: It's difficult to explain to the layman -- forgive me if I begin waxing alchemic.
translations.chinese: 这很难和外行人讲清楚，请原谅，我对炼金术有些自满了。

translations.english: With the heart of one of their Briar Warriors, I can lock the Phial's magic into its physical form.
translations.chinese: 只要有了他们其中一个荆棘战士的心脏，我就可以将白瓶的魔法锁定在它的物理形态中。

translations.english: The nearest modern incarnation of it is the strange rituals practiced by the Forsworn.
translations.chinese: 最接近它的现代化身就是被弃誓者们所举行的奇怪仪式。

translations.english: The original Phial was made from this snow. We'll only need a small bit for the repairs.
translations.chinese: 最初的白瓶就是用这块雪做的。我们只需要一点点来修理。

translations.english: They say the Greybeards taught it to ignore the sun, and heat simply washes over it.
translations.chinese: 他们说灰胡子教会了它如何无视太阳，随意沐浴热量。

translations.english: On top of the Throat of the World is a patch of snow that's never melted.
translations.chinese: 世界之喉的顶端有一团永远不会融化的雪。

translations.english: The ivory produced by those beasts is as hard as iron. But the giants have found ways to make it yield.
translations.chinese: 那些野兽的牙齿像铁一样坚硬。但巨人们找到了粉碎它们的办法。

translations.english: They're able to grind it down so fine that it can be infused into the lattice of packed snow.
translations.chinese: 他们能把它打磨到细得可以混入雪里。

translations.english: The finished material has the delicate nature of fresh powder snow, but the strength of the hardest steel.
translations.chinese: 成品和刚刚落下的雪花一样细腻，但却有着坚硬如钢的硬度。

translations.chinese: 当然，我猜，就算你想毁坏瓶子，你也没那个知识。

translations.english: Either way, this is the end of it.
translations.chinese: 不管怎样，这事儿都结束了。

translations.english: Now if you'll excuse me, I'm not quite in the mood to entertain guests. I trust you can show yourself out.
translations.chinese: 恕我失陪了，我现在没心情送客了。你自己出去吧。

translations.english: The Synod seemed convinced it was somewhere in Skyrim. They inquired about the ruins of Mzulft, but that's all I remember.
translations.chinese: 希诺似乎认为它就在天际的某个地方。他们询问过姆祖伏特废墟的事，但我也只记得这些了。

translations.english: I suppose if you're intent on looking for the staff, there's a chance they might be in Mzulft yet. Just don't expect them to be cooperative.
translations.chinese: 如果你执意要找法杖，他们应该还在姆祖伏特。只是不要指望他们会配合。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027567]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: It sounded like they were heading there, though they were rather secretive about why. | ZH: 看来他们是想去那里，不过他们对原因却三缄其口。 | SID: 003C77
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: The Synod seemed convinced it was somewhere in Skyrim. They inquired about the ruins of Mzulft, but that's all I remember. | ZH: 希诺似乎认为它就在天际的某个地方。他们询问过姆祖伏特废墟的事，但我也只记得这些了。 | SID: 004C3A
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: I suppose if you're intent on looking for the staff, there's a chance they might be in Mzulft yet. Just don't expect them to be cooperative. | ZH: 如果你执意要找法杖，他们应该还在姆祖伏特。只是不要指望他们会配合。 | SID: 00C54E

translations.english: A most impressive attitude. Keep this up, and you'll do quite well for yourself.
translations.chinese: 很不错的态度。好好坚持，你会做得更好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002756E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: A most impressive attitude. Keep this up, and you'll do quite well for yourself. | ZH: 很不错的态度。好好坚持，你会做得更好。 | SID: 00C74A

translations.english: Really? And what might that be?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002756F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Really? And what might that be? | ZH: 是吗？有什么消息？ | SID: 00B208

translations.english: Something as specific and ancient as the Staff of Magnus... I'm not sure we'd ever find something like that...
translations.chinese: 玛格努斯之杖那样古老奇物……我不确定能否找得到……

translations.english: I seem to recall Mirabelle mentioning the staff somewhat recently. Why don't you see if she can tell you anything?
translations.chinese: 我好像记得米拉贝勒提到过那个法杖。你何不去问问，看她能不能告诉你些什么？

translations.english: This circlet once proved invaluable to me. I hope it can be of use to you now.
translations.chinese: 这个头环曾经是我的宝物。希望它现在能帮到你。

translations.english: I'm quite pleased with your progress, you know. You've certainly proven yourself to be more than a mere Apprentice. Well done.
translations.chinese: 我对你的进步很满意。你已经证明了自己不仅仅是个学徒。做得很好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027570]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Something as specific and ancient as the Staff of Magnus... I'm not sure we'd ever find something like that... | ZH: 玛格努斯之杖那样古老奇物……我不确定能否找得到…… | SID: 00103F
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: I seem to recall Mirabelle mentioning the staff somewhat recently. Why don't you see if she can tell you anything? | ZH: 我好像记得米拉贝勒提到过那个法杖。你何不去问问，看她能不能告诉你些什么？ | SID: 0095AD
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: This circlet once proved invaluable to me. I hope it can be of use to you now. | ZH: 这个头环曾经是我的宝物。希望它现在能帮到你。 | SID: 0112D4
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: I'm quite pleased with your progress, you know. You've certainly proven yourself to be more than a mere Apprentice. Well done. | ZH: 我对你的进步很满意。你已经证明了自己不仅仅是个学徒。做得很好。 | SID: 011317

translations.english: Just what have you gotten yourself involved in?
translations.chinese: 你到底把自己卷进什么里了？

translations.english: Whatever is going on, whatever you're up to... Be very careful.
translations.chinese: 不管怎样，无论做什么……都要小心为上。

translations.english: The Augur?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027571]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Just what have you gotten yourself involved in? | ZH: 你到底把自己卷进什么里了？ | SID: 0068A8
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Whatever is going on, whatever you're up to... Be very careful. | ZH: 不管怎样，无论做什么……都要小心为上。 | SID: 00E0BB
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: The Augur? | ZH: 占卜师？ | SID: 00F4F8

translations.english: They were apparently under the impression we were keeping it in a closet somewhere.
translations.chinese: 他们显然觉得是我们把它藏在哪个柜子里了。

translations.english: I only brought it to his attention a few months back when the Synod showed up here looking for it.
translations.chinese: 几个月前，希诺来这里找它的时候，我才报告过他。

translations.english: I see. Well yes, I suppose I did mention it, though I'm not sure what he expects me to tell you.
translations.chinese: 我明白了。没错，我确实提到过，不过我不确定他想让我告诉你什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027574]

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I see. Well yes, I suppose I did mention it, though I'm not sure what he expects me to tell you. | ZH: 我明白了。没错，我确实提到过，不过我不确定他想让我告诉你什么。 | SID: 00D668

translations.english: And how do you know this?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027575]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And how do you know this? | ZH: 那你是怎么知道的？ | SID: 008F41

translations.english: I can appreciate that this... thing, this Orb... It's very impressive. Very unique, and definitely worth studying.
translations.chinese: 我能理解……这个东西，这个球体……确实很神奇。非常独特，绝对值得研究。

translations.english: But let's not jump to any conclusions, or assign it importance beyond what we're certain of.
translations.chinese: 但还是不要妄下结论，也不需把它看得过于重要。

translations.english: The "Eye of Magnus"?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027576]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I can appreciate that this... thing, this Orb... It's very impressive. Very unique, and definitely worth studying. | ZH: 我能理解……这个东西，这个球体……确实很神奇。非常独特，绝对值得研究。 | SID: 0034C0
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: But let's not jump to any conclusions, or assign it importance beyond what we're certain of. | ZH: 但还是不要妄下结论，也不需把它看得过于重要。 | SID: 00387E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: The "Eye of Magnus"? | ZH: “玛格努斯之眼”？ | SID: 00F13C

translations.english: Well now that's an odd question. Why in the world would you be asking?
translations.chinese: 怪问题。为什么要问这个？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027577]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well now that's an odd question. Why in the world would you be asking? | ZH: 怪问题。为什么要问这个？ | SID: 007150

translations.english: My understanding is that all they really do is make noise in an attempt to curry favor from the Emperor. Lots of politics, little magic.
translations.chinese: 依我看，他们的所作所为都是为了讨好皇帝。政治很积极，魔法马虎眼。

translations.english: Mages based out of Cyrodiil. They fancy themselves the Imperial Authority on magic these last few hundred years.
translations.chinese: 希罗帝尔的法师组织。几百年来，他们自以为是帝国在魔法方面的权威。

translations.english: It became clear they're trying to hoard powerful artifacts, looking to consolidate power.
translations.chinese: 他们很明显是在试图囤积强大的神器来巩固权力。

translations.english: I was quite surprised to find them on our doorstep. They seemed amiable enough, but their line of questioning made me... uneasy.
translations.chinese: 他们出现在咱们家门口的时候我还很惊讶。虽然态度很和蔼，但他们的提问让我……不安。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027578]

translations.english: Did you really?
I... I'm impressed with your initiative. Of course, someone will need to follow up on this.
translations.chinese: 你……你的主动性实在令我印象深刻。当然，这件事需要有人跟进。

translations.english: And he specifically mentioned the Staff of Magnus?
translations.chinese: 他还特别提到了玛格努斯之杖？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027579]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Did you really? | ZH: 真的吗？ | SID: 001E55
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I... I'm impressed with your initiative. Of course, someone will need to follow up on this. | ZH: 你……你的主动性实在令我印象深刻。当然，这件事需要有人跟进。 | SID: 0050CD
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: And he specifically mentioned the Staff of Magnus? | ZH: 他还特别提到了玛格努斯之杖？ | SID: 00D7D9

translations.english: I'm sorry, what?
Well... I'd certainly love to have such a powerful staff, but I'm not really sure that any of us need it.
translations.chinese: 嗯……我当然也希望有这么一柄强大的法杖，但我不确定我们是否真的需要它。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0002757A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I'm sorry, what? | ZH: 对不起，你说什么？ | SID: 004383
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Well... I'd certainly love to have such a powerful staff, but I'm not really sure that any of us need it. | ZH: 嗯……我当然也希望有这么一柄强大的法杖，但我不确定我们是否真的需要它。 | SID: 00C1AE

translations.english: Well, it's said to be very powerful. Has the capacity to store an incredible amount of magical power, as the story goes.
translations.chinese: 据说它十分强大。如传说中所说，能够储存不可思议体量的魔力。

translations.english: But it's more myth than anything at this point. I've no doubt that it actually exists, but no one has seen it in what, decades? Longer? I'm not sure.
translations.chinese: 但此时此刻来看，更像是子虚乌有。我确信它确实存在，但有几十年没人见过了吧？可能更久了？我也不确定。

translations.english: The only time I've heard it mentioned was when those Synod characters showed up some months ago looking for it.
translations.chinese: 唯一一次听说还是几个月前希诺那帮人来找它的时候。

translations.english: I think you'll find this payment to be more than fair.
translations.chinese: 你会发现这份报酬很公平的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027E4F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Leave that dog alone! | ZH: 别碰那条狗！ | SID: 00B47D

translations.english: Hey, that's a valuable animal!

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027E54]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hey, that's a valuable animal! | ZH: 嘿，那家伙可值钱了！ | SID: 0053E7

translations.english: I'll prove it to you, all right? I'll get you the letter. Just... meet me at the statue of Talos, and don't tell anyone about this.
translations.chinese: 我可以给你证明，行吗？我去给你拿信。就……在塔洛斯雕像那儿等我，别告诉任何人。

translations.english: Okay, okay!
All I know is that Idolaf made some effort to find out what happened to him, but was told to stop asking questions.
translations.chinese: 我只知道伊多拉夫在努力找他的下落，但被警告不要再继续探查了。

translations.english: He got some letter from the Legion and has left it alone since then.
translations.chinese: 他收到了来自军团的信件，就不再管这件事了。

translations.english: I'll round up what men I can, and meet you outside Northwatch Keep. We'll get in and out as fast as possible.
translations.chinese: 我会尽量召集人手，到北望堡垒外等你。我们得快进快出。

translations.english: I'll see you there.

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027F4A]

translations.english: Then what are you doing here?
No? So you don't know anything about my brother?
translations.chinese: 不是？所以你对我兄弟一无所知？

translations.english: What makes you think I know anything? Everyone knows he's dead and gone!
translations.chinese: 你凭什么觉得我会知道什么？大家都知道他死了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027F4E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What makes you think I know anything? Everyone knows he's dead and gone! | ZH: 你凭什么觉得我会知道什么？大家都知道他死了！ | SID: 00002C

translations.english: Thorald... Thorald Gray-Mane? Fighting for the Stormcloaks, disappeared and believed dead?
translations.chinese: 索拉德……索拉德·灰鬃？他为风暴斗篷而战，失踪了，都说他死了？

translations.english: You really don't know anything about this, do you?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00027F50]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Thorald... Thorald Gray-Mane? Fighting for the Stormcloaks, disappeared and believed dead? | ZH: 索拉德……索拉德·灰鬃？他为风暴斗篷而战，失踪了，都说他死了？ | SID: 0062EB

translations.english: I used some contacts in the Legion, asked some questions. Was told I should mind my own business.
translations.chinese: 我动用了在军团的关系，问了一些事。他们让我不要多管闲事。

translations.english: Oh no. No, no, no. This can't be happening.
You what?
Please, you can't tell anyone. It must remain a secret! I'll do whatever you want.
translations.chinese: 拜托，不要告诉任何人。一定要保密！要我做什么都行。

translations.english: Here, see for yourself. This is the last word I received. I'm telling you, he's gone for good.
translations.chinese: 来，自己看吧。这是我最后收到的消息。告诉你，他回不来了。

translations.english: If you go in there, you don't come out. Ever.
translations.chinese: 如果你去了，就别打算出来了。永远。

translations.english: Last I'd heard, he'd been carted off to Northwatch Keep. Ever heard of it?
translations.chinese: 据我最后听到的，他被押送到北望堡垒了。有听说过吗？
